   365	
   366	function summarizeDrivers(drivers: Record<DriverKey, DriverData>): {
   367	  average: number;
   368	  topName: string;
   369	  topScore: number;
   370	  alertCount: number;
   371	} {
   372	  const scoredEntries = (Object.values(drivers) as DriverData[]).filter(
   373	    (d) => d.score !== null,
   374	  ) as Array<DriverData & { score: number }>;
   375	
   376	  const average =
   377	    scoredEntries.length > 0
   378	      ? Math.round(
   379	          (scoredEntries.reduce((acc, d) => acc + d.score, 0) / scoredEntries.length) * 10,
   380	        ) / 10
   381	      : 0;
   382	
   383	  const highest =
   384	    scoredEntries.length > 0
   385	      ? scoredEntries.slice().sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)[0]
   386	      : null;
   387	
   388	  const topScore = highest?.score ?? 0;
   389	  const topName = highest?.name ?? "No Data";
   390	  const alertCount = scoredEntries.filter((d) => d.score >= 65).length;
   391	
   392	  return { average, topName, topScore, alertCount };
   393	}
   394	
   395	async function readAiRiskFactorsSnapshot(): Promise<AiRiskFactorsSnapshot | null> {
   396	  const snapshot = await readAiSnapshot<AiRiskFactorsSnapshot>("app/config/dashboard-risk-factors-ai.json");
   397	  if (!snapshot) return null;
   398	  if (!snapshot.drivers || !snapshot.intelligence) return null;
   399	  return snapshot;
   400	}
   401	
   402	function driverFocus(driver: DriverKey): string {
   403	  if (driver === "vix_stress") return "volatility transmission into procurement timing";
   404	  if (driver === "crush_pressure") return "processor margin pressure and oil-share economics";
   405	  if (driver === "china_tension") return "China demand and trade-flow displacement";
   406	  if (driver === "tariff_threat") return "policy shocks and geopolitical tariff channels";
   407	  return "energy complex pass-through into ZL";
   408	}
   409	
   410	function buildDriverProvenance(
   411	  key: DriverKey,
   412	  dataDate: string | null,
   413	  generatedAt: string | null,
   414	): AiCardProvenance {
   415	  const asOf = dataDate ?? generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   416	  return {
   417	    asOf,
   418	    generatedAt: generatedAt ?? asOf,
   419	    method: "verified-db-weekly-ingest-plus-ai-snapshot",
   420	    sourceFeeds: [
   421	      "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   422	      "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   423	    ],
   424	    sourceRecords: [
   425	      {
   426	        source: "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   427	        table: "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   428	        recordHint: `driver=${key}`,
   429	        observedAt: dataDate ?? undefined,
   430	      },
   431	      {
   432	        source: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   433	        table: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   434	        recordHint: `mapped_driver=${key}`,
   435	        observedAt: dataDate ?? undefined,
   436	      },
   437	    ],
   438	  };
   439	}
   440	
   441	function buildIntelligenceProvenance(
   442	  asOf: string | null,
   443	  generatedAt: string | null,
   444	): AiCardProvenance {
   445	  const resolvedAsOf = asOf ?? generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   446	  return {
   447	    asOf: resolvedAsOf,
   448	    generatedAt: generatedAt ?? resolvedAsOf,
   449	    method: "verified-db-weekly-ingest-plus-ai-snapshot",
   450	    sourceFeeds: [
   451	      "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   452	      "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   453	    ],
   454	    sourceRecords: [
   455	      {
   456	        source: "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   457	        table: "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   458	        recordHint: "latest driver metric set",
   459	        observedAt: resolvedAsOf,
   460	      },
   461	      {
   462	        source: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   463	        table: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   464	        recordHint: "latest factor attribution set",
   465	        observedAt: resolvedAsOf,
   466	      },
   467	    ],
   468	  };
   469	}
   470	
   471	function buildDriverWhatsHappening(
   472	  driver: DriverKey,
   473	  payload: DriverData,
   474	  aggregateSummary: string,
   475	  topDriverName: string,
   476	  averagePressure: number,
   477	  instructions: StrategicSpecialInstructions,
   478	): WhatsHappening {
   479	  const scoreText = payload.score === null ? "No scored signal yet" : `Score ${Math.round(payload.score)}`;
   480	  const commonState = scoreState(payload.score);
   481	  const focus = driverFocus(driver);
   482	
   483	  const c = payload.components;
   484	  let supplyDemand = "Underlying supply/demand metrics are waiting on the next promoted dataset."
   485	  let geopolitical = "No explicit geopolitical pulse is dominating this driver in the current snapshot."
   486	  let sentiment = `Market posture is ${commonState}; regime tag is ${payload.regime}.`
   487	
   488	  if (driver === "vix_stress") {
   489	    supplyDemand = `VIX ${formatMetric(c.vix_value ?? null, "fixed1")} and OVX ${formatMetric(c.ovx_value ?? null, "fixed1")} define the current volatility envelope.`
   490	    geopolitical = "Cross-asset stress is being monitored as an early warning for procurement-cost spikes."
   491	    sentiment = `Volatility regime is ${commonState}; defensive hedging usually increases as this score rises.`
   492	  } else if (driver === "crush_pressure") {
   493	    supplyDemand = `Crush margin ${formatMetric(c.board_crush_value ?? null, "usd2")} and oil share ${formatMetric(c.oil_share_value ?? null, "fixed1")} describe processing economics.`
   494	    geopolitical = "Crush behavior is primarily a microstructure signal unless macro shocks force abrupt repricing."
   495	    sentiment = `Crush pressure is ${commonState}; buyers should watch processing spreads for timing risk.`
   496	  } else if (driver === "china_tension") {
   497	    supplyDemand = `CNY ${formatMetric(c.cny_rate ?? null, "fixed2")} with ${formatMetric(c.soy_china_news_count ?? null, "int")} China/soy headlines tracks demand-flow tension.`
   498	    geopolitical = "Trade-friction headlines and import-flow shifts remain the key geopolitical amplifier here."
   499	    sentiment = `China-linked risk is ${commonState}; abrupt headline shifts can reprice demand assumptions quickly.`
   500	  } else if (driver === "tariff_threat") {
   501	    supplyDemand = `Uncertainty index ${formatMetric(c.uncertainty_value ?? null, "int")} and crude 5D ${formatMetric(c.oil_change_5d ?? null, "pct")} frame policy-to-price transmission.`
   502	    geopolitical = `${formatMetric(c.iran_war_news_count ?? null, "int")} Iran/war headlines and ${formatMetric(c.macro_news_count ?? null, "int")} macro headlines are feeding this channel.`
   503	    sentiment = `Policy risk is ${commonState}; this is the macro/geopolitical lane most likely to force schedule adjustments.`
   504	  } else {
   505	    supplyDemand = `CL ${formatMetric(c.cl_price ?? null, "usd2")}, 5D change ${formatMetric(c.cl_change_5d ?? null, "pct")}, and OVX ${formatMetric(c.ovx_value ?? null, "fixed1")} define energy stress.`
   506	    geopolitical = `Energy headline count is ${formatMetric(c.energy_news_count ?? null, "int")}; supply-shock sensitivity remains active.`
   507	    sentiment = `Energy pass-through is ${commonState}; sustained pressure can lift procurement urgency.`
   508	  }
   509	
   510	  const zlImplication =
   511	    payload.score === null
   512	      ? "Keep standard buying cadence while waiting for fresh promoted metrics."
   513	      : payload.score >= 70
   514	        ? "Increase execution vigilance, shorten decision windows, and preserve optionality on contract timing."
   515	        : payload.score >= 45
   516	          ? "Maintain normal execution with tighter monitoring around upcoming refresh windows."
   517	          : "Pressure is contained; continue schedule-based procurement unless another driver escalates."
   518	
   519	  return {
   520	    whatsHappening: `${payload.name} is currently ${commonState}. ${scoreText} with level ${payload.level} keeps focus on ${focus}. Strategic frame: ${instructions.cardTopic}.`,
   521	    macroContext: `${aggregateSummary} Top pressure is ${topDriverName} and average pressure is ${averagePressure.toFixed(1)}.`,
   522	    supplyDemand,
   523	    geopolitical,
   524	    investorSentiment: sentiment,
   525	    nearTermOutlook: payload.score === null ? "Hard stop: near-term outlook blocked until verified signal fields are populated." : payload.score >= 70 ? "High-risk posture likely to persist near term." : payload.score >= 45 ? "Mixed posture with event-driven volatility risk." : "Low-pressure posture unless headline regime changes.",
   526	    zlImplication,
   527	  };
   528	}
   529	
   530	export async function GET() {
   531	  try {
   532	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
   533	    const aiSnapshot = await readAiRiskFactorsSnapshot();
   534	    const responseGeneratedAt = new Date().toISOString();
   535	
   536	    const [{ data: metricRows, error: metricError }, { data: attributionRows, error: attributionError }] = await Promise.all([
   537	      supabase
   538	        .schema("analytics")
   539	        .from("dashboard_metrics")
   540	        .select("trade_date, metric_key, metric_value")
   541	        .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
   542	        .limit(500),
   543	      supabase
   544	        .schema("analytics")
   545	        .from("driver_attribution_1d")
   546	        .select("trade_date, rank, factor, contribution, confidence")
   547	        .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
   548	        .order("rank", { ascending: true })
   549	        .limit(100),
   550	    ]);
   551	
   552	    if (metricError || attributionError) {
   553	      return NextResponse.json(
   554	        {
   555	          error: metricError?.message ?? attributionError?.message ?? "Failed to load market drivers",
   556	        },
   557	        { status: 500 },
   558	      );
   559	    }
   560	
   561	    const latestMetricDate = metricRows?.[0]?.trade_date ?? null;
   562	    const latestMetrics = (metricRows ?? []).filter((r) => r.trade_date === latestMetricDate);
   563	    const metricMap = new Map<string, number | null>();
   564	    for (const row of latestMetrics) {
   565	      metricMap.set(normalizeMetricKey(row.metric_key), toNumber(row.metric_value));
   566	    }
   567	
   568	    const latestAttributionDate = attributionRows?.[0]?.trade_date ?? null;
   569	    const latestAttribution = (attributionRows ?? []).filter((r) => r.trade_date === latestAttributionDate);
   570	    const attributionByDriver = new Map<DriverKey, { trade_date: string; factor: string; contribution: number | null }>();
   571	    for (const row of latestAttribution) {
   572	      const driverKey = mapFactorToDriver(String(row.factor));
   573	      if (!driverKey) continue;
   574	      const contribution = toNumber(row.contribution);
   575	      const existing = attributionByDriver.get(driverKey);
   576	      const existingAbs = existing?.contribution === null || existing?.contribution === undefined ? -1 : Math.abs(existing.contribution);
   577	      const currentAbs = contribution === null ? -1 : Math.abs(contribution);
   578	      if (!existing || currentAbs > existingAbs) {
   579	        attributionByDriver.set(driverKey, {
   580	          trade_date: String(row.trade_date),
   581	          factor: String(row.factor),
   582	          contribution,
   583	        });
   584	      }
   585	    }
   586	
   587	    const scoreCandidates = {
   588	      vix_stress: coerceScore(getMetric(metricMap, ["vix_stress_score", "vix_score", "market_volatility_score", "driver_vix_score"])),
   589	      crush_pressure: coerceScore(getMetric(metricMap, ["crush_pressure_score", "crush_score", "driver_crush_score"])),
   590	      china_tension: coerceScore(getMetric(metricMap, ["china_tension_score", "china_score", "driver_china_score"])),
   591	      tariff_threat: coerceScore(getMetric(metricMap, ["tariff_threat_score", "tariff_score", "policy_risk_score", "driver_tariff_score"])),
   592	      energy_stress: coerceScore(getMetric(metricMap, ["energy_stress_score", "energy_score", "driver_energy_score"])),
   593	    };
   594	
   595	    for (const key of Object.keys(scoreCandidates) as DriverKey[]) {
   596	      if (scoreCandidates[key] === null) {
   597	        scoreCandidates[key] = coerceScore(attributionByDriver.get(key)?.contribution ?? null);
   598	      }
   599	    }
   600	
   601	    const normalized = (value: number, floor: number, ceil: number): number =>
   602	      Math.max(0, Math.min(100, ((value - floor) / (ceil - floor)) * 100));
   603	
   604	    if (scoreCandidates.vix_stress === null) {
   605	      const vix = getMetric(metricMap, ["vix_value"]);
   606	      const ovx = getMetric(metricMap, ["ovx_value"]);
   607	      if (vix !== null || ovx !== null) {
   608	        const vixScore = vix === null ? 0 : normalized(vix, 14, 40);
   609	        const ovxScore = ovx === null ? 0 : normalized(ovx, 20, 60);
   610	        scoreCandidates.vix_stress = Math.round((vixScore * 0.55 + ovxScore * 0.45) * 10) / 10;
   611	      }
   612	    }
   613	
   614	    if (scoreCandidates.energy_stress === null) {
   615	      const cl5d = getMetric(metricMap, ["cl_change_5d", "crude_oil_change_5d"]);
   616	      const ovx = getMetric(metricMap, ["ovx_value"]);
   617	      if (cl5d !== null || ovx !== null) {
   618	        const clScore = cl5d === null ? 0 : normalized(Math.abs(cl5d * 100), 0.5, 8);
   619	        const ovxScore = ovx === null ? 0 : normalized(ovx, 20, 60);
   620	        scoreCandidates.energy_stress = Math.round((clScore * 0.5 + ovxScore * 0.5) * 10) / 10;
   621	      }
   622	    }
   623	
   624	    if (scoreCandidates.china_tension === null) {
   625	      const cny = getMetric(metricMap, ["cny_rate"]);
   626	      if (cny !== null) {
   627	        scoreCandidates.china_tension = Math.round(normalized(Math.abs(cny - 7.0), 0.03, 0.35) * 10) / 10;
   628	      }
   629	    }
   630	
   631	    const metricDate = latestMetricDate ? String(latestMetricDate) : null;
   632	    const dateFor = (key: DriverKey): string | null =>
   633	      attributionByDriver.get(key)?.trade_date ?? metricDate;
   634	
   635	    const drivers: Record<DriverKey, DriverData> = {
   636	      vix_stress: {
   637	        name: "VIX Stress",
   638	        score: scoreCandidates.vix_stress,
   639	        level: levelFor("vix_stress", scoreCandidates.vix_stress),
   640	        regime: regimeFor(scoreCandidates.vix_stress),
   641	        headline: headlineFor("Market volatility", scoreCandidates.vix_stress),
   642	        components: {
   643	          vix_value: getMetric(metricMap, ["vix_value"]),
   644	          ovx_value: getMetric(metricMap, ["ovx_value"]),
   645	        },
   646	        aiPowered: false,
   647	        dataDate: dateFor("vix_stress"),
   648	      },
   649	      crush_pressure: {
   650	        name: "Crush Pressure",
   651	        score: scoreCandidates.crush_pressure,
   652	        level: levelFor("crush_pressure", scoreCandidates.crush_pressure),
   653	        regime: regimeFor(scoreCandidates.crush_pressure),
   654	        headline: headlineFor("Crush margins", scoreCandidates.crush_pressure),
   655	        components: {
   656	          board_crush_value: getMetric(metricMap, ["board_crush_value", "crush_margin"]),
   657	          oil_share_value: getMetric(metricMap, ["oil_share_value", "soy_oil_share"]),
   658	          oil_share_5d_change: getMetric(metricMap, ["oil_share_5d_change"]),
   659	        },
   660	        aiPowered: false,
   661	        dataDate: dateFor("crush_pressure"),
   662	      },
   663	      china_tension: {
   664	        name: "China Tension",
   665	        score: scoreCandidates.china_tension,
   666	        level: levelFor("china_tension", scoreCandidates.china_tension),
   667	        regime: regimeFor(scoreCandidates.china_tension),
   668	        headline: headlineFor("China demand/trade", scoreCandidates.china_tension),
   669	        components: {
   670	          cny_rate: getMetric(metricMap, ["cny_rate"]),
   671	          soy_china_news_count: getMetric(metricMap, ["soy_china_news_count", "china_soy_news_count"]),
   672	        },
   673	        aiPowered: false,
   674	        dataDate: dateFor("china_tension"),
   675	      },
   676	      tariff_threat: {
   677	        name: "Macro Threat",
   678	        score: scoreCandidates.tariff_threat,
   679	        level: levelFor("tariff_threat", scoreCandidates.tariff_threat),
   680	        regime: regimeFor(scoreCandidates.tariff_threat),
   681	        headline: headlineFor("Macro/geopolitical", scoreCandidates.tariff_threat),
   682	        components: {
   683	          tpu_value: getMetric(metricMap, ["tpu_value", "trade_policy_uncertainty"]),
   684	          uncertainty_value: getMetric(metricMap, ["uncertainty_value", "tpu_value", "trade_policy_uncertainty"]),
   685	          emv_value: getMetric(metricMap, ["emv_value", "trade_policy_index"]),
   686	          soy_tariff_news_count: getMetric(metricMap, ["soy_tariff_news_count", "tariff_news_count"]),
   687	          oil_change_5d: getMetric(metricMap, ["oil_change_5d", "cl_change_5d", "crude_oil_change_5d"]),
   688	          iran_war_news_count: getMetric(metricMap, ["iran_war_news_count", "soy_tariff_news_count", "tariff_news_count"]),
   689	          macro_news_count: getMetric(metricMap, ["macro_news_count", "soy_tariff_news_count", "tariff_news_count"]),
   690	        },
   691	        aiPowered: false,
   692	        dataDate: dateFor("tariff_threat"),
   693	      },
   694	      energy_stress: {
   695	        name: "Energy Stress",
   696	        score: scoreCandidates.energy_stress,
   697	        level: levelFor("energy_stress", scoreCandidates.energy_stress),
   698	        regime: regimeFor(scoreCandidates.energy_stress),
   699	        headline: headlineFor("Energy complex", scoreCandidates.energy_stress),
   700	        components: {
   701	          cl_price: getMetric(metricMap, ["cl_price", "crude_oil_price"]),
   702	          cl_change_5d: getMetric(metricMap, ["cl_change_5d", "crude_oil_change_5d"]),
   703	          ovx_value: getMetric(metricMap, ["ovx_value"]),
   704	          energy_news_count: getMetric(metricMap, ["energy_news_count"]),
   705	        },
   706	        aiPowered: false,
   707	        dataDate: dateFor("energy_stress"),
   708	      },
   709	    };
   710	
   711	    const allDates = (Object.values(drivers) as DriverData[])
   712	      .map((d) => d.dataDate)
   713	      .filter((d): d is string => Boolean(d))
   714	      .sort();
   715	    const asOfDateMin = allDates[0] ?? null;
   716	    const asOfDateMax = allDates[allDates.length - 1] ?? null;
   717	    const asOfDate = asOfDateMin;
   718	    const mixedVintage = Boolean(asOfDateMin && asOfDateMax && asOfDateMin !== asOfDateMax);
   719	
   720	    const mergeDriver = (
   721	      key: DriverKey,
   722	      base: DriverData,
   723	      defaultHeadlineName: string,
   724	      defaultInstructions: StrategicSpecialInstructions,
   725	    ): DriverData => {
   726	      const ai = aiSnapshot?.drivers?.[key];
   727	      const aiScoreRaw = ai?.score;
   728	      const aiScore = aiScoreRaw === null || aiScoreRaw === undefined ? null : coerceScore(Number(aiScoreRaw));
   729	      const mergedScore = aiScore ?? base.score;
   730	      const mergedLevel = ai?.level ?? levelFor(key, mergedScore);
   731	      const mergedComponents = mergeDriverComponents(base.components, ai?.components);
   732	
   733	      const mergedPayload: DriverData = {
   734	        ...base,
   735	        score: mergedScore,
   736	        level: mergedLevel,
   737	        regime: regimeFor(mergedScore),
   738	        headline: ai?.headline ?? headlineFor(defaultHeadlineName, mergedScore),
   739	        components: mergedComponents,
   740	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   741	          ai?.strategicSpecialInstructions ?? defaultInstructions,
   742	        provenance:
   743	          ai?.provenance ??
   744	          buildDriverProvenance(
   745	            key,
   746	            base.dataDate,
   747	            aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? responseGeneratedAt,
   748	          ),
   749	        aiPowered: Boolean(ai),
   750	        dataDate: base.dataDate,
   751	      };
   752	
   753	      return {
   754	        ...mergedPayload,
   755	        whatsHappening: ai?.whatsHappening,
   756	      };
   757	    };
   758	
   759	    const mergedDrivers: Record<DriverKey, DriverData> = {
   760	      vix_stress: mergeDriver(
   761	        "vix_stress",
   762	        drivers.vix_stress,
   763	        "Market volatility",
   764	        DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS.vix_stress,
   765	      ),
   766	      crush_pressure: mergeDriver(
   767	        "crush_pressure",
   768	        drivers.crush_pressure,
   769	        "Crush margins",
   770	        DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS.crush_pressure,
   771	      ),
   772	      china_tension: mergeDriver(
   773	        "china_tension",
   774	        drivers.china_tension,
   775	        "China demand/trade",
   776	        DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS.china_tension,
   777	      ),
   778	      tariff_threat: mergeDriver(
   779	        "tariff_threat",
   780	        drivers.tariff_threat,
   781	        "Macro/geopolitical",
   782	        DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS.tariff_threat,
   783	      ),
   784	      energy_stress: mergeDriver(
   785	        "energy_stress",
   786	        drivers.energy_stress,
   787	        "Energy complex",
   788	        DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS.energy_stress,
   789	      ),
   790	    };
   791	
   792	    const mergedSummary = summarizeDrivers(mergedDrivers);
   793	    const mergedAverage = mergedSummary.average;
   794	    const mergedTopName = mergedSummary.topName;
   795	    const mergedTopScore = mergedSummary.topScore;
   796	    const mergedAlertCount = mergedSummary.alertCount;
   797	
   798	    for (const key of Object.keys(mergedDrivers) as DriverKey[]) {
   799	      const driver = mergedDrivers[key];
   800	      if (driver.whatsHappening) continue;
   801	      const instructions =
   802	        driver.strategicSpecialInstructions ?? DRIVER_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS[key];
   803	      driver.whatsHappening = buildDriverWhatsHappening(
   804	        key,
   805	        driver,
   806	        mergedTopScore === 0 && mergedTopName === "No Data"
   807	          ? "Hard stop: promoted analytics rows are missing."
   808	          : `Top concern is ${mergedTopName} at ${Math.round(mergedTopScore)}.`,
   809	        mergedTopName,
   810	        mergedAverage,
   811	        instructions,
   812	      );
   813	    }
   814	
   815	    const response: MarketDriversResponse = {
   816	      as_of_date: asOfDate,
   817	      as_of_date_min: asOfDateMin,
   818	      as_of_date_max: asOfDateMax,
   819	      mixed_vintage: mixedVintage,
   820	      drivers: mergedDrivers,
   821	      summary: {
   822	        average_pressure: mergedAverage,
   823	        highest_pressure: { name: mergedTopName, score: mergedTopScore },
   824	        alert_count: mergedAlertCount,
   825	      },
   826	      intelligence: {
   827	        headline:
   828	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.headline ??
   829	          (mergedTopScore >= 65 ? "ELEVATED MARKET - Watch Procurement Risk" : "NORMAL MARKET - Buy On Schedule"),
   830	        summary:
   831	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.summary ??
   832	          (mergedTopName === "No Data"
   833	            ? "Hard stop: promoted analytics rows are missing for cross-driver synthesis."
   834	            : `Top concern is ${mergedTopName} at ${Math.round(mergedTopScore)}. Average risk is ${mergedAverage}.`),
   835	        drivers: aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.drivers ?? (Object.values(mergedDrivers) as DriverData[])
   836	          .filter((d) => d.score !== null)
   837	          .map((d) => ({
   838	            label: d.name,
   839	            outlook: d.score !== null && d.score >= 65 ? "PRESSURE" : d.score !== null && d.score <= 35 ? "SUPPORTIVE" : "MIXED",
   840	            detail: d.headline,
   841	          })),
   842	        zlOutlook: aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.zlOutlook ?? outlookFromScore(mergedAverage),
   843	        zlColor: aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.zlColor ?? colorFromScore(mergedAverage),
   844	        tradingImplication:
   845	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.tradingImplication ??
   846	          (mergedTopScore >= 65
   847	            ? "Risk elevated. Keep procurement flexible and monitor next refresh."
   848	            : "No major pressure signal yet. Continue normal buying schedule."),
   849	        aiPowered: Boolean(aiSnapshot?.intelligence),
   850	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   851	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   852	          MARKET_INTELLIGENCE_STRATEGIC_SPECIAL_INSTRUCTIONS,
   853	        provenance:
   854	          aiSnapshot?.intelligence?.provenance ??
   855	          buildIntelligenceProvenance(
   856	            asOfDateMax ?? asOfDateMin,
   857	            aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? responseGeneratedAt,
   858	          ),
   859	      },
   860	      ai: {
   861	        enabled: Boolean(aiSnapshot),
   862	        source: aiSnapshot?.source ?? "weekly-db-plus-ai-snapshot",
   863	        model: aiSnapshot?.model ?? null,
   864	        reasoningEffort: aiSnapshot?.reasoningEffort ?? null,
   865	        generatedAt: aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? responseGeneratedAt,
   866	        refreshScheduleEt: aiSnapshot?.refreshScheduleEt ?? null,
   867	      },
   868	    };
   869	
   870	    return NextResponse.json(response, {
   871	      headers: { "Cache-Control": "no-store" },
   872	    });
   873	  } catch (err) {
   874	    return NextResponse.json(
   875	      { error: String(err) },
   876	      { status: 500, headers: { "Cache-Control": "no-store" } },
   877	    );
   878	  }
   879	}

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	import { readFile } from "node:fs/promises";
     2	import path from "node:path";
     3	
     4	export type AiSnapshotMeta = {
     5	  generatedAt: string;
     6	  model: string;
     7	  reasoningEffort: string;
     8	  source?: string;
     9	  refreshScheduleEt?: string;
    10	};
    11	
    12	export type AiEnvelopeMeta = {
    13	  enabled: boolean;
    14	  source: string;
    15	  model: string | null;
    16	  reasoningEffort: string | null;
    17	  generatedAt: string | null;
    18	  refreshScheduleEt: string | null;
    19	};
    20	
    21	const TRUSTED_SNAPSHOT_SOURCES = new Set([
    22	  "trusted-live-pull",
    23	  "trusted-authority-pull",
    24	  "ai-daily-refresh",
    25	  "chatgpt-pro-subscription-refresh",
    26	]);
    27	
    28	const SNAPSHOT_LOADERS: Record<string, () => Promise<unknown>> = {
    29	  "app/config/dashboard-risk-factors-ai.json": async () =>
    30	    (await import("@/app/config/dashboard-risk-factors-ai.json")).default,
    31	  "app/config/strategy-posture-ai.json": async () =>
    32	    (await import("@/app/config/strategy-posture-ai.json")).default,
    33	  "app/config/sentiment-overview-ai.json": async () =>
    34	    (await import("@/app/config/sentiment-overview-ai.json")).default,
    35	  "app/config/legislation-feed-ai.json": async () =>
    36	    (await import("@/app/config/legislation-feed-ai.json")).default,
    37	  "app/config/vegas-intel-ai.json": async () =>
    38	    (await import("@/app/config/vegas-intel-ai.json")).default,
    39	};
    40	
    41	function coerceSnapshot<T extends object>(parsed: unknown): (T & AiSnapshotMeta) | null {
    42	  if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== "object") return null;
    43	  const candidate = parsed as T & Partial<AiSnapshotMeta>;
    44	  if (typeof candidate.generatedAt !== "string" || candidate.generatedAt.trim().length === 0) return null;
    45	  if (typeof candidate.model !== "string" || candidate.model.trim().length === 0) return null;
    46	  if (typeof candidate.reasoningEffort !== "string" || candidate.reasoningEffort.trim().length === 0) return null;
    47	  const snapshotSource =
    48	    typeof candidate.source === "string" ? candidate.source.trim().toLowerCase() : "";
    49	  if (!TRUSTED_SNAPSHOT_SOURCES.has(snapshotSource)) return null;
    50	  return candidate as T & AiSnapshotMeta;
    51	}
    52	
    53	export async function readAiSnapshot<T extends object>(
    54	  relativePathFromRepoRoot: string,
    55	): Promise<(T & AiSnapshotMeta) | null> {
    56	  try {
    57	    const loader = SNAPSHOT_LOADERS[relativePathFromRepoRoot];
    58	    if (loader) {
    59	      const imported = await loader();
    60	      const validated = coerceSnapshot<T>(imported);
    61	      if (validated) return validated;
    62	    }
    63	
    64	    const fullPath = path.join(
    65	      /* turbopackIgnore: true */ process.cwd(),
    66	      relativePathFromRepoRoot,
    67	    );
    68	    const raw = await readFile(fullPath, "utf8");
    69	    return coerceSnapshot<T>(JSON.parse(raw));
    70	  } catch {
    71	    return null;
    72	  }
    73	}
    74	
    75	export function toAiEnvelopeMeta(snapshot: AiSnapshotMeta | null): AiEnvelopeMeta {
    76	  return {
    77	    enabled: Boolean(snapshot),
    78	    source: snapshot?.source ?? "none",
    79	    model: snapshot?.model ?? null,
    80	    reasoningEffort: snapshot?.reasoningEffort ?? null,
    81	    generatedAt: snapshot?.generatedAt ?? null,
    82	    refreshScheduleEt: snapshot?.refreshScheduleEt ?? null,
    83	  };
    84	}

    13	type StrategyCards = {

    95	
    96	function buildProvenance(
    97	  generatedAt: string,
    98	  tradeDate: string | null,
    99	  cardKey: keyof StrategyCards,
   100	  trustedUrls: string[],
   101	): AiCardProvenance {
   102	  return {
   103	    asOf: tradeDate ?? generatedAt,
   104	    generatedAt,
   105	    method: "verified-db-and-trusted-market-pull",
   106	    sourceFeeds: [
   107	      "analytics.market_posture",
   108	      "analytics.dashboard_metrics",
   109	      "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   110	      ...trustedUrls,
   111	    ],
   112	    sourceRecords: [
   113	      {
   114	        source: "analytics.market_posture",
   115	        table: "analytics.market_posture",
   116	        recordHint: tradeDate ? `trade_date=${tradeDate}` : "latest row",
   117	        observedAt: tradeDate ?? undefined,
   118	      },
   119	      {
   120	        source: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   121	        table: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
   122	        recordHint: `card=${cardKey}`,
   123	        observedAt: tradeDate ?? generatedAt,
   124	      },
   125	    ],
   126	    notes: [
   127	      "Buyer posture is interpreted from verified table and market-source pulls.",
   128	      "Hard stop is applied when required driver or market evidence is missing.",
   129	    ],
   130	  };
   131	}
   132	
   133	export async function GET() {
   134	  try {
   135	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
   136	    const aiSnapshot = await readAiSnapshot<StrategyAiSnapshot>(
   137	      "app/config/strategy-posture-ai.json",
   138	    );
   139	    const trustedMarket = await fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot();
   140	    const trustedUrls = uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(trustedMarket);
   141	
   142	    const [{ data: row, error }, { data: attributionRows }, { data: metricRows }] = await Promise.all([
   143	      supabase
   144	        .schema("analytics")
   145	        .from("market_posture")
   146	        .select("posture, rationale, trade_date")
   147	        .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
   148	        .limit(1)
   149	        .maybeSingle(),
   150	      supabase
   151	        .schema("analytics")
   152	        .from("driver_attribution_1d")
   153	        .select("trade_date, rank, factor, contribution")
   154	        .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
   155	        .order("rank", { ascending: true })
   156	        .limit(40),
   157	      supabase
   158	        .schema("analytics")
   159	        .from("dashboard_metrics")
   160	        .select("trade_date, metric_key, metric_value")
   161	        .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
   162	        .limit(300),
   163	    ]);
   164	
   165	    if (error) {
   166	      return NextResponse.json(
   167	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
   168	        { status: 500 },
   169	      );
   170	    }
   171	
   172	    const latestAttrDate = attributionRows?.[0]?.trade_date ?? null;
   173	    const latestAttr = (attributionRows ?? []).filter((r) => r.trade_date === latestAttrDate);
   174	    const topFactors = latestAttr
   175	      .slice(0, 4)
   176	      .map((r) => `${String(r.factor)} (${Number(r.contribution).toFixed(2)})`);
   177	
   178	    const latestMetricDate = metricRows?.[0]?.trade_date ?? null;
   179	    const latestMetrics = (metricRows ?? []).filter((r) => r.trade_date === latestMetricDate);
   180	    const metricMap = new Map<string, number>();
   181	    for (const rowMetric of latestMetrics) {
   182	      const n = Number(rowMetric.metric_value);
   183	      if (Number.isFinite(n)) {
   184	        metricMap.set(String(rowMetric.metric_key).toLowerCase(), n);
   185	      }
   186	    }
   187	
   188	    const dbVix = metricMap.get("vix_value") ?? null;
   189	    const dbOvx = metricMap.get("ovx_value") ?? null;
   190	    const dbCl5d = metricMap.get("cl_change_5d") ?? metricMap.get("crude_oil_change_5d") ?? null;
   191	    const liveVix = trustedMarket.vix.value ?? dbVix;
   192	    const liveOvx = trustedMarket.ovx.value ?? dbOvx;
   193	    const liveCl5d = trustedMarket.cl.change5d ?? dbCl5d;
   194	
   195	    const dbPosture: StrategyPosture | null = row
   196	      ? {
   197	          posture: row.posture as StrategyPosture["posture"],
   198	          rationale: row.rationale ?? "",
   199	          updatedAt: row.trade_date ?? new Date().toISOString(),
   200	        }
   201	      : null;
   202	
   203	    const posture: StrategyPosture | null = aiSnapshot?.posture ?? dbPosture;
   204	    const generatedAt = aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   205	    const tradeDate = row?.trade_date ?? posture?.updatedAt ?? null;
   206	    const stagedExecutionBias =
   207	      posture?.posture === "ACCUMULATE"
   208	        ? "Staged accumulation remains favored."
   209	        : posture?.posture === "WAIT"
   210	          ? "Hold execution optionality and avoid urgency."
   211	          : "Defer new exposure until risk compression is visible.";
   212	    const volatilityLine =
   213	      liveVix !== null && liveOvx !== null
   214	        ? `VIX ${liveVix.toFixed(2)} and OVX ${liveOvx.toFixed(2)} remain active volatility constraints.`
   215	        : "Hard stop: verified VIX/OVX volatility reads are unavailable.";
   216	    const crudeLine =
   217	      liveCl5d !== null
   218	        ? `CL 5-day change is ${(liveCl5d * 100).toFixed(2)}%, informing near-term pass-through risk.`
   219	        : "Hard stop: verified CL 5-day change is unavailable.";
   220	    const topFactorLine =
   221	      topFactors.length > 0
   222	        ? `Latest verified attribution stack: ${topFactors.join(", ")}.`
   223	        : "Hard stop: no verified attribution rows available in analytics.driver_attribution_1d.";
   224	    const noTrustedFeeds =
   225	      liveVix === null && liveOvx === null && liveCl5d === null;
   226	
   227	    const fallbackCards: StrategyCards = {
   228	      contractImpactCalculator: {
   229	        title: "Contract Impact Calculator",
   230	        body: noTrustedFeeds
   231	          ? "Hard stop: trusted market evidence from Yahoo/FRED is unavailable, so contract-impact guidance is blocked."
   232	          : `${stagedExecutionBias} ${volatilityLine} ${crudeLine}`,
   233	        strategicSpecialInstructions: STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.contractImpactCalculator,
   234	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "contractImpactCalculator", trustedUrls),
   235	      },
   236	      factorWaterfall: {
   237	        title: "Factor Waterfall",
   238	        body: topFactorLine,
   239	        strategicSpecialInstructions: STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.factorWaterfall,
   240	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "factorWaterfall", trustedUrls),
   241	      },
   242	      riskMetrics: {
   243	        title: "Risk Metrics",
   244	        body: noTrustedFeeds
   245	          ? "Hard stop: trusted volatility and crude metrics are unavailable; buyer risk-math output is blocked until verified feeds recover."
   246	          : `${volatilityLine} ${crudeLine} Decision-latency risk should be prioritized over single-window execution risk when these channels remain elevated.`,
   247	        strategicSpecialInstructions: STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.riskMetrics,
   248	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "riskMetrics", trustedUrls),
   249	      },
   250	    };
   251	
   252	    const rawCards = aiSnapshot?.cards ?? fallbackCards;
   253	    const cards: StrategyCards = {
   254	      contractImpactCalculator: {
   255	        ...fallbackCards.contractImpactCalculator,
   256	        ...rawCards.contractImpactCalculator,
   257	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   258	          rawCards.contractImpactCalculator?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   259	          STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.contractImpactCalculator,
   260	        provenance:
   261	          rawCards.contractImpactCalculator?.provenance ??
   262	          buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "contractImpactCalculator", trustedUrls),
   263	      },
   264	      factorWaterfall: {
   265	        ...fallbackCards.factorWaterfall,
   266	        ...rawCards.factorWaterfall,
   267	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   268	          rawCards.factorWaterfall?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   269	          STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.factorWaterfall,
   270	        provenance:
   271	          rawCards.factorWaterfall?.provenance ??
   272	          buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "factorWaterfall", trustedUrls),
   273	      },
   274	      riskMetrics: {
   275	        ...fallbackCards.riskMetrics,
   276	        ...rawCards.riskMetrics,
   277	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   278	          rawCards.riskMetrics?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   279	          STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS.riskMetrics,
   280	        provenance:
   281	          rawCards.riskMetrics?.provenance ??
   282	          buildProvenance(generatedAt, tradeDate, "riskMetrics", trustedUrls),
   283	      },
   284	    };
   285	
   286	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<StrategyPosture | null> = {
   287	      ok: true,
   288	      data: posture,
   289	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
   290	      source: ["analytics.market_posture", ...TRUSTED_MARKET_SOURCE_FEEDS].join(","),
   291	    };
   292	
   293	    return NextResponse.json({
   294	      ...envelope,
   295	      cards,
   296	      ai: toAiEnvelopeMeta(aiSnapshot),
   297	    });
   298	  } catch (err) {
   299	    return NextResponse.json(
   300	      { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
   301	      { status: 500 },
   302	    );
   303	  }
   304	}

   105	    ],
   106	    inferenceConstraints: [
   107	      "Do not equate position size with conviction durability.",
   108	      "Do not treat stale CoT inputs as real-time certainty.",
   109	      "Do not omit confidence caveats.",
   110	    ],
   111	    outputRequirements: [
   112	      "State bias class and confidence.",
   113	      "Explain procurement risk implication.",
   114	      "Specify what would change the bias interpretation.",
   115	    ],
   116	  } satisfies StrategicSpecialInstructions,
   117	  headlineFlow: {
   118	    cardTopic: "Headline Velocity and Regime Coherence",
   119	    strategicObjective:
   120	      "Assess whether headline velocity is producing actionable regime signal or noisy churn for procurement decisions.",
   121	    neuralConnectionThesis:
   122	      "Headline velocity only becomes actionable when persistence and cross-channel coherence are present; otherwise it inflates noise and overreaction risk.",
   123	    quantResearchProtocol: [
   124	      "Measure 24h/7d headline velocity and cluster concentration.",
   125	      "Classify cluster persistence by macro, policy, and energy channels.",
   126	      "Validate coherence with sentiment score directionality.",
   127	      "Link outcome to procurement monitoring frequency.",
   128	    ],
   129	    inferenceConstraints: [
   130	      "Do not infer regime shifts from velocity alone.",
   131	      "Do not ignore channel concentration effects.",
   132	      "Do not provide cadence advice without coherence check.",
   133	    ],
   134	    outputRequirements: [
   135	      "State whether velocity is signal or noise.",
   136	      "Describe expected persistence horizon.",
   137	      "Provide monitoring cadence recommendation.",
   138	    ],
   139	  } satisfies StrategicSpecialInstructions,
   140	} as const;
   141	
   142	function buildProvenance(
   143	  generatedAt: string,
   144	  updatedAt: string,
   145	  cardKey: string,
   146	  trustedUrls: string[],
   147	): AiCardProvenance {
   148	  return {
   149	    asOf: updatedAt,
   150	    generatedAt,
   151	    method: "verified-db-and-trusted-market-pull",
   152	    sourceFeeds: ["alt.news_events", "mkt.cftc_1w", ...trustedUrls],
   153	    sourceRecords: [
   154	      {
   155	        source: "alt.news_events",
   156	        table: "alt.news_events",
   157	        recordHint: "latest 7-day sentiment rows",
   158	        observedAt: updatedAt,
   159	      },
   160	      {
   161	        source: "mkt.cftc_1w",
   162	        table: "mkt.cftc_1w",
   163	        recordHint: "symbol=ZL latest observation",
   164	        observedAt: updatedAt,
   165	      },
   166	      {
   167	        source: "trusted-market-pull",
   168	        recordHint: `card=${cardKey}`,
   169	        observedAt: generatedAt,
   170	      },
   171	    ],
   172	    notes: [
   173	      "Narrative output is buyer-facing procurement interpretation from verified rows.",
   174	      "Hard stop language is required when market or flow evidence is missing.",
   175	    ],
   176	  };
   177	}
   178	
   179	export async function GET() {
   180	  try {
   181	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
   182	    const aiSnapshot = await readAiSnapshot<SentimentAiSnapshot>(
   183	      "app/config/sentiment-overview-ai.json",
   184	    );
   185	    const trustedMarket = await fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot();
   186	    const trustedUrls = uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(trustedMarket);
   187	
   188	    const sevenDaysAgo = new Date();
   189	    sevenDaysAgo.setDate(sevenDaysAgo.getDate() - 7);
   190	    const oneDayAgo = new Date();
   191	    oneDayAgo.setDate(oneDayAgo.getDate() - 1);
   192	
   193	    const [{ data: newsRows, error: newsError }, { data: cftcRow }] = await Promise.all([
   194	      supabase
   195	        .schema("alt")
   196	        .from("news_events")
   197	        .select("source, published_at, specialist_tags")
   198	        .gte("published_at", sevenDaysAgo.toISOString())
   199	        .order("published_at", { ascending: false })
   200	        .limit(300),
   201	      supabase
   202	        .schema("mkt")
   203	        .from("cftc_1w")
   204	        .select("observation_date, payload")
   205	        .eq("symbol", "ZL")
   206	        .order("observation_date", { ascending: false })
   207	        .limit(1)
   208	        .maybeSingle(),
   209	    ]);
   210	
   211	    if (newsError) {
   212	      return NextResponse.json(
   213	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: newsError.message },
   214	        { status: 500 },
   215	      );
   216	    }
   217	
   218	    const rows = newsRows ?? [];
   219	    const headlineCount = rows.length;
   220	    const last24h = rows.filter((row) => new Date(row.published_at).getTime() >= oneDayAgo.getTime()).length;
   221	    const pulseRatio = headlineCount > 0 ? last24h / Math.max(1, headlineCount / 7) : 0;
   222	    const flowState = pulseRatio >= 1.5 ? "elevated" : pulseRatio >= 1 ? "balanced" : "subdued";
   223	
   224	    const sourceSet = new Set<string>();
   225	    const tagCounts = new Map<string, number>();
   226	    for (const row of rows) {
   227	      if (row.source) sourceSet.add(row.source);
   228	      const tags = Array.isArray(row.specialist_tags) ? row.specialist_tags : [];
   229	      for (const tag of tags) {
   230	        const normalized = String(tag).trim();
   231	        if (!normalized) continue;
   232	        tagCounts.set(normalized, (tagCounts.get(normalized) ?? 0) + 1);
   233	      }
   234	    }
   235	    const topTags = Array.from(tagCounts.entries())
   236	      .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
   237	      .slice(0, 3)
   238	      .map(([tag]) => tag);
   239	    const tagPhrase = topTags.length > 0 ? topTags.join(", ") : "no dominant specialist cluster";
   240	
   241	    const cotPayload = cftcRow?.payload as Record<string, unknown> | null;
   242	    const cotBias = (cotPayload?.bias as string) ?? "neutral";
   243	    const cotBiasNorm = cotBias.trim().toLowerCase();
   244	    const cotBiasLabel =
   245	      cotBiasNorm.includes("bull") ? "bullish bias" : cotBiasNorm.includes("bear") ? "bearish bias" : "neutral bias";
   246	    const cotBiasScore = cotBiasNorm.includes("bull") ? 20 : cotBiasNorm.includes("bear") ? -20 : 0;
   247	
   248	    const vix = trustedMarket.vix.value;
   249	    const ovx = trustedMarket.ovx.value;
   250	    const cl5d = trustedMarket.cl.change5d;
   251	    const cl5dText =
   252	      cl5d === null ? "n/a" : `${cl5d * 100 >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${(cl5d * 100).toFixed(2)}%`;
   253	    const macroTrustedMissing = vix === null && ovx === null && cl5d === null;
   254	    const volatilityPenalty =
   255	      (vix !== null && vix >= 25 ? -14 : vix !== null && vix < 18 ? 6 : 0) +
   256	      (ovx !== null && ovx >= 35 ? -10 : ovx !== null && ovx < 26 ? 4 : 0) +
   257	      (cl5d !== null && Math.abs(cl5d) >= 0.04 ? -8 : cl5d !== null && Math.abs(cl5d) <= 0.015 ? 4 : 0);
   258	    const flowPenalty = pulseRatio >= 1.5 ? -12 : pulseRatio < 0.8 ? 5 : 0;
   259	    const sentimentScore = Math.max(-100, Math.min(100, cotBiasScore + volatilityPenalty + flowPenalty));
   260	
   261	    const dbOverview: SentimentOverview = {
   262	      headlineCount: headlineCount ?? 0,
   263	      sentimentScore,
   264	      cotBias,
   265	      updatedAt:
   266	        rows[0]?.published_at ??
   267	        (cftcRow?.observation_date ? `${cftcRow.observation_date}T00:00:00Z` : trustedMarket.fetchedAt),
   268	    };
   269	
   270	    const overview: SentimentOverview = {
   271	      headlineCount: aiSnapshot?.overview?.headlineCount ?? dbOverview.headlineCount,
   272	      sentimentScore: aiSnapshot?.overview?.sentimentScore ?? dbOverview.sentimentScore,
   273	      cotBias: aiSnapshot?.overview?.cotBias ?? dbOverview.cotBias,
   274	      updatedAt: aiSnapshot?.overview?.updatedAt ?? dbOverview.updatedAt,
   275	    };
   276	
   277	    const generatedAt = aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   278	    const fallbackCards: SentimentCards = {
   279	      narratives: [
   280	        {
   281	          title: "Macro Narrative",
   282	          body: macroTrustedMissing
   283	            ? "Hard stop: trusted Yahoo/FRED market context is unavailable; macro narrative classification is blocked."
   284	            : `Macro pressure is ${sentimentScore <= -25 ? "defensive" : sentimentScore >= 25 ? "supportive" : "mixed"} with ${cotBiasLabel}. VIX ${vix?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}, OVX ${ovx?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}, and CL 5-day ${cl5dText} frame near-term narrative risk.`,
   285	          strategicSpecialInstructions: SENTIMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.macroNarrative,
   286	          provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, overview.updatedAt, "macroNarrative", trustedUrls),
   287	        },
   288	        {
   289	          title: "Flow Narrative",
   290	          body: headlineCount === 0
   291	            ? "Hard stop: no verified alt.news_events rows in the last 7 days; flow narrative is blocked."
   292	            : `Flow regime is ${flowState} with ${sourceSet.size} active sources and dominant specialist cluster: ${tagPhrase}. Velocity coherence is ${pulseRatio >= 1.5 ? "high-risk noisy" : pulseRatio >= 1 ? "tradable but mixed" : "low-intensity"} for buyer timing decisions.`,
   293	          strategicSpecialInstructions: SENTIMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.flowNarrative,
   294	          provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, overview.updatedAt, "flowNarrative", trustedUrls),
   295	        },
   296	        {
   297	          title: "Procurement Narrative",
   298	          body: macroTrustedMissing || !cftcRow
   299	            ? "Hard stop: missing verified CoT or trusted market context prevents buyer-facing procurement narrative."
   300	            : `Buyer pacing should remain ${sentimentScore <= -25 ? "defensive with tighter reassessment windows" : sentimentScore >= 25 ? "opportunistic staged accumulation" : "balanced with optionality preserved"}. CoT is ${cotBiasLabel} and volatility transmission remains ${vix !== null && vix >= 25 ? "elevated" : "contained"} at current read.`,
   301	          strategicSpecialInstructions: SENTIMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.procurementNarrative,
   302	          provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, overview.updatedAt, "procurementNarrative", trustedUrls),
   303	        },
   304	      ],
   305	      positioningFlow: {
   306	        title: "Managed Money Positioning",
   307	        body: !cftcRow
   308	          ? "Hard stop: no verified mkt.cftc_1w observation for ZL is available."
   309	          : `Latest CoT posture is ${cotBiasLabel} (observation ${cftcRow.observation_date}). Use this as directional conviction context, not a standalone execution trigger.`,
   310	        strategicSpecialInstructions: SENTIMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.positioningFlow,
   311	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, overview.updatedAt, "positioningFlow", trustedUrls),
   312	      },
   313	      headlineFlow: {
   314	        title: "Headline Flow",
   315	        body: headlineCount === 0
   316	          ? "Hard stop: headline-flow narrative is blocked because no verified alt.news_events rows were found in the current 7-day window."
   317	          : `Headline velocity is ${flowState}. Source breadth is ${sourceSet.size} and the dominant specialist cluster is ${tagPhrase}. Treat this as signal only when persistence remains coherent with volatility and CoT bias.`,
   318	        strategicSpecialInstructions: SENTIMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.headlineFlow,
   319	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, overview.updatedAt, "headlineFlow", trustedUrls),
   320	      },

exec

    82	
    83	const AG_SOY_TAG_HINTS = new Set(["crush", "biofuel", "palm", "tariff", "china", "energy"]);
    84	
    85	function includesAnyTerm(text: string, terms: readonly string[]): boolean {
    86	  return terms.some((term) => {
    87	    const normalized = term.trim().toLowerCase();
    88	    if (!normalized) return false;
    89	    const escaped = normalized
    90	      .replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&")
    91	      .replace(/\s+/g, "\\s+");
    92	    const pattern = new RegExp(`(^|[^a-z0-9])${escaped}([^a-z0-9]|$)`, "i");
    93	    return pattern.test(text);
    94	  });
    95	}
    96	
    97	function normalizeTags(raw: unknown): string[] {
    98	  if (!Array.isArray(raw)) return [];
    99	  return raw
   100	    .map((tag) => String(tag).trim())
   101	    .filter((tag) => tag.length > 0);
   102	}
   103	
   104	function isAgSoyPolicyRelevant(params: {
   105	  title: string;
   106	  summary?: string | null;
   107	  tags?: string[];
   108	}): boolean {
   109	  const textBlob = `${params.title} ${params.summary ?? ""}`.toLowerCase();
   110	  const primaryMatch = includesAnyTerm(textBlob, AG_SOY_PRIMARY_TERMS);
   111	  const contextMatch = includesAnyTerm(textBlob, AG_SOY_CONTEXT_TERMS);
   112	  const policyMatch = includesAnyTerm(textBlob, AG_SOY_POLICY_TERMS);
   113	  const tagSet = new Set((params.tags ?? []).map((tag) => tag.toLowerCase()));
   114	  const tagHint = Array.from(tagSet).some((tag) => AG_SOY_TAG_HINTS.has(tag));
   115	
   116	  if (primaryMatch) return true;
   117	  if (contextMatch && (policyMatch || tagHint)) return true;
   118	  if (tagHint && includesAnyTerm(textBlob, ["usda", "epa", "farm", "agricult", "renewable", "biofuel"])) {
   119	    return true;
   120	  }
   121	  return false;
   122	}
   123	
   124	function dedupeLegislationItems(items: LegislationItem[]): LegislationItem[] {
   125	  const seen = new Set<string>();
   126	  const deduped: LegislationItem[] = [];
   127	  for (const item of items) {
   128	    const key = `${item.source}::${item.title}`;
   129	    if (seen.has(key)) continue;
   130	    seen.add(key);
   131	    deduped.push(item);
   132	  }
   133	  return deduped;
   134	}

   252	export async function GET() {
   253	  try {
   254	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
   255	    const aiSnapshot = await readAiSnapshot<LegislationAiSnapshot>(
   256	      "app/config/legislation-feed-ai.json",
   257	    );
   258	    const trustedMarket = await fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot();
   259	    const trustedUrls = uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(trustedMarket);
   260	
   261	    const [legRes, execRes, billsRes] = await Promise.all([
   262	      supabase
   263	        .schema("alt")
   264	        .from("legislation_1d")
   265	        .select("title, summary, source, published_at, payload")
   266	        .order("published_at", { ascending: false })
   267	        .limit(20),
   268	      supabase
   269	        .schema("alt")
   270	        .from("executive_actions")
   271	        .select("title, summary, source, published_at, payload")
   272	        .order("published_at", { ascending: false })
   273	        .limit(10),
   274	      supabase
   275	        .schema("alt")
   276	        .from("congress_bills")
   277	        .select("title, summary, source, published_at, payload")
   278	        .order("published_at", { ascending: false })
   279	        .limit(10),
   280	    ]);
   281	
   282	    const allRows = [...(legRes.data ?? []), ...(execRes.data ?? []), ...(billsRes.data ?? [])];
   283	    allRows.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.published_at).getTime() - new Date(a.published_at).getTime());
   284	
   285	    const filteredRows = allRows.filter((row) => {
   286	      const payload = (row.payload as Record<string, unknown> | null) ?? null;
   287	      const tags = normalizeTags(payload?.tags);
   288	      return isAgSoyPolicyRelevant({
   289	        title: String(row.title ?? ""),
   290	        summary: row.summary as string | null | undefined,
   291	        tags,
   292	      });
   293	    });
   294	
   295	    const dbItems = dedupeLegislationItems(filteredRows.slice(0, 30).map((row) => {
   296	      const payload = (row.payload as Record<string, unknown> | null) ?? null;
   297	      return {
   298	        source: row.source,
   299	        title: row.title,
   300	        publishedAt: row.published_at,
   301	        tags: normalizeTags(payload?.tags),
   302	      };
   303	    }));
   304	
   305	    const snapshotItems = dedupeLegislationItems((aiSnapshot?.items ?? []).filter((item) =>
   306	      isAgSoyPolicyRelevant({

   119	
   120	function buildProvenance(
   121	  generatedAt: string,
   122	  asOf: string,
   123	  cardKey: keyof VegasIntelCards,
   124	  trustedUrls: string[],
   125	): AiCardProvenance {
   126	  return {
   127	    asOf,
   128	    generatedAt,
   129	    method: "verified-db-and-trusted-market-pull",
   130	    sourceFeeds: [
   131	      "vegas.events",
   132	      "vegas.restaurants",
   133	      "vegas.customer_scores",
   134	      "vegas.fryers",
   135	      "vegas.event_impact",
   136	      ...trustedUrls,
   137	    ],
   138	    sourceRecords: [
   139	      {
   140	        source: "vegas.events",
   141	        table: "vegas.events",
   142	        recordHint: "future event_date rows",
   143	        observedAt: asOf,
   144	      },
   145	      {
   146	        source: "vegas.restaurants",
   147	        table: "vegas.restaurants",
   148	        recordHint: "active account rows",
   149	        observedAt: asOf,
   150	      },
   151	      {
   152	        source: "trusted-market-pull",
   153	        recordHint: `card=${cardKey}`,
   154	        observedAt: generatedAt,
   155	      },
   156	    ],
   157	  };
   158	}

   160	export async function GET() {
   161	  try {
   162	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
   163	    const aiSnapshot = await readAiSnapshot<VegasIntelAiSnapshot>(
   164	      "app/config/vegas-intel-ai.json",
   165	    );
   166	    const trustedMarket = await fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot();
   167	    const trustedUrls = uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(trustedMarket);
   168	
   169	    const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
   170	    const in14 = new Date();
   171	    in14.setDate(in14.getDate() + 14);
   172	    const in30 = new Date();
   173	    in30.setDate(in30.getDate() + 30);
   174	
   175	    const [
   176	      { data: eventRows, error: evtError },
   177	      { data: restaurantRows, error: restError },
   178	      { data: fryerRows },
   179	      { data: scoreRows },
   180	      { data: impactRows },
   181	    ] = await Promise.all([
   182	      supabase
   183	        .schema("vegas")
   184	        .from("events")
   185	        .select("id, event_name, event_date")
   186	        .gte("event_date", today)
   187	        .order("event_date", { ascending: true })
   188	        .limit(200),
   189	      supabase
   190	        .schema("vegas")
   191	        .from("restaurants")
   192	        .select("id, restaurant_name, account_status")
   193	        .eq("account_status", "active")
   194	        .limit(500),
   195	      supabase
   196	        .schema("vegas")
   197	        .from("fryers")
   198	        .select("restaurant_id, fryer_count")
   199	        .limit(500),
   200	      supabase
   201	        .schema("vegas")
   202	        .from("customer_scores")
   203	        .select("restaurant_id, score_date, score")
   204	        .order("score_date", { ascending: false })
   205	        .limit(500),
   206	      supabase
   207	        .schema("vegas")
   208	        .from("event_impact")
   209	        .select("event_id, restaurant_id, impact_score")
   210	        .order("impact_score", { ascending: false })
   211	        .limit(500),
   212	    ]);
   213	
   214	    if (evtError) {
   215	      return NextResponse.json(
   216	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: evtError.message },
   217	        { status: 500 },
   218	      );
   219	    }
   220	
   221	    if (restError) {
   222	      return NextResponse.json(
   223	        { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: restError.message },
   224	        { status: 500 },
   225	      );
   226	    }
   227	
   228	    const events = eventRows ?? [];
   229	    const activeRestaurants = restaurantRows ?? [];
   230	    const fryers = fryerRows ?? [];
   231	    const customerScores = scoreRows ?? [];
   232	    const eventImpacts = impactRows ?? [];
   233	
   234	    const activeEvents = events.length;
   235	    const highPriority = activeRestaurants.length;
   236	    const events14d = events.filter((e) => new Date(e.event_date).getTime() <= in14.getTime()).length;
   237	    const events30d = events.filter((e) => new Date(e.event_date).getTime() <= in30.getTime()).length;
   238	    const nextEvent = events[0] ?? null;
   239	
   240	    const knownFryerCounts = fryers
   241	      .map((row) => Number(row.fryer_count))
   242	      .filter((count) => Number.isFinite(count) && count >= 0);
   243	    const totalFryers = knownFryerCounts.reduce((acc, count) => acc + count, 0);
   244	    const lowRedundancySites = knownFryerCounts.filter((count) => count <= 1).length;
   245	    const unknownFryerSites = Math.max(0, fryers.length - knownFryerCounts.length);
   246	
   247	    const latestScoreDate = customerScores[0]?.score_date ?? null;
   248	    const latestScores = customerScores.filter((row) => row.score_date === latestScoreDate);
   249	    const scoredAccounts = latestScores
   250	      .map((row) => Number(row.score))
   251	      .filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
   252	    const avgScore =
   253	      scoredAccounts.length > 0
   254	        ? scoredAccounts.reduce((acc, value) => acc + value, 0) / scoredAccounts.length
   255	        : null;
   256	
   257	    const impactValues = eventImpacts
   258	      .map((row) => Number(row.impact_score))
   259	      .filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
   260	    const avgImpact =
   261	      impactValues.length > 0
   262	        ? impactValues.reduce((acc, value) => acc + value, 0) / impactValues.length
   263	        : null;
   264	
   265	    const dbSnapshot: VegasIntelSnapshot = {
   266	      activeEvents,
   267	      highPriorityAccounts: highPriority,
   268	      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
   269	    };
   270	    const snapshot: VegasIntelSnapshot = {
   271	      activeEvents: aiSnapshot?.snapshot?.activeEvents ?? dbSnapshot.activeEvents,
   272	      highPriorityAccounts:
   273	        aiSnapshot?.snapshot?.highPriorityAccounts ?? dbSnapshot.highPriorityAccounts,
   274	      updatedAt: aiSnapshot?.snapshot?.updatedAt ?? dbSnapshot.updatedAt,
   275	    };
   276	
   277	    const generatedAt = aiSnapshot?.generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString();
   278	    const asOf = snapshot.updatedAt;
   279	    const cl = trustedMarket.cl.value;
   280	    const cl5d = trustedMarket.cl.change5d;
   281	    const vix = trustedMarket.vix.value;
   282	    const cl5dText =
   283	      cl5d === null ? "n/a" : `${cl5d * 100 >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${(cl5d * 100).toFixed(2)}%`;
   284	    const fallbackCards: VegasIntelCards = {
   285	      upcomingEvents: {
   286	        title: "Upcoming Events",
   287	        body: nextEvent
   288	          ? `${events14d} events are scheduled over the next 14 days (${events30d} over 30 days). Next demand catalyst is ${nextEvent.event_name} on ${nextEvent.event_date}.`
   289	          : "Hard stop: no verified vegas.events rows are available for upcoming demand-window analysis.",
   290	        strategicSpecialInstructions: VEGAS_INSTRUCTIONS.upcomingEvents,
   291	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "upcomingEvents", trustedUrls),
   292	      },
   293	      aiSalesStrategy: {
   294	        title: "AI Sales Strategy",
   295	        body: activeRestaurants.length === 0 || events.length === 0
   296	          ? "Hard stop: account-targeted strategy is blocked because verified event or active-account rows are missing."
   297	          : `Prioritize high-volume active accounts ahead of the ${events14d > 0 ? "next two-week event cluster" : "next demand window"}. Average modeled event impact is ${avgImpact?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}. Current oil-cost backdrop is CL ${cl?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"} with 5-day ${cl5dText} and VIX ${vix?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}, so cost-certainty messaging should be staged and urgency-tiered.`,
   298	        strategicSpecialInstructions: VEGAS_INSTRUCTIONS.aiSalesStrategy,
   299	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "aiSalesStrategy", trustedUrls),
   300	      },
   301	      restaurantAccounts: {
   302	        title: "Restaurant Accounts",
   303	        body: latestScores.length === 0
   304	          ? "Hard stop: no verified vegas.customer_scores rows are available for account-priority ranking."
   305	          : `Latest scoring window (${latestScoreDate}) covers ${latestScores.length} accounts with average opportunity score ${avgScore?.toFixed(2) ?? "n/a"}. Sequence outreach from highest opportunity tier first, then roll down by event-window overlap.`,
   306	        strategicSpecialInstructions: VEGAS_INSTRUCTIONS.restaurantAccounts,
   307	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "restaurantAccounts", trustedUrls),
   308	      },
   309	      fryerTracking: {
   310	        title: "Fryer Equipment Tracking",
   311	        body: fryers.length === 0
   312	          ? "Hard stop: fryer lifecycle guidance is blocked because no verified vegas.fryers rows are available."
   313	          : knownFryerCounts.length === 0
   314	            ? `Verified fryer rows exist for ${fryers.length} tracked sites, but fryer-count telemetry is not yet populated. Service prioritization should use event impact and account urgency until count telemetry is promoted.`
   315	            : `Verified fryer inventory totals ${totalFryers} units across ${fryers.length} tracked sites; ${lowRedundancySites} sites run low redundancy (one fryer or fewer) and ${unknownFryerSites} sites still require fryer-count telemetry. Service prioritization should front-load low-redundancy sites before high-impact event windows.`,
   316	        strategicSpecialInstructions: VEGAS_INSTRUCTIONS.fryerTracking,
   317	        provenance: buildProvenance(generatedAt, asOf, "fryerTracking", trustedUrls),
   318	      },
   319	    };
   320	
   321	    const rawCards = aiSnapshot?.cards ?? fallbackCards;
   322	    const cards: VegasIntelCards = {
   323	      upcomingEvents: {
   324	        ...fallbackCards.upcomingEvents,
   325	        ...rawCards.upcomingEvents,
   326	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   327	          rawCards.upcomingEvents?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   328	          fallbackCards.upcomingEvents.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   329	        provenance: rawCards.upcomingEvents?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.upcomingEvents.provenance,
   330	      },
   331	      aiSalesStrategy: {
   332	        ...fallbackCards.aiSalesStrategy,
   333	        ...rawCards.aiSalesStrategy,
   334	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   335	          rawCards.aiSalesStrategy?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   336	          fallbackCards.aiSalesStrategy.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   337	        provenance: rawCards.aiSalesStrategy?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.aiSalesStrategy.provenance,
   338	      },
   339	      restaurantAccounts: {
   340	        ...fallbackCards.restaurantAccounts,
   341	        ...rawCards.restaurantAccounts,
   342	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   343	          rawCards.restaurantAccounts?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   344	          fallbackCards.restaurantAccounts.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   345	        provenance:
   346	          rawCards.restaurantAccounts?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.restaurantAccounts.provenance,
   347	      },
   348	      fryerTracking: {
   349	        ...fallbackCards.fryerTracking,
   350	        ...rawCards.fryerTracking,
   351	        strategicSpecialInstructions:
   352	          rawCards.fryerTracking?.strategicSpecialInstructions ??
   353	          fallbackCards.fryerTracking.strategicSpecialInstructions,
   354	        provenance: rawCards.fryerTracking?.provenance ?? fallbackCards.fryerTracking.provenance,
   355	      },
   356	    };
   357	
   358	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<VegasIntelSnapshot | null> = {
   359	      ok: true,
   360	      data: snapshot,
   361	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
   362	      source: ["vegas.events", "vegas.restaurants", "vegas.customer_scores", "vegas.fryers", "vegas.event_impact", ...TRUSTED_MARKET_SOURCE_FEEDS].join(","),
   363	    };
   364	
   365	    return NextResponse.json({
   366	      ...envelope,
   367	      cards,
   368	      ai: toAiEnvelopeMeta(aiSnapshot),
   369	    });
   370	  } catch (err) {
   371	    return NextResponse.json(
   372	      { ok: false, data: null, asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
   373	      { status: 500 },
   374	    );
   375	  }
   376	}

     1	type YahooChartResult = {
     2	  meta?: {
     3	    regularMarketPrice?: number;
     4	    regularMarketTime?: number;
     5	    previousClose?: number;
     6	  };
     7	  timestamp?: number[];
     8	  indicators?: {
     9	    quote?: Array<{
    10	      close?: Array<number | null>;
    11	    }>;
    12	  };
    13	};
    14	
    15	type YahooChartResponse = {
    16	  chart?: {
    17	    result?: YahooChartResult[];
    18	  };
    19	};
    20	
    21	type TrustedSeriesPoint = {
    22	  value: number | null;
    23	  asOf: string | null;
    24	  source: string;
    25	  url: string;
    26	};
    27	
    28	export type TrustedMarketSnapshot = {
    29	  fetchedAt: string;
    30	  zl: TrustedSeriesPoint & { change5d: number | null };
    31	  cl: TrustedSeriesPoint & { change5d: number | null };
    32	  cny: TrustedSeriesPoint & { change5d: number | null };
    33	  vix: TrustedSeriesPoint;

    37	export const TRUSTED_MARKET_SOURCE_FEEDS = [
    38	  "https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/ZL=F?interval=1d&range=1mo",
    39	  "https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/CL=F?interval=1d&range=1mo",
    40	  "https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/CNY=X?interval=1d&range=1mo",
    41	  "https://fred.stlouisfed.org/graph/fredgraph.csv?id=VIXCLS",
    42	  "https://fred.stlouisfed.org/graph/fredgraph.csv?id=OVXCLS",
    43	] as const;
    44	
    45	function toDateIso(ts: number | null | undefined): string | null {
    46	  if (typeof ts !== "number" || !Number.isFinite(ts)) return null;
    47	  return new Date(ts * 1000).toISOString();
    48	}
    49	
    50	async function fetchJson<T>(url: string): Promise<T | null> {
    51	  try {
    52	    const res = await fetch(url, {
    53	      headers: {
    54	        "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Codex Trusted Source Pull)",
    55	      },
    56	      cache: "no-store",
    57	    });
    58	    if (!res.ok) return null;
    59	    return (await res.json()) as T;
    60	  } catch {
    61	    return null;
    62	  }
    63	}
    64	
    65	async function fetchYahooSeries(symbol: string): Promise<TrustedSeriesPoint & { change5d: number | null }> {
    66	  const url = `https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/${encodeURIComponent(
    67	    symbol,
    68	  )}?interval=1d&range=1mo`;
    69	  const payload = await fetchJson<YahooChartResponse>(url);
    70	  const result = payload?.chart?.result?.[0];
    71	  const timestamps = result?.timestamp ?? [];
    72	  const closes = result?.indicators?.quote?.[0]?.close ?? [];
    73	
    74	  let latestClose: number | null = null;
    75	  let latestTs: number | null = null;
    76	  for (let i = closes.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) {
    77	    const close = closes[i];
    78	    if (typeof close === "number" && Number.isFinite(close)) {
    79	      latestClose = close;
    80	      latestTs = timestamps[i] ?? null;
    81	      break;
    82	    }
    83	  }
    84	
    85	  let anchorClose: number | null = null;
    86	  let validSeen = 0;
    87	  for (let i = closes.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) {
    88	    const close = closes[i];
    89	    if (typeof close !== "number" || !Number.isFinite(close)) continue;
    90	    validSeen += 1;
    91	    if (validSeen >= 6) {
    92	      anchorClose = close;
    93	      break;
    94	    }
    95	  }
    96	
    97	  const change5d =
    98	    latestClose !== null && anchorClose !== null && anchorClose !== 0
    99	      ? (latestClose - anchorClose) / anchorClose
   100	      : null;
   101	
   102	  return {
   103	    value: latestClose,
   104	    asOf: toDateIso(latestTs ?? result?.meta?.regularMarketTime ?? null),
   105	    source: "Yahoo Finance",
   106	    url,
   107	    change5d,
   108	  };
   109	}
   110	
   111	async function fetchFredLatest(seriesId: string): Promise<TrustedSeriesPoint> {
   112	  const url = `https://fred.stlouisfed.org/graph/fredgraph.csv?id=${encodeURIComponent(seriesId)}`;
   113	  try {
   114	    const res = await fetch(url, { cache: "no-store" });
   115	    if (!res.ok) {
   116	      return { value: null, asOf: null, source: "FRED", url };
   117	    }
   118	    const csv = await res.text();
   119	    const lines = csv.trim().split("\n");
   120	    for (let i = lines.length - 1; i >= 1; i -= 1) {
   121	      const row = lines[i];
   122	      const [date, value] = row.split(",", 2);
   123	      if (!date || !value || value === ".") continue;
   124	      const n = Number(value);
   125	      if (!Number.isFinite(n)) continue;
   126	      return {
   127	        value: n,
   128	        asOf: new Date(`${date}T00:00:00Z`).toISOString(),
   129	        source: "FRED",
   130	        url,
   131	      };
   132	    }
   133	  } catch {
   134	    return { value: null, asOf: null, source: "FRED", url };
   135	  }
   136	  return { value: null, asOf: null, source: "FRED", url };
   137	}
   138	
   139	export async function fetchTrustedMarketSnapshot(): Promise<TrustedMarketSnapshot> {
   140	  const [zl, cl, cny, vix, ovx] = await Promise.all([
   141	    fetchYahooSeries("ZL=F"),
   142	    fetchYahooSeries("CL=F"),
   143	    fetchYahooSeries("CNY=X"),
   144	    fetchFredLatest("VIXCLS"),
   145	    fetchFredLatest("OVXCLS"),
   146	  ]);
   147	
   148	  return {
   149	    fetchedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
   150	    zl,
   151	    cl,
   152	    cny,
   153	    vix,
   154	    ovx,
   155	  };
   156	}
   157	
   158	export function uniqueTrustedMarketUrls(snapshot: TrustedMarketSnapshot): string[] {
   159	  return [snapshot.zl.url, snapshot.cl.url, snapshot.cny.url, snapshot.vix.url, snapshot.ovx.url]
   160	    .filter((u, idx, arr) => typeof u === "string" && arr.indexOf(u) === idx);
   161	}

     1	import type { SupabaseClient } from "@supabase/supabase-js";
     2	
     3	export type IngestRunStatus = "RUNNING" | "SUCCESS" | "FAILED";
     4	
     5	export async function logIngestRunStart(
     6	  client: SupabaseClient,
     7	  jobName: string,
     8	  source: string,
     9	): Promise<string> {
    10	  const runId = crypto.randomUUID();
    11	
    12	  try {
    13	    await client.schema("ops").from("ingest_run").insert({
    14	      run_id: runId,
    15	      job_name: jobName,
    16	      source,
    17	      status: "RUNNING",
    18	      started_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    19	      records_upserted: 0,
    20	    });
    21	  } catch (error) {
    22	    console.error("Failed to write ops.ingest_run start record", error);
    23	  }
    24	
    25	  return runId;
    26	}
    27	
    28	export async function logIngestRunFinish(
    29	  client: SupabaseClient,
    30	  runId: string,
    31	  recordsUpserted: number,
    32	): Promise<void> {
    33	  try {
    34	    await client
    35	      .schema("ops")
    36	      .from("ingest_run")
    37	      .update({
    38	        status: "SUCCESS",
    39	        finished_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    40	        records_upserted: recordsUpserted,
    41	      })
    42	      .eq("run_id", runId);
    43	  } catch (error) {
    44	    console.error("Failed to write ops.ingest_run success record", error);
    45	  }
    46	}
    47	
    48	export async function logIngestRunFailure(
    49	  client: SupabaseClient,
    50	  runId: string,
    51	  errorMessage: string,
    52	): Promise<void> {
    53	  try {
    54	    await client
    55	      .schema("ops")
    56	      .from("ingest_run")
    57	      .update({
    58	        status: "FAILED",
    59	        finished_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    60	        error_message: errorMessage.slice(0, 2000),
    61	      })
    62	      .eq("run_id", runId);
    63	  } catch (error) {
    64	    console.error("Failed to write ops.ingest_run failure record", error);
    65	  }
    66	}
