/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba components/chart/ZlCandlestickChart.tsx | sed -n '1,420p'" in /Users/zincdigital/mnt/SatechiHub/ZINC-FUSION-V16
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	"use client";
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
     4	import Image from "next/image";
     5	import {
     6	  createChart,
     7	  CandlestickSeries,
     8	  LineSeries,
     9	  ColorType,
    10	  LineStyle,
    11	  type IChartApi,
    12	  type ISeriesApi,
    13	  type CandlestickData,
    14	  type Time,
    15	} from "lightweight-charts";
    16	import type { ZlPriceBar, TargetZone } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
    17	import { calculateFibonacciMultiPeriod, type CandleData, type FibResult } from "@/lib/chart/autofib";
    18	import { PivotLinesPrimitive } from "@/lib/chart/PivotLinesPrimitive";
    19	import { ForecastTargetsPrimitive } from "@/lib/chart/ForecastTargetsPrimitive";
    20	
    21	const CANDLE_THEME = {
    22	  upColor: "#26C6DA",
    23	  downColor: "#FF0000",
    24	  borderUpColor: "transparent",
    25	  borderDownColor: "transparent",
    26	  wickUpColor: "#FFFFFF",
    27	  wickDownColor: "rgba(178,181,190,0.83)",
    28	};
    29	
    30	const GRID_COLOR = "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)";
    31	const CROSSHAIR_COLOR = "rgba(255,255,255,0.55)";
    32	const LABEL_BG = "rgba(20,10,40,0.9)";
    33	const TEXT_COLOR = "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)";
    34	
    35	const INITIAL_VISIBLE_BARS = 120;
    36	const RIGHT_PADDING_BARS = 16;
    37	const BAR_SPACING = 10;
    38	const MIN_BAR_SPACING = 8;
    39	const REFRESH_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000;
    40	const SHOW_FORECAST_TARGET_OVERLAY = false;
    41	const SMA_PERIOD = 200;
    42	const SMA_COLOR = "#FFFFFF";
    43	const SMA_WIDTH = 2;
    44	
    45	function toChartDay(dateStr: string): Time {
    46	  return dateStr.slice(0, 10) as unknown as Time;
    47	}
    48	
    49	function computeVolatility(bars: ZlPriceBar[]): string {
    50	  const recent = bars.slice(-20);
    51	  if (recent.length < 2) return "--";
    52	  const returns: number[] = [];
    53	  for (let i = 1; i < recent.length; i++) {
    54	    returns.push(Math.log(recent[i].close / recent[i - 1].close));
    55	  }
    56	  const mean = returns.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / returns.length;
    57	  const variance =
    58	    returns.reduce((a, b) => a + (b - mean) ** 2, 0) / returns.length;
    59	  return (Math.sqrt(variance) * Math.sqrt(252) * 100).toFixed(1) + "%";
    60	}
    61	
    62	function computeSmaData(candles: CandlestickData<Time>[], period: number): { time: Time; value: number }[] {
    63	  if (candles.length < period) return [];
    64	
    65	  const result: { time: Time; value: number }[] = [];
    66	  let rollingSum = 0;
    67	
    68	  for (let i = 0; i < candles.length; i += 1) {
    69	    rollingSum += candles[i].close;
    70	    if (i >= period) {
    71	      rollingSum -= candles[i - period].close;
    72	    }
    73	    if (i >= period - 1) {
    74	      result.push({
    75	        time: candles[i].time,
    76	        value: rollingSum / period,
    77	      });
    78	    }
    79	  }
    80	
    81	  return result;
    82	}
    83	
    84	export function ZlCandlestickChart({
    85	  height = "70vh",
    86	  targetZones = [],
    87	}: {
    88	  height?: string | number;
    89	  targetZones?: TargetZone[];
    90	}) {
    91	  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    92	  const chartRef = useRef<IChartApi | null>(null);
    93	  const seriesRef = useRef<ISeriesApi<"Candlestick"> | null>(null);
    94	  const fitCalledRef = useRef(false);
    95	  const fibLockedRef = useRef<FibResult | null>(null);
    96	
    97	  const [bars, setBars] = useState<ZlPriceBar[]>([]);
    98	  const [lastPrice, setLastPrice] = useState<number | null>(null);
    99	  const [priceChange, setPriceChange] = useState(0);
   100	  const [highPrice, setHighPrice] = useState<number | null>(null);
   101	  const [lowPrice, setLowPrice] = useState<number | null>(null);
   102	  const [volatility, setVolatility] = useState("--");
   103	
   104	  // Fetch daily bars
   105	  useEffect(() => {
   106	    async function fetchBars() {
   107	      try {
   108	        const res = await fetch("/api/zl/price-1d", { cache: "no-store" });
   109	        if (!res.ok) return;
   110	        const json = await res.json();
   111	        if (!json.data || json.data.length === 0) return;
   112	
   113	        const parsed: ZlPriceBar[] = json.data.map(
   114	          (d: Record<string, unknown>) => ({
   115	            symbol: String(d.symbol),
   116	            tradeDate: String(d.tradeDate),
   117	            open: Number(d.open),
   118	            high: Number(d.high),
   119	            low: Number(d.low),
   120	            close: Number(d.close),
   121	            volume: Number(d.volume),
   122	          }),
   123	        );
   124	
   125	        setBars(parsed);
   126	
   127	        const latest = parsed[parsed.length - 1];
   128	        const prev = parsed[parsed.length - 2];
   129	        setLastPrice(latest.close);
   130	        setHighPrice(latest.high);
   131	        setLowPrice(latest.low);
   132	        setVolatility(computeVolatility(parsed));
   133	
   134	        if (prev) {
   135	          setPriceChange(((latest.close - prev.close) / prev.close) * 100);
   136	        }
   137	      } catch {
   138	        /* fail silently — chart stays empty */
   139	      }
   140	    }
   141	
   142	    fetchBars();
   143	    const id = setInterval(fetchBars, REFRESH_MS);
   144	    return () => clearInterval(id);
   145	  }, []);
   146	
   147	  // Create and manage chart
   148	  useEffect(() => {
   149	    if (!containerRef.current || bars.length === 0) return;
   150	
   151	    // Clean up previous
   152	    if (chartRef.current) {
   153	      try {
   154	        chartRef.current.remove();
   155	      } catch {
   156	        /* already disposed */
   157	      }
   158	      chartRef.current = null;
   159	      seriesRef.current = null;
   160	      fitCalledRef.current = false;
   161	    }
   162	
   163	    const chart = createChart(containerRef.current, {
   164	      layout: {
   165	        background: { type: ColorType.Solid, color: "transparent" },
   166	        textColor: TEXT_COLOR,
   167	        fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif",
   168	        fontSize: 11,
   169	        attributionLogo: false,
   170	      },
   171	      grid: {
   172	        vertLines: { color: GRID_COLOR },
   173	        horzLines: { color: GRID_COLOR },
   174	      },
   175	      crosshair: {
   176	        vertLine: {
   177	          color: CROSSHAIR_COLOR,
   178	          width: 1,
   179	          style: LineStyle.Solid,
   180	          labelBackgroundColor: LABEL_BG,
   181	        },
   182	        horzLine: {
   183	          color: CROSSHAIR_COLOR,
   184	          width: 1,
   185	          style: LineStyle.Solid,
   186	          labelBackgroundColor: LABEL_BG,
   187	        },
   188	      },
   189	      rightPriceScale: {
   190	        borderColor: "transparent",
   191	        autoScale: true,
   192	        scaleMargins: { top: 0.05, bottom: 0.05 },
   193	      },
   194	      timeScale: {
   195	        borderColor: "transparent",
   196	        timeVisible: false,
   197	        fixLeftEdge: false,
   198	        fixRightEdge: false,
   199	        rightOffset: RIGHT_PADDING_BARS,
   200	        barSpacing: BAR_SPACING,
   201	        minBarSpacing: MIN_BAR_SPACING,
   202	        lockVisibleTimeRangeOnResize: true,
   203	      },
   204	      handleScroll: {
   205	        mouseWheel: false,
   206	        pressedMouseMove: true,
   207	        horzTouchDrag: true,
   208	        vertTouchDrag: false,
   209	      },
   210	      handleScale: {
   211	        mouseWheel: false,
   212	        pinch: true,
   213	        axisPressedMouseMove: { time: true, price: true },
   214	        axisDoubleClickReset: { time: true, price: true },
   215	      },
   216	    });
   217	
   218	    chartRef.current = chart;
   219	
   220	    // Build candlestick data sorted chronologically
   221	    const candleData: CandlestickData<Time>[] = bars
   222	      .map((b) => ({
   223	        time: toChartDay(b.tradeDate),
   224	        open: b.open,
   225	        high: b.high,
   226	        low: b.low,
   227	        close: b.close,
   228	      }))
   229	      .sort((a, b) => String(a.time).localeCompare(String(b.time)));
   230	
   231	    const series = chart.addSeries(CandlestickSeries, {
   232	      upColor: CANDLE_THEME.upColor,
   233	      downColor: CANDLE_THEME.downColor,
   234	      borderUpColor: CANDLE_THEME.borderUpColor,
   235	      borderDownColor: CANDLE_THEME.borderDownColor,
   236	      wickUpColor: CANDLE_THEME.wickUpColor,
   237	      wickDownColor: CANDLE_THEME.wickDownColor,
   238	      priceLineVisible: true,
   239	    });
   240	
   241	    series.setData(candleData);
   242	    seriesRef.current = series;
   243	
   244	    const smaData = computeSmaData(candleData, SMA_PERIOD);
   245	    if (smaData.length > 0) {
   246	      const smaSeries = chart.addSeries(LineSeries, {
   247	        color: SMA_COLOR,
   248	        lineWidth: SMA_WIDTH,
   249	        lineStyle: LineStyle.Solid,
   250	        priceLineVisible: false,
   251	        lastValueVisible: false,
   252	        crosshairMarkerVisible: false,
   253	      });
   254	      smaSeries.setData(smaData);
   255	    }
   256	
   257	    const pivotPrimitive = new PivotLinesPrimitive();
   258	    const forecastTargetsPrimitive = new ForecastTargetsPrimitive();
   259	    series.attachPrimitive(pivotPrimitive);
   260	    if (SHOW_FORECAST_TARGET_OVERLAY) {
   261	      series.attachPrimitive(forecastTargetsPrimitive);
   262	    }
   263	
   264	    // Forecast target zones should be projected near the most recent bars, not full-width.
   265	    if (SHOW_FORECAST_TARGET_OVERLAY) {
   266	      const targetStartIndex = Math.max(0, candleData.length - 16);
   267	      const targetStartTime = candleData[targetStartIndex]?.time;
   268	      forecastTargetsPrimitive.setTargetZones(targetZones, targetStartTime);
   269	    }
   270	
   271	    // Fib rendering: anchored start, pivot zone fill, and structural-break lock.
   272	    const fibCandles: CandleData[] = bars.map((b, idx) => ({
   273	      time: idx,
   274	      open: b.open,
   275	      high: b.high,
   276	      low: b.low,
   277	      close: b.close,
   278	      volume: b.volume,
   279	    }));
   280	
   281	    const currentPrice = bars[bars.length - 1]?.close;
   282	    let fibResult = fibLockedRef.current;
   283	    if (
   284	      !fibResult ||
   285	      currentPrice == null ||
   286	      currentPrice > fibResult.anchorHigh ||
   287	      currentPrice < fibResult.anchorLow
   288	    ) {
   289	      fibResult = calculateFibonacciMultiPeriod(fibCandles);
   290	      fibLockedRef.current = fibResult;
   291	    }
   292	
   293	    if (fibResult) {
   294	      const anchorIdx = Math.min(
   295	        fibResult.anchorHighBarIndex,
   296	        fibResult.anchorLowBarIndex,
   297	      );
   298	      const anchorStartTime = candleData[anchorIdx]?.time;
   299	      pivotPrimitive.setFibResult(fibResult, anchorStartTime);
   300	    } else {
   301	      pivotPrimitive.setFibResult(null);
   302	    }
   303	
   304	    // Set initial visible range: last N bars + right padding
   305	    if (!fitCalledRef.current && candleData.length > 0) {
   306	      const total = candleData.length;
   307	      const visible = Math.min(INITIAL_VISIBLE_BARS, total);
   308	      chart.timeScale().setVisibleLogicalRange({
   309	        from: Math.max(0, total - visible),
   310	        to: total - 1 + RIGHT_PADDING_BARS,
   311	      });
   312	      fitCalledRef.current = true;
   313	    }
   314	
   315	    // Responsive resize
   316	    let disposed = false;
   317	    const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
   318	      if (disposed || !entries[0]) return;
   319	      const { width, height: h } = entries[0].contentRect;
   320	      try {
   321	        chart.applyOptions({ width, height: h });
   322	      } catch {
   323	        /* disposed */
   324	      }
   325	    });
   326	    observer.observe(containerRef.current);
   327	
   328	    return () => {
   329	      disposed = true;
   330	      observer.disconnect();
   331	      try {
   332	        if (SHOW_FORECAST_TARGET_OVERLAY) {
   333	          series.detachPrimitive(forecastTargetsPrimitive);
   334	        }
   335	        series.detachPrimitive(pivotPrimitive);
   336	        chart.remove();
   337	      } catch {
   338	        /* disposed */
   339	      }
   340	    };
   341	  }, [bars, targetZones]);
   342	
   343	  const changeColor = priceChange >= 0 ? "#26C6DA" : "#EC0000";
   344	
   345	  return (
   346	    <div
   347	      className="relative w-full rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-white/5 flex flex-col"
   348	      style={{
   349	        background: "linear-gradient(180deg, #131722 0%, #0d1117 100%)",
   350	        height: typeof height === "number" ? `${height}px` : height,
   351	      }}
   352	    >
   353	      {/* Header */}
   354	      <div className="flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 border-b border-white/5">
   355	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   356	          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   357	            <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-cyan-400 shadow-lg shadow-cyan-400/50" />
   358	            <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-white tracking-tight">
   359	              ZL1!
   360	            </span>
   361	          </div>
   362	          <span className="text-[11px] text-white/30 font-medium">
   363	            Soybean Oil &bull; 1D
   364	          </span>
   365	        </div>
   366	        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
   367	          {highPrice != null && lowPrice != null && (
   368	            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-[11px]">
   369	              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   370	                <span className="text-white/30">H</span>
   371	                <span className="text-white/60 font-mono">
   372	                  {highPrice.toFixed(2)}
   373	                </span>
   374	              </div>
   375	              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   376	                <span className="text-white/30">L</span>
   377	                <span className="text-white/60 font-mono">
   378	                  {lowPrice.toFixed(2)}
   379	                </span>
   380	              </div>
   381	            </div>
   382	          )}
   383	          <div className="h-3 w-px bg-white/10" />
   384	          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-white/5">
   385	            <span className="text-[9px] text-white/30 uppercase">IV</span>
   386	            <span className="text-[11px] font-mono text-cyan-400">
   387	              {volatility}
   388	            </span>
   389	          </div>
   390	          {lastPrice != null && (
   391	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   392	              <span className="text-xl font-semibold text-white tabular-nums">
   393	                {lastPrice.toFixed(2)}
   394	              </span>
   395	              <span
   396	                className="text-xs font-medium tabular-nums"
   397	                style={{ color: changeColor }}
   398	              >
   399	                {priceChange >= 0 ? "+" : ""}
   400	                {priceChange.toFixed(2)}%
   401	              </span>
   402	            </div>
   403	          )}
   404	        </div>
   405	      </div>
   406	
   407	      {/* Chart area */}
   408	      <div className="relative w-full flex-1 min-h-0">
   409	        {/* Watermark overlay */}
   410	        <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none z-[1]">
   411	          <Image
   412	            src="/chart_watermark.svg"
   413	            alt=""
   414	            width={280}
   415	            height={140}
   416	            className="opacity-[0.10]"
   417	            style={{ filter: "grayscale(100%)" }}
   418	            priority

    31	interface IntelligenceData {
    32	  headline: string
    33	  summary: string

    40	interface MarketDriversResponse {
    41	  as_of_date: string | null
    42	  as_of_date_min?: string
    43	  as_of_date_max?: string
    44	  mixed_vintage?: boolean
    45	  drivers: {
    46	    vix_stress: DriverData
    47	    crush_pressure: DriverData
    48	    china_tension: DriverData
    49	    tariff_threat: DriverData
    50	    energy_stress?: DriverData
    51	  }

    60	function formatFreshnessLabel(
    61	  payload: Pick<MarketDriversResponse, "as_of_date" | "as_of_date_min" | "as_of_date_max" | "mixed_vintage"> | null | undefined,
    62	): string | null {
    63	  if (!payload) return null
    64	  if (payload.mixed_vintage && payload.as_of_date_min && payload.as_of_date_max) {
    65	    return `Mixed vintage ${payload.as_of_date_min} to ${payload.as_of_date_max}`
    66	  }
    67	  return payload.as_of_date ? `Data as of ${payload.as_of_date}` : null
    68	}
    69	
    70	function formatFreshnessSummary(
    71	  payload: Pick<MarketDriversResponse, "as_of_date" | "as_of_date_min" | "as_of_date_max" | "mixed_vintage"> | null | undefined,
    72	): string {
    73	  if (!payload) return "–"
    74	  if (payload.mixed_vintage && payload.as_of_date_min && payload.as_of_date_max) {
    75	    return `${payload.as_of_date_min} to ${payload.as_of_date_max}`
    76	  }
    77	  return payload.as_of_date ?? "–"
    78	}

   114	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   115	// Score → color
   116	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   117	
   118	function getScoreColor(score: number): { stroke: string; glow: string } {
   119	  const s = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, score))
   120	  if (s <= 25) return { stroke: "#22C55E", glow: "rgba(34,197,94,0.5)" }
   121	  if (s <= 40) {
   122	    const t = (s - 25) / 15
   123	    return {
   124	      stroke: `rgb(${Math.round(34 + (234 - 34) * t)}, ${Math.round(197 - (197 - 179) * t)}, ${Math.round(94 - (94 - 8) * t)})`,
   125	      glow: `rgba(${Math.round(34 + (234 - 34) * t)}, ${Math.round(197 - (197 - 179) * t)}, ${Math.round(94 - (94 - 8) * t)}, 0.5)`,
   126	    }
   127	  }
   128	  if (s <= 55) return { stroke: "#EAB308", glow: "rgba(234,179,8,0.5)" }
   129	  if (s <= 70) {
   130	    const t = (s - 55) / 15
   131	    return {
   132	      stroke: `rgb(${Math.round(234 + (239 - 234) * t)}, ${Math.round(179 - (179 - 115) * t)}, ${Math.round(8 + (0 - 8) * t)})`,
   133	      glow: `rgba(${Math.round(234 + (239 - 234) * t)}, ${Math.round(179 - (179 - 115) * t)}, ${Math.round(8 + (0 - 8) * t)}, 0.5)`,
   134	    }
   135	  }
   136	  if (s <= 85) return { stroke: "#EF7300", glow: "rgba(239,115,0,0.5)" }
   137	  return { stroke: "#EF4444", glow: "rgba(239,68,68,0.6)" }
   138	}
   139	
   140	function getScoreTextColor(score: number | null): string {
   141	  if (score === null) return "text-slate-500"
   142	  if (score >= 70) return "text-red-400"
   143	  if (score >= 55) return "text-orange-400"
   144	  if (score >= 40) return "text-amber-400"
   145	  return "text-green-400"
   146	}
   147	
   148	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   149	// Horizontal Meter
   150	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   151	
   152	function HorizontalMeter({ score }: { score: number | null }) {
   153	  if (score === null) {
   154	    return (
   155	      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 w-full">
   156	        <div className="flex-1 h-3 bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden" />
   157	        <span className="text-3xl font-bold tabular-nums min-w-[3ch] text-right text-slate-500">
   158	          --
   159	        </span>
   160	      </div>
   161	    )
   162	  }
   163	
   164	  const pct = Math.min(Math.max(score, 0), 100)
   165	  const colors = getScoreColor(score)
   166	  return (
   167	    <div className="flex items-center gap-4 w-full">
   168	      <div className="flex-1 h-3 bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   169	        <div
   170	          className="h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-700 ease-out"
   171	          style={{ width: `${pct}%`, backgroundColor: colors.stroke, boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${colors.glow}` }}
   172	        />
   173	      </div>
   174	      <span className="text-3xl font-bold tabular-nums min-w-[3ch] text-right" style={{ color: colors.stroke }}>
   175	        {Math.round(score)}
   176	      </span>
   177	    </div>
   178	  )
   179	}

   181	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   182	// Driver Card
   183	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   184	
   185	interface MetricDef {
   186	  key: string
   187	  label: string
   188	  format: (v: number | null) => string
   189	}
   190	
   191	function DriverCard({
   192	  label,
   193	  data,
   194	  metrics,
   195	  loading,
   196	}: {
   197	  label: string
   198	  data: DriverData | null
   199	  metrics: MetricDef[]
   200	  loading: boolean
   201	}) {
   202	  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false)
   203	  const score = data?.score ?? null
   204	  const level = data?.level ? (LEVEL_LABELS[data.level] ?? data.level) : "--"
   205	  const colors = getScoreColor(score ?? 0)
   206	  const wh = data?.whatsHappening
   207	
   208	  const border =
   209	    score !== null && score >= 65
   210	      ? { borderColor: colors.stroke, boxShadow: `0 0 20px ${colors.glow}` }
   211	      : { borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }
   212	
   213	  return (
   214	    <div
   215	      className="bg-[#0a0a0a] border rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300"
   216	      style={border}
   217	    >
   218	      <div className="text-base font-bold text-slate-300 uppercase tracking-wider mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
   219	        {DRIVER_NAMES[label] ?? label}
   220	        {data?.aiPowered && (
   221	          <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-300 border border-cyan-500/20">AI</span>
   222	        )}
   223	      </div>
   224	
   225	      <div className="w-full mb-2">
   226	        {loading ? (
   227	          <div className="h-3 bg-slate-700/50 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
   228	        ) : (
   229	          <HorizontalMeter score={score} />
   230	        )}
   231	      </div>
   232	
   233	      <div className={`text-lg font-medium mt-1 mb-4 ${loading ? "text-slate-600" : getScoreTextColor(score)}`}>
   234	        {loading ? "..." : level}
   235	      </div>
   236	
   237	      <div className="w-full space-y-2 border-t border-white/5 pt-4">
   238	        {metrics.map((m) => {
   239	          const val = data?.components?.[m.key] ?? null
   240	          return (
   241	            <div key={m.key} className="flex justify-between items-center text-sm">
   242	              <span className="text-slate-400">{m.label}</span>
   243	              <span className="text-slate-200 font-mono">{loading ? "--" : m.format(val)}</span>
   244	            </div>
   245	          )
   246	        })}
   247	      </div>
   248	
   249	      <div className="mt-4 text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed min-h-[40px]">
   250	        {loading ? "..." : (data?.headline ?? "--")}
   251	      </div>
   252	
   253	      {!loading && data?.dataDate && (
   254	        <div className="mt-2 text-xs text-slate-500 font-mono">Data as of: {data.dataDate}</div>
   255	      )}
   256	
   257	      {wh && !loading && (
   258	        <button
   259	          onClick={() => setExpanded(!expanded)}
   260	          className="mt-4 w-full px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium bg-slate-800/80 hover:bg-slate-700/80 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 border border-slate-700/50"
   261	        >
   262	          <span>{expanded ? "\u25BC" : "\u25B6"}</span> What&apos;s Happening?
   263	        </button>
   264	      )}
   265	
   266	      {expanded && wh && (
   267	        <div className="mt-4 w-full text-left space-y-3 animate-in slide-in-from-top-2 duration-200">
   268	          <div className="text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed border-l-2 pl-3" style={{ borderColor: colors.stroke }}>
   269	            {wh.whatsHappening}
   270	          </div>
   271	          <div className="space-y-2 pt-1">
   272	            {[
   273	              { t: "Macro Context", c: wh.macroContext },
   274	              { t: "Supply & Demand", c: wh.supplyDemand },
   275	              { t: "Geopolitical", c: wh.geopolitical },
   276	              { t: "Market Sentiment", c: wh.investorSentiment },
   277	              { t: "Near-Term Outlook", c: wh.nearTermOutlook },
   278	            ].map((s) => (
   279	              <div key={s.t}>
   280	                <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">{s.t}</div>
   281	                <div className="text-sm text-slate-400 leading-snug">{s.c}</div>
   282	              </div>
   283	            ))}
   284	          </div>
   285	          <div className="mt-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/50">
   286	            <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">What This Means For You</div>
   287	            <div className="text-sm text-slate-200">{wh.zlImplication}</div>
   288	          </div>
   289	        </div>
   290	      )}
   291	    </div>
   292	  )
   293	}

   299	export function MarketRiskFactors() {
   300	  const [data, setData] = useState<MarketDriversResponse | null>(null)
   301	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
   302	
   303	  useEffect(() => {
   304	    fetch("/api/dashboard/risk-factors", { cache: "no-store" })
   305	      .then((r) => {
   306	        if (!r.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${r.status}`)
   307	        return r.json()
   308	      })
   309	      .then((json) => {
   310	        if (!json.error) setData(json as MarketDriversResponse)
   311	      })
   312	      .catch(() => {})
   313	      .finally(() => setLoading(false))
   314	  }, [])
   315	
   316	  const d = data?.drivers
   317	
   318	  return (
   319	    <div className="w-full">
   320	      {/* Section Header */}
   321	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
   322	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 pl-1 border-l-4 border-cyan-500">
   323	          <h3 className="text-base font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider">Market Risk Factors</h3>

   325	            KEY DRIVERS

   329	              {data.summary.alert_count} ALERT{data.summary.alert_count > 1 ? "S" : ""}
   330	            </span>
   331	          )}
   332	        </div>
   333	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   334	          {formatFreshnessLabel(data) && <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">{formatFreshnessLabel(data)}</span>}
   335	        </div>
   336	      </div>

     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useState } from "react"
     4	
     5	type IntelligenceData = {
     6	  headline: string
     7	  summary: string
     8	  drivers: { label: string; outlook: string; detail: string }[]
     9	  zlOutlook: string
    10	  zlColor: string
    11	  tradingImplication?: string
    12	  aiPowered?: boolean
    13	}
    14	
    15	type RiskFactorsEnvelope = {
    16	  intelligence?: IntelligenceData
    17	}
    18	
    19	export function MarketIntelligenceRow() {
    20	  const [intelligence, setIntelligence] = useState<IntelligenceData | null>(null)
    21	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    22	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    23	
    24	  useEffect(() => {
    25	    let active = true
    26	
    27	    async function load() {
    28	      try {
    29	        const res = await fetch("/api/dashboard/risk-factors", { cache: "no-store" })
    30	        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
    31	        const json = (await res.json()) as RiskFactorsEnvelope
    32	        if (!active) return
    33	        if (json.intelligence) {
    34	          setIntelligence(json.intelligence)
    35	        } else {
    36	          setError("Unable to load market intelligence")
    37	        }
    38	      } catch (e) {
    39	        if (!active) return
    40	        setError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Unable to load market intelligence")
    41	      } finally {
    42	        if (active) setLoading(false)
    43	      }
    44	    }
    45	
    46	    void load()
    47	    return () => {
    48	      active = false
    49	    }
    50	  }, [])
    51	
    52	  if (loading && !intelligence) {
    53	    return (
    54	      <div className="w-full bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8">
    55	        <div className="h-6 w-80 bg-slate-700/40 rounded animate-pulse mb-4" />
    56	        <div className="h-4 w-full bg-slate-700/30 rounded animate-pulse mb-2" />
    57	        <div className="h-4 w-5/6 bg-slate-700/30 rounded animate-pulse" />
    58	      </div>
    59	    )
    60	  }
    61	
    62	  if (error && !intelligence) {
    63	    return (
    64	      <div className="w-full bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 text-slate-500">
    65	        {error}
    66	      </div>
    67	    )
    68	  }
    69	
    70	  if (!intelligence) return null
    71	
    72	  return (
    73	    <div className="w-full bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8">
    74	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
    75	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    76	          <div
    77	            className="w-1 h-6 rounded-full"
    78	            style={{ backgroundColor: intelligence.zlColor }}
    79	          />
    80	          <h4 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">{intelligence.headline}</h4>
    81	          {intelligence.aiPowered && (
    82	            <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-bold bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-300 border border-cyan-500/20">
    83	              AI
    84	            </span>
    85	          )}
    86	        </div>

    90	            backgroundColor: `${intelligence.zlColor}20`,
    91	            color: intelligence.zlColor,
    92	            border: `1px solid ${intelligence.zlColor}40`,
    93	          }}
    94	        >
    95	          ZL {intelligence.zlOutlook}
    96	        </span>
    97	      </div>

    99	      <p className="text-base text-slate-400 leading-relaxed mb-4">
   100	        {intelligence.summary}
   101	      </p>
   102	
   103	      {intelligence.tradingImplication && (
   104	        <div className="mb-4 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/50">
   105	          <span className="text-xs text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
   106	            What This Means For You
   107	          </span>
   108	          <p className="text-base text-slate-300 mt-1">{intelligence.tradingImplication}</p>
   109	        </div>
   110	      )}
   111	
   112	      {intelligence.drivers?.length > 0 && (
   113	        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   114	          {intelligence.drivers.map((driver, idx) => (
   115	            <div
   116	              key={`${driver.label}-${idx}`}
   117	              className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm"
   118	            >
   119	              <span
   120	                className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-bold shrink-0 ${
   121	                  driver.outlook === "BEARISH" || driver.outlook === "PRESSURE"
   122	                    ? "bg-red-500/20 text-red-400"
   123	                    : driver.outlook === "BULLISH" ||
   124	                        driver.outlook === "SUPPORTIVE" ||
   125	                        driver.outlook === "CALM"
   126	                      ? "bg-green-500/20 text-green-400"
   127	                      : driver.outlook === "MIXED" ||
   128	                          driver.outlook === "WATCH SUPPLY"
   129	                        ? "bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400"
   130	                        : "bg-slate-500/20 text-slate-400"
   131	                }`}
   132	              >
   133	                {driver.label}
   134	              </span>
   135	              <span className="text-slate-500">{driver.detail}</span>
   136	            </div>
   137	          ))}
   138	        </div>
   139	      )}
   140	    </div>
   141	  )
   142	}

     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"
     4	
     5	interface ForecastTarget {
     6	  id: string
     7	  horizonDays: number
     8	  horizonLabel: string
     9	  priceLow: number | null
    10	  priceHigh: number | null
    11	  oofPrice: number | null
    12	  coveragePct: number | null
    13	  isMissing?: boolean
    14	}
    15	
    16	const BIN_COUNT = 11
    17	const AG_HORIZON_DAYS = [30, 90, 180] as const
    18	
    19	function horizonLabel(days: number): string {
    20	  if (days === 30) return "1M"
    21	  if (days === 90) return "3M"
    22	  if (days === 180) return "6M"
    23	  return `${days}d`
    24	}
    25	
    26	function clamp(v: number, min: number, max: number): number {
    27	  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, v))
    28	}
    29	
    30	function cellAlpha(price: number, t: ForecastTarget): number {
    31	  if (t.priceLow === null || t.priceHigh === null || t.oofPrice === null) {
    32	    return 0.08
    33	  }
    34	
    35	  const low = Math.min(t.priceLow, t.priceHigh)
    36	  const high = Math.max(t.priceLow, t.priceHigh)
    37	  const halfWidth = Math.max((high - low) / 2, 0.1)
    38	  const centerDist = Math.abs(price - t.oofPrice) / halfWidth
    39	  const insideZone = price >= low && price <= high
    40	
    41	  if (insideZone) {
    42	    return clamp(1 - centerDist * 0.75, 0.25, 1)
    43	  }
    44	
    45	  const outsideDist = Math.abs(price - t.oofPrice) / (halfWidth * 2.5)
    46	  return clamp(0.18 - outsideDist * 0.12, 0.04, 0.18)
    47	}
    48	
    49	export function ProbabilitySurface() {
    50	  const [targets, setTargets] = useState<ForecastTarget[]>([])
    51	  const [asOfDate, setAsOfDate] = useState<string | null>(null)
    52	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    53	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    54	
    55	  useEffect(() => {
    56	    let cancelled = false
    57	
    58	    async function loadTargets() {
    59	      setLoading(true)
    60	      setError(null)
    61	      try {
    62	        const res = await fetch("/api/zl/forecast-targets", { cache: "no-store" })
    63	        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
    64	        const json = await res.json()
    65	        if (cancelled) return
    66	        setTargets(
    67	          (json.targets ?? [])
    68	            .filter(
    69	              (t: ForecastTarget) =>
    70	                AG_HORIZON_DAYS.includes(t?.horizonDays as (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number]) &&
    71	                typeof t?.horizonDays === "number" &&
    72	                typeof t?.priceLow === "number" &&
    73	                typeof t?.priceHigh === "number" &&
    74	                typeof t?.oofPrice === "number",
    75	            )
    76	            .map((t: ForecastTarget) => ({
    77	              ...t,
    78	              horizonLabel: horizonLabel(t.horizonDays),
    79	            }))
    80	            .sort((a: ForecastTarget, b: ForecastTarget) => a.horizonDays - b.horizonDays),
    81	        )
    82	        setAsOfDate(json.asOfDate ?? null)
    83	      } catch (e) {
    84	        if (cancelled) return
    85	        setError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Failed to load target zones")
    86	      } finally {
    87	        if (!cancelled) setLoading(false)
    88	      }
    89	    }
    90	
    91	    loadTargets()
    92	    return () => { cancelled = true }
    93	  }, [])
    94	
    95	  const priceBins = useMemo(() => {
    96	    const resolvedTargets = targets.filter(
    97	      (t) => t.priceLow !== null && t.priceHigh !== null && t.oofPrice !== null,
    98	    )
    99	    if (resolvedTargets.length === 0) return [] as number[]
   100	
   101	    const low = Math.min(...resolvedTargets.map((t) => Math.min(t.priceLow!, t.priceHigh!)))
   102	    const high = Math.max(...resolvedTargets.map((t) => Math.max(t.priceLow!, t.priceHigh!)))
   103	    if (!Number.isFinite(low) || !Number.isFinite(high)) return [] as number[]
   104	
   105	    const span = Math.max(high - low, 1)
   106	    const min = low - span * 0.05
   107	    const max = high + span * 0.05
   108	    const step = (max - min) / (BIN_COUNT - 1)
   109	
   110	    return Array.from(
   111	      { length: BIN_COUNT },
   112	      (_, idx) => Number((max - idx * step).toFixed(2)),
   113	    )
   114	  }, [targets])
   115	
   116	  const displayTargets = useMemo(() => {
   117	    const byHorizon = new Map<number, ForecastTarget>()
   118	    for (const t of targets) byHorizon.set(t.horizonDays, t)
   119	
   120	    return AG_HORIZON_DAYS.map((horizonDays) => {
   121	      const resolved = byHorizon.get(horizonDays)
   122	      if (resolved) return resolved
   123	
   124	      return {
   125	        id: `missing-${horizonDays}`,
   126	        horizonDays,
   127	        horizonLabel: horizonLabel(horizonDays),
   128	        priceLow: null,
   129	        priceHigh: null,
   130	        oofPrice: null,
   131	        coveragePct: null,
   132	        isMissing: true,
   133	      } satisfies ForecastTarget
   134	    })
   135	  }, [targets])
   136	
   137	  const gridTemplateColumns = `56px repeat(${Math.max(displayTargets.length, 1)}, minmax(0,1fr))`
   138	
   139	  return (
   140	    <div className="w-full bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
   141	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
   142	        <div>
   143	          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white uppercase tracking-wider">
   144	            L3 Probability Surface
   145	          </h3>
   146	          <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">
   147	            Real target zone density from latest AG trading-model forecast (1M/3M/6M)
   148	            {asOfDate ? ` (as of ${asOfDate})` : ""}
   149	          </p>
   150	        </div>
   151	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-[10px] text-slate-500">
   152	          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   153	            <span className="inline-block w-2 h-2 rounded-[1px] bg-cyan-400/90" />
   154	            High
   155	          </div>
   156	          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   157	            <span className="inline-block w-2 h-2 rounded-[1px] bg-cyan-400/20" />
   158	            Low
   159	          </div>
   160	        </div>
   161	      </div>
   162	
   163	      {loading && (
   164	        <div className="mt-6 text-sm text-slate-400">Loading forecast density...</div>
   165	      )}
   166	
   167	      {!loading && error && (
   168	        <div className="mt-6 text-sm text-red-400">Failed to load probability data: {error}</div>
   169	      )}
   170	
   171	      {!loading && !error && targets.length === 0 && (
   172	        <div className="mt-6 text-sm text-slate-400">
   173	          No production target zones available yet. This view populates automatically once forecast rows are present.
   174	        </div>
   175	      )}
   176	
   177	      {!loading && !error && targets.length > 0 && (
   178	        <div className="mt-6 space-y-2">
   179	          <div className="grid gap-1" style={{ gridTemplateColumns }}>
   180	            <div />
   181	            {displayTargets.map((t) => (
   182	              <div key={`h-${t.id}`} className="text-center text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-mono">
   183	                <div>{t.horizonLabel}</div>
   184	                {t.isMissing && (
   185	                  <div className="text-[9px] text-slate-600">pending</div>
   186	                )}
   187	              </div>
   188	            ))}
   189	
   190	            {priceBins.map((price) => (
   191	              <React.Fragment key={`row-${price}`}>
   192	                <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 font-mono pr-2 text-right">
   193	                  ${price.toFixed(2)}
   194	                </div>
   195	                {displayTargets.map((t) => {
   196	                  const alpha = cellAlpha(price, t)
   197	                  const title = t.isMissing
   198	                    ? `${t.horizonLabel} | awaiting forecast rows`
   199	                    : `${t.horizonLabel} | zone $${t.priceLow!.toFixed(2)}-$${t.priceHigh!.toFixed(2)} | median $${t.oofPrice!.toFixed(2)}`
   200	                  return (
   201	                    <div
   202	                      key={`${t.id}-${price}`}
   203	                      className="h-5 rounded-[2px] border border-white/5"
   204	                      style={{
   205	                        backgroundColor: `rgba(34, 211, 238, ${alpha})`,
   206	                        boxShadow: alpha > 0.75 ? "0 0 10px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.35)" : "none",
   207	                      }}
   208	                      title={title}
   209	                    />
   210	                  )
   211	                })}
   212	              </React.Fragment>
   213	            ))}
   214	          </div>
   215	
   216	          <div className="grid gap-1 pt-2 border-t border-white/5" style={{ gridTemplateColumns }}>
   217	            <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 font-mono pr-2 text-right">Coverage</div>
   218	            {displayTargets.map((t) => (
   219	              <div key={`c-${t.id}`} className="text-center text-[10px] font-mono text-cyan-300/80">
   220	                {t.coveragePct !== null ? `${t.coveragePct}%` : "--"}
   221	              </div>
   222	            ))}
   223	          </div>
   224	        </div>
   225	      )}
   226	    </div>
   227	  )
   228	}

     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react"
     4	import {
     5	  createChart,
     6	  LineSeries,
     7	  HistogramSeries,
     8	  ColorType,
     9	  LineStyle,
    10	  type IChartApi,
    11	  type Time,
    12	} from "lightweight-charts"
    13	
    14	type MarketRegime = "BULLISH" | "BEARISH" | "NEUTRAL" | "SUPPLY_CRISIS" | "DEMAND_SHOCK"
    15	
    16	const REGIME_COLORS: Record<MarketRegime, { bg: string; border: string }> = {
    17	  BULLISH: { bg: "rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.15)", border: "#22C55E" },
    18	  BEARISH: { bg: "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15)", border: "#EF4444" },
    19	  NEUTRAL: { bg: "rgba(107, 114, 128, 0.1)", border: "#6B7280" },
    20	  SUPPLY_CRISIS: { bg: "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.25)", border: "#DC2626" },
    21	  DEMAND_SHOCK: { bg: "rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.25)", border: "#16A34A" },
    22	}
    23	
    24	interface RegimeZone {
    25	  start: string
    26	  end: string
    27	  regime: MarketRegime
    28	}
    29	
    30	function toChartDay(dateStr: string): Time {
    31	  return dateStr.slice(0, 10) as unknown as Time
    32	}
    33	
    34	function rollingSma(values: number[], period: number): Array<number | null> {
    35	  const out: Array<number | null> = Array(values.length).fill(null)
    36	  if (period <= 0 || values.length < period) return out
    37	
    38	  let sum = 0
    39	  for (let i = 0; i < values.length; i += 1) {
    40	    sum += values[i]
    41	    if (i >= period) sum -= values[i - period]
    42	    if (i >= period - 1) out[i] = sum / period
    43	  }
    44	  return out
    45	}
    46	
    47	export function RegimeAnalysisChart({
    48	  height = 400,
    49	  timeRange = "1Y",
    50	}: {
    51	  height?: number
    52	  timeRange?: "1M" | "3M" | "6M" | "1Y"
    53	}) {
    54	  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    55	  const chartRef = useRef<IChartApi | null>(null)
    56	  const [selectedRange, setSelectedRange] = useState(timeRange)
    57	  const [priceData, setPriceData] = useState<{ timestamp: string; close: number }[]>([])
    58	  const [currentRegime, setCurrentRegime] = useState<MarketRegime>("NEUTRAL")
    59	
    60	  useEffect(() => {
    61	    fetch("/api/zl/price-1d")
    62	      .then((r) => r.json())
    63	      .then((json) => {
    64	        if (json.data) {
    65	          setPriceData(
    66	            json.data.map((d: Record<string, unknown>) => ({
    67	              timestamp: String(d.tradeDate),
    68	              close: Number(d.close),
    69	            })),
    70	          )
    71	        }
    72	      })
    73	      .catch(() => {})
    74	  }, [])
    75	
    76	  useEffect(() => {
    77	    if (!containerRef.current || priceData.length === 0) return
    78	
    79	    // Filter by selected range
    80	    const days = { "1M": 30, "3M": 90, "6M": 180, "1Y": 365 }[selectedRange]
    81	    const cutoff = new Date()
    82	    cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - days)
    83	    const filtered = priceData.filter((d) => new Date(d.timestamp) >= cutoff)
    84	    if (filtered.length === 0) return
    85	
    86	    if (chartRef.current) {
    87	      try { chartRef.current.remove() } catch { /* disposed */ }
    88	      chartRef.current = null
    89	    }
    90	
    91	    const chart = createChart(containerRef.current, {
    92	      width: containerRef.current.clientWidth,
    93	      height,
    94	      layout: {
    95	        background: { type: ColorType.Solid, color: "transparent" },
    96	        textColor: "#525252",
    97	        attributionLogo: false,
    98	      },
    99	      grid: {
   100	        vertLines: { visible: false },
   101	        horzLines: { color: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03)" },
   102	      },
   103	      handleScroll: false,
   104	      handleScale: false,
   105	      crosshair: {
   106	        vertLine: {
   107	          color: "rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2)",
   108	          width: 1,
   109	          style: LineStyle.Dashed,
   110	          labelVisible: true,
   111	        },
   112	        horzLine: { visible: false, labelVisible: false },
   113	      },
   114	      timeScale: {
   115	        visible: true,
   116	        borderVisible: false,
   117	        fixLeftEdge: true,
   118	        fixRightEdge: true,
   119	      },
   120	      rightPriceScale: { borderVisible: false, visible: false },
   121	      leftPriceScale: { visible: true, borderVisible: false },
   122	    })
   123	
   124	    chartRef.current = chart
   125	
   126	    const lineData = filtered
   127	      .map((d) => ({ time: toChartDay(d.timestamp), value: d.close }))
   128	      .sort((a, b) => String(a.time).localeCompare(String(b.time)))
   129	
   130	    // SMA-based regime detection
   131	    const regimeZones: RegimeZone[] = []
   132	    let currentZoneStart = lineData[0]?.time as string
   133	    let prevRegime: MarketRegime = "NEUTRAL"
   134	
   135	    const closeValues = lineData.map((d) => d.value)
   136	    const shortPeriod = Math.min(20, Math.max(8, Math.floor(lineData.length * 0.35)))
   137	    const longPeriod = Math.min(50, Math.max(shortPeriod + 8, Math.floor(lineData.length * 0.75)))
   138	    const bullThreshold = longPeriod >= 50 ? 1.02 : 1.01
   139	    const bearThreshold = longPeriod >= 50 ? 0.98 : 0.99
   140	    const supplyThreshold = longPeriod >= 50 ? 0.95 : 0.97
   141	    const demandThreshold = longPeriod >= 50 ? 1.08 : 1.05
   142	    const smaShort = rollingSma(closeValues, shortPeriod)
   143	    const smaLong = rollingSma(closeValues, longPeriod)
   144	
   145	    for (let i = 0; i < lineData.length; i += 1) {
   146	      const sShort = smaShort[i]
   147	      const sLong = smaLong[i]
   148	      if (sShort == null || sLong == null) continue
   149	
   150	      const price = lineData[i].value
   151	      let regime: MarketRegime = "NEUTRAL"
   152	      if (sShort > sLong * bullThreshold && price > sShort) regime = "BULLISH"
   153	      else if (sShort < sLong * bearThreshold && price < sShort) regime = "BEARISH"
   154	      else if (price < sLong * supplyThreshold) regime = "SUPPLY_CRISIS"
   155	      else if (price > sLong * demandThreshold) regime = "DEMAND_SHOCK"
   156	
   157	      if (regime !== prevRegime) {
   158	        if (currentZoneStart) {
   159	          regimeZones.push({ start: currentZoneStart, end: lineData[i].time as string, regime: prevRegime })
   160	        }
   161	        currentZoneStart = lineData[i].time as string
   162	        prevRegime = regime
   163	      }
   164	    }
   165	
   166	    if (currentZoneStart && lineData.length > 0) {
   167	      regimeZones.push({ start: currentZoneStart, end: lineData[lineData.length - 1].time as string, regime: prevRegime })
   168	      setCurrentRegime(prevRegime)
   169	    }
   170	
   171	    // Draw regime zones as histogram background
   172	    for (const zone of regimeZones) {
   173	      const zoneData = lineData
   174	        .filter((d) => (d.time as string) >= zone.start && (d.time as string) <= zone.end)
   175	        .map((d) => ({ time: d.time, value: 1, color: REGIME_COLORS[zone.regime].bg }))
   176	
   177	      if (zoneData.length > 0) {
   178	        const maxPrice = Math.max(...lineData.map((d) => d.value))
   179	        const minPrice = Math.min(...lineData.map((d) => d.value))
   180	        const range = maxPrice - minPrice
   181	
   182	        const zoneSeries = chart.addSeries(HistogramSeries, {
   183	          priceLineVisible: false,
   184	          lastValueVisible: false,
   185	          priceScaleId: "regime",
   186	          color: REGIME_COLORS[zone.regime].bg,
   187	        })
   188	
   189	        zoneSeries.setData(
   190	          zoneData.map((d) => ({
   191	            time: d.time,
   192	            value: maxPrice + range * 0.1,
   193	            color: REGIME_COLORS[zone.regime].bg,
   194	          })),
   195	        )
   196	      }
   197	    }
   198	
   199	    // Price line on top
   200	    const priceLine = chart.addSeries(LineSeries, {
   201	      color: "#ffffff",
   202	      lineWidth: 2,
   203	      priceLineVisible: false,
   204	      lastValueVisible: true,
   205	      priceScaleId: "left",
   206	    })
   207	    priceLine.setData(lineData)
   208	
   209	    chart.timeScale().fitContent()
   210	
   211	    let disposed = false
   212	    const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
   213	      if (disposed || !entries[0]) return
   214	      const { width } = entries[0].contentRect
   215	      try { chart.applyOptions({ width, height }) } catch { /* disposed */ }
   216	    })
   217	    observer.observe(containerRef.current)
   218	
   219	    return () => {
   220	      disposed = true
   221	      observer.disconnect()
   222	      try { chart.remove() } catch { /* disposed */ }
   223	      chartRef.current = null
   224	    }
   225	  }, [priceData, selectedRange, height])
   226	
   227	  return (
   228	    <div className="bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/5 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
   229	      {/* Header */}
   230	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-white/5">
   231	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   232	          <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-white">ZL Futures - Regime Analysis</h3>
   233	          <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-[9px] font-bold uppercase bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/30">
   234	            Beta
   235	          </span>
   236	          <span
   237	            className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold uppercase"
   238	            style={{
   239	              backgroundColor: REGIME_COLORS[currentRegime].bg,
   240	              color: REGIME_COLORS[currentRegime].border,
   241	              border: `1px solid ${REGIME_COLORS[currentRegime].border}30`,
   242	            }}
   243	          >
   244	            {currentRegime.replace("_", " ")}
   245	          </span>
   246	        </div>
   247	
   248	        <div className="flex items-center bg-white/5 rounded-lg p-0.5">
   249	          {(["1M", "3M", "6M", "1Y"] as const).map((range) => (
   250	            <button
   251	              key={range}
   252	              onClick={() => setSelectedRange(range)}
   253	              className={`px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-all ${
   254	                selectedRange === range ? "bg-white/10 text-white" : "text-slate-500 hover:text-white"
   255	              }`}
   256	            >
   257	              {range}
   258	            </button>
   259	          ))}
   260	        </div>
   261	      </div>
   262	
   263	      {/* Chart */}
   264	      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ height }} />
   265	
   266	      {/* Legend */}
   267	      <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-6 py-2 border-t border-white/5 bg-white/[0.02]">
   268	        {(Object.entries(REGIME_COLORS) as [MarketRegime, { bg: string; border: string }][])
   269	          .map(([regime, colors]) => (
   270	            <div key={regime} className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   271	              <div
   272	                className="w-3 h-3 rounded-sm"
   273	                style={{ backgroundColor: colors.bg, border: `1px solid ${colors.border}40` }}
   274	              />
   275	              <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase">
   276	                {regime.replace("_", " ")}
   277	              </span>
   278	            </div>
   279	          ))}
   280	      </div>
   281	    </div>
   282	  )
   283	}

    27	@dataclass(frozen=True)
    28	class PipelineConfig:
    29	    supabase_db_url: str | None
    30	    supabase_pooler_url: str | None
    31	    local_training_db_url: str
    32	    model_version: str
    33	    local_data_dir: Path
    34	    model_artifact_dir: Path
    35	
    36	
    37	def _first_non_empty(*values: str | None) -> str | None:
    38	    for value in values:
    39	        if value:
    40	            return value
    41	    return None
    42	
    43	
    44	def load_config() -> PipelineConfig:
    45	    import os
    46	
    47	    local_data_dir = Path(os.getenv("FUSION_LOCAL_DATA_DIR", "data/fusion")).expanduser()
    48	    model_artifact_dir = Path(os.getenv("FUSION_MODEL_ARTIFACT_DIR", "models/fusion")).expanduser()
    49	
    50	    return PipelineConfig(
    51	        # DATABASE_URL is the canonical cloud DB contract for V16.
    52	        # SUPABASE_DB_URL remains a compatibility alias for existing scripts.
    53	        supabase_db_url=_first_non_empty(
    54	            os.getenv("DATABASE_URL"),
    55	            os.getenv("SUPABASE_DB_URL"),
    56	            # Vercel env pull exposes direct Postgres URL under this key.
    57	            os.getenv("POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING"),
    58	        ),
    59	        # Keep compatibility with environments that expose POSTGRES_URL.
    60	        supabase_pooler_url=_first_non_empty(
    61	            os.getenv("SUPABASE_POOLER_URL"),
    62	            os.getenv("POSTGRES_URL"),
    63	        ),
    64	        local_training_db_url=_first_non_empty(
    65	            os.getenv("FUSION_LOCAL_TRAINING_DB_URL"),
    66	            os.getenv("LOCAL_TRAINING_DB_URL"),
    67	            DEFAULT_LOCAL_TRAINING_DB_URL,
    68	        )
    69	        or DEFAULT_LOCAL_TRAINING_DB_URL,
    70	        model_version=os.getenv("MODEL_VERSION", "v16-scaffold"),
    71	        local_data_dir=local_data_dir,
    72	        model_artifact_dir=model_artifact_dir,
    73	    )
    74	
    75	
    76	def resolve_cloud_db_url() -> str | None:
    77	    cfg = load_config()
    78	    return cfg.supabase_db_url or cfg.supabase_pooler_url
    79	
    80	
    81	def resolve_local_training_db_url() -> str:
    82	    return load_config().local_training_db_url

     1	from __future__ import annotations
     2	
     3	import argparse
     4	from typing import Callable
     5	
     6	from . import build_matrix
     7	from . import generate_forward_forecasts
     8	from . import generate_specialist_features
     9	from . import generate_specialist_signals
    10	from . import generate_target_zones
    11	from . import promote_to_cloud
    12	from . import run_garch
    13	from . import run_monte_carlo
    14	from . import training_readiness_gate
    15	from . import train_models
    16	
    17	PhaseFn = Callable[..., dict[str, object]]
    18	
    19	PHASE_MAP: dict[str, PhaseFn] = {
    20	    "matrix": build_matrix.run,
    21	    "specialists": generate_specialist_features.run,
    22	    "signals": generate_specialist_signals.run,
    23	    "train-readiness": training_readiness_gate.run,
    24	    "train": train_models.run,
    25	    "forecast": generate_forward_forecasts.run,
    26	    "monte-carlo": run_monte_carlo.run,
    27	    "garch": run_garch.run,
    28	    "target-zones": generate_target_zones.run,
    29	    "promote": promote_to_cloud.run,
    30	}
    31	
    32	PIPELINE_ORDER = [
    33	    "matrix",
    34	    "specialists",
    35	    "signals",
    36	    "train-readiness",
    37	    "train",
    38	    "forecast",
    39	    "garch",
    40	    "monte-carlo",
    41	    "target-zones",
    42	    "promote",
    43	]
    44	
    45	
    46	def run_phase(
    47	    name: str,
    48	    *,
    49	    dry_run: bool,
    50	    approve_training: bool,
    51	    approve_promotion: bool,
    52	) -> dict[str, object]:
    53	    fn = PHASE_MAP[name]
    54	    if name == "train":
    55	        return fn(dry_run=dry_run, approved=approve_training)
    56	    if name == "promote":
    57	        return fn(dry_run=dry_run or not approve_promotion, approved=approve_promotion)
    58	    return fn(dry_run=dry_run)
    59	
    60	
    61	def main() -> None:
    62	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="ZINC Fusion v16 pipeline runner")
    63	    parser.add_argument("--all", action="store_true", help="Run all phases in pipeline order")
    64	    parser.add_argument("--phase", choices=PIPELINE_ORDER, help="Run one phase")
    65	    parser.add_argument("--dry-run", action="store_true", help="Show intent only, no writes")
    66	    parser.add_argument(
    67	        "--approve-training",
    68	        action="store_true",
    69	        help="Explicit training approval gate for non-dry-run train phase",
    70	    )
    71	    parser.add_argument(
    72	        "--approve-promotion",
    73	        action="store_true",
    74	        help="Explicit cloud promotion approval gate for non-dry-run promote phase",
    75	    )
    76	    args = parser.parse_args()
    77	
    78	    selected: list[str]
    79	    if args.all:
    80	        selected = PIPELINE_ORDER
    81	    elif args.phase:
    82	        selected = [args.phase]
    83	    else:
    84	        parser.error("Select --all or --phase")
    85	
    86	    for phase in selected:
    87	        result = run_phase(
    88	            phase,
    89	            dry_run=args.dry_run,
    90	            approve_training=args.approve_training,
    91	            approve_promotion=args.approve_promotion,
    92	        )
    93	        print(result)
    94	
    95	
    96	if __name__ == "__main__":
    97	    main()

     1	from __future__ import annotations

    25	from .training_readiness_gate import run as run_training_readiness

    27	
    28	class TrainingApprovalError(RuntimeError):
    29	    pass
    30	
    31	
    32	class TrainingContractError(RuntimeError):
    33	    pass
    34	
    35	
    36	LOCKED_PRESET = "best_quality"
    37	LOCKED_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS = 3600
    38	LOCKED_NUM_BAG_FOLDS = 5
    39	LOCKED_NUM_STACK_LEVELS = 1
    40	LOCKED_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE = "full_zoo"
    41	LOCKED_TRAINING_SOURCE = "local_postgres"
    42	LOCKED_MIN_DIRECTIONAL_ACCURACY = 0.70
    43	MAX_DEFAULT_NUM_CPUS = 8
    44	MODEL_SELECTION_MODES = {"full_zoo", "include_only", "exclude_only"}
    45	TRAINING_SOURCE_MODES = {"local_postgres", "parquet_artifacts"}
    46	INTERNAL_MODEL_TYPE_EXCLUSIONS: tuple[str, ...] = (
    47	    "DUMMY",
    48	    "ENS_WEIGHTED",
    49	    "SIMPLE_ENS_WEIGHTED",
    50	    "GBM_PREP",
    51	    "AG_IMAGE_NN",
    52	    "AG_TEXT_NN",
    53	    "FASTTEXT",
    54	)

    56	
    57	def _parse_int_env(name: str, default: int) -> int:
    58	    value = os.getenv(name)
    59	    if value is None or not value.strip():
    60	        return default
    61	    return int(value)
    62	
    63	
    64	def _parse_float_env(name: str, default: float) -> float:
    65	    value = os.getenv(name)
    66	    if value is None or not value.strip():
    67	        return default
    68	    return float(value)
    69	
    70	
    71	def _parse_csv_env(name: str, default: str = "") -> list[str]:
    72	    raw = os.getenv(name, default)
    73	    return [item.strip() for item in raw.split(",") if item.strip()]
    74	
    75	
    76	def _normalize_model_types(values: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    77	    normalized: list[str] = []
    78	    seen: set[str] = set()
    79	    for item in values:
    80	        key = item.strip().upper()
    81	        if not key or key in seen:
    82	            continue
    83	        seen.add(key)
    84	        normalized.append(key)
    85	    return normalized
    86	
    87	
    88	def _resolve_num_cpus() -> int:
    89	    requested = _parse_int_env("AUTOGLUON_NUM_CPUS", 0)
    90	    if requested > 0:
    91	        return requested
    92	    cpu_total = os.cpu_count() or 1
    93	    return max(1, min(cpu_total, MAX_DEFAULT_NUM_CPUS))
    94	
    95	
    96	def _apply_runtime_thread_guard(*, num_cpus: int) -> dict[str, int]:
    97	    thread_budget = max(1, min(num_cpus, MAX_DEFAULT_NUM_CPUS))
    98	    runtime_vars = {
    99	        "OMP_NUM_THREADS": thread_budget,
   100	        "OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS": thread_budget,
   101	        "MKL_NUM_THREADS": thread_budget,
   102	        "VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS": thread_budget,
   103	        "NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS": thread_budget,
   104	    }
   105	    for key, value in runtime_vars.items():
   106	        os.environ[key] = str(value)
   107	    return runtime_vars
   108	
   109	
   110	def _resolve_runtime_guard(*, dry_run: bool) -> dict[str, object]:
   111	    allow_unsafe = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_UNSAFE_RUNTIME", "0").strip() == "1"
   112	    requires_guard = sys.version_info[:2] >= (3, 12)
   113	    runtime = {
   114	        "python_version": f"{sys.version_info.major}.{sys.version_info.minor}.{sys.version_info.micro}",
   115	        "python_executable": sys.executable,
   116	        "allow_unsafe_runtime": allow_unsafe,
   117	        "requires_safe_runtime": requires_guard,
   118	    }
   119	    if requires_guard and not allow_unsafe and not dry_run:
   120	        raise TrainingContractError(
   121	            "Unsafe AutoGluon runtime detected on Python 3.12+. "
   122	            "Use the project's .venv-ag311 environment for approved training runs, "
   123	            "or set AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_UNSAFE_RUNTIME=1 only for explicit crash-risk override runs."
   124	        )
   125	    return runtime
   126	
   127	
   128	def _resolve_openmp_runtime() -> dict[str, object]:
   129	    try:
   130	        import lightgbm  # noqa: F401
   131	    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
   132	        return {"detected": False, "error": f"lightgbm import failed: {exc}", "openmp_libraries": []}
   133	    try:
   134	        import sklearn  # noqa: F401
   135	    except Exception:
   136	        # sklearn import is optional for this guard; proceed with whatever is loaded.
   137	        pass
   138	
   139	    try:
   140	        from threadpoolctl import threadpool_info
   141	    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
   142	        return {"detected": False, "error": f"threadpoolctl unavailable: {exc}", "openmp_libraries": []}
   143	
   144	    info = threadpool_info()
   145	    openmp_libraries = sorted(
   146	        {
   147	            str(entry.get("filepath"))
   148	            for entry in info
   149	            if entry.get("user_api") == "openmp" and entry.get("filepath")
   150	        }
   151	    )
   152	    return {
   153	        "detected": True,
   154	        "openmp_libraries": openmp_libraries,
   155	        "openmp_library_count": len(openmp_libraries),
   156	    }
   157	
   158	
   159	def _discover_full_zoo_model_types() -> list[str]:
   160	    from autogluon.tabular.trainer.model_presets import presets
   161	
   162	    registry_keys = getattr(presets.ag_model_registry, "keys", [])
   163	    if not isinstance(registry_keys, list) or not registry_keys:
   164	        raise TrainingContractError("unable to discover AutoGluon model registry keys for full-zoo selection")
   165	
   166	    internal = set(INTERNAL_MODEL_TYPE_EXCLUSIONS)
   167	    selected: list[str] = []
   168	    for raw_key in registry_keys:
   169	        key = str(raw_key).strip().upper()
   170	        if not key:
   171	            continue
   172	        if key in internal:
   173	            continue
   174	        if key.startswith("IM_"):
   175	            continue
   176	        selected.append(key)
   177	    selected = _normalize_model_types(selected)
   178	    if not selected:
   179	        raise TrainingContractError("full-zoo selection resolved to 0 model types")
   180	    return selected
   181	
   182	
   183	def _resolve_model_selection(*, allow_override: bool) -> tuple[str, list[str], list[str], list[str], bool]:
   184	    selection_mode = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE", LOCKED_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE).strip().lower()
   185	    if selection_mode not in MODEL_SELECTION_MODES:
   186	        raise TrainingContractError(
   187	            f"unsupported AUTOGLUON_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE={selection_mode!r}; "
   188	            f"valid={sorted(MODEL_SELECTION_MODES)}"
   189	        )
   190	
   191	    requested_included = _normalize_model_types(_parse_csv_env("AUTOGLUON_INCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES"))
   192	    requested_excluded = _normalize_model_types(_parse_csv_env("AUTOGLUON_EXCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES"))
   193	    available_full_zoo = _discover_full_zoo_model_types()
   194	    available_set = set(available_full_zoo)
   195	
   196	    unknown_included = sorted([value for value in requested_included if value not in available_set])
   197	    unknown_excluded = sorted([value for value in requested_excluded if value not in available_set])
   198	    if unknown_included or unknown_excluded:
   199	        raise TrainingContractError(
   200	            "unknown model types in selection request: "
   201	            + f"included_unknown={unknown_included}, excluded_unknown={unknown_excluded}"
   202	        )
   203	
   204	    if selection_mode == "full_zoo":
   205	        if not allow_override and (requested_included or requested_excluded):
   206	            raise TrainingContractError(
   207	                "AUTOGLUON_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE=full_zoo does not accept "
   208	                "AUTOGLUON_INCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES or AUTOGLUON_EXCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES unless "
   209	                "AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_CONTRACT_OVERRIDE=1."
   210	            )
   211	        included_model_types = available_full_zoo
   212	        excluded_model_types: list[str] = []
   213	    elif selection_mode == "include_only":
   214	        if not requested_included:
   215	            raise TrainingContractError(
   216	                "AUTOGLUON_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE=include_only requires AUTOGLUON_INCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES"
   217	            )
   218	        if requested_excluded:
   219	            raise TrainingContractError(
   220	                "AUTOGLUON_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE=include_only cannot be combined with "
   221	                "AUTOGLUON_EXCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES"
   222	            )
   223	        included_model_types = requested_included
   224	        excluded_model_types = []
   225	    else:
   226	        if requested_included:
   227	            raise TrainingContractError(
   228	                "AUTOGLUON_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE=exclude_only cannot be combined with "
   229	                "AUTOGLUON_INCLUDED_MODEL_TYPES"
   230	            )
   231	        included_model_types = []
   232	        excluded_model_types = requested_excluded
   233	
   234	    return selection_mode, included_model_types, excluded_model_types, available_full_zoo, selection_mode == LOCKED_MODEL_SELECTION_MODE
   235	
   236	
   237	def _resolve_training_source(*, allow_override: bool) -> str:
   238	    source = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_TRAINING_SOURCE", LOCKED_TRAINING_SOURCE).strip().lower() or LOCKED_TRAINING_SOURCE
   239	    if source not in TRAINING_SOURCE_MODES:
   240	        raise TrainingContractError(
   241	            f"unsupported AUTOGLUON_TRAINING_SOURCE={source!r}; valid={sorted(TRAINING_SOURCE_MODES)}"
   242	        )
   243	    if not allow_override and source != LOCKED_TRAINING_SOURCE:
   244	        raise TrainingContractError(
   245	            "Hard lock violation on AG training source: "
   246	            + f"AUTOGLUON_TRAINING_SOURCE={source!r} (locked={LOCKED_TRAINING_SOURCE!r}). "
   247	            + "Set AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_CONTRACT_OVERRIDE=1 only for explicit, approved override runs."
   248	        )
   249	    return source
   250	
   251	
   252	def _resolve_training_contract() -> tuple[int, str, int, int, str, list[str], list[str], list[str], str, bool, bool]:
   253	    allow_override = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_CONTRACT_OVERRIDE", "0").strip() == "1"
   254	    requested_time_limit = _parse_int_env("AUTOGLUON_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS", LOCKED_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS)
   255	    requested_presets = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_PRESETS", LOCKED_PRESET)
   256	    requested_num_bag_folds = _parse_int_env("AUTOGLUON_NUM_BAG_FOLDS", LOCKED_NUM_BAG_FOLDS)
   257	    requested_num_stack_levels = _parse_int_env("AUTOGLUON_NUM_STACK_LEVELS", LOCKED_NUM_STACK_LEVELS)
   258	    training_source = _resolve_training_source(allow_override=allow_override)
   259	    (
   260	        selection_mode,
   261	        included_model_types,
   262	        excluded_model_types,
   263	        available_full_zoo,
   264	        model_selection_lock_enforced,
   265	    ) = _resolve_model_selection(allow_override=allow_override)
   266	
   267	    if allow_override:
   268	        return (
   269	            requested_time_limit,
   270	            requested_presets,
   271	            requested_num_bag_folds,
   272	            requested_num_stack_levels,
   273	            selection_mode,
   274	            included_model_types,
   275	            excluded_model_types,
   276	            available_full_zoo,
   277	            training_source,
   278	            False,
   279	            model_selection_lock_enforced,
   280	        )
   281	
   282	    conflicts: list[str] = []
   283	    if requested_time_limit != LOCKED_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS:
   284	        conflicts.append(
   285	            f"AUTOGLUON_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS={requested_time_limit} (locked={LOCKED_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS})"
   286	        )
   287	    if requested_presets != LOCKED_PRESET:
   288	        conflicts.append(f"AUTOGLUON_PRESETS={requested_presets!r} (locked={LOCKED_PRESET!r})")
   289	    if requested_num_bag_folds != LOCKED_NUM_BAG_FOLDS:
   290	        conflicts.append(
   291	            f"AUTOGLUON_NUM_BAG_FOLDS={requested_num_bag_folds} (locked={LOCKED_NUM_BAG_FOLDS})"
   292	        )
   293	    if requested_num_stack_levels != LOCKED_NUM_STACK_LEVELS:
   294	        conflicts.append(
   295	            f"AUTOGLUON_NUM_STACK_LEVELS={requested_num_stack_levels} (locked={LOCKED_NUM_STACK_LEVELS})"
   296	        )
   297	    if conflicts:
   298	        raise TrainingContractError(
   299	            "Hard lock violation on ZL AG training contract: "
   300	            + "; ".join(conflicts)
   301	            + ". Set AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_CONTRACT_OVERRIDE=1 only for explicit, approved override runs."
   302	        )
   303	
   304	    return (
   305	        LOCKED_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS,
   306	        LOCKED_PRESET,
   307	        LOCKED_NUM_BAG_FOLDS,
   308	        LOCKED_NUM_STACK_LEVELS,
   309	        selection_mode,
   310	        included_model_types,
   311	        excluded_model_types,
   312	        available_full_zoo,
   313	        training_source,
   314	        True,
   315	        model_selection_lock_enforced,
   316	    )
   317	
   318	
   319	def _git_sha() -> str | None:
   320	    try:
   321	        return subprocess.check_output(["git", "rev-parse", "HEAD"], text=True).strip()
   322	    except Exception:
   323	        return None
   324	
   325	
   326	def _pip_freeze() -> list[str]:
   327	    try:
   328	        output = subprocess.check_output([sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "freeze"], text=True)
   329	        return [line for line in output.splitlines() if line.strip()]
   330	    except Exception:
   331	        return []
   332	
   333	
   334	def _load_training_frame_from_artifacts(*, target_mode: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, dict[int, str]]:
   335	    matrix = read_parquet(matrix_path())
   336	    if matrix.empty:
   337	        raise TrainingContractError("matrix artifact is empty")
   338	
   339	    labels = target_columns(matrix.columns)
   340	    expected_labels = [TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=h) for h in HORIZONS]
   341	    if labels != expected_labels:
   342	        missing = [label for label in expected_labels if label not in labels]
   343	        extra = [label for label in labels if label not in expected_labels]
   344	        raise TrainingContractError(f"unexpected target labels. missing={missing}, extra={extra}")
   345	
   346	    frame = matrix.sort_values("trade_date").reset_index(drop=True)
   347	    if frame.empty:
   348	        raise TrainingContractError("matrix artifact has no training rows")
   349	    if target_mode not in {"price", "returns"}:
   350	        raise TrainingContractError(f"unsupported AUTOGLUON_TARGET_MODE={target_mode!r}")
   351	
   352	    if target_mode == "price":
   353	        for label in expected_labels:
   354	            usable = int(frame[label].notna().sum())
   355	            if usable == 0:
   356	                raise TrainingContractError(f"target label column has no non-null rows: {label}")
   357	        label_map = {horizon: TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=horizon) for horizon in HORIZONS}
   358	        return frame, label_map
   359	
   360	    if "close" not in frame.columns:
   361	        raise TrainingContractError("returns target mode requires close column in matrix artifact")
   362	    close = pd.to_numeric(frame["close"], errors="coerce")
   363	    if (close <= 0).all():
   364	        raise TrainingContractError("returns target mode requires positive close values")
   365	
   366	    label_map: dict[int, str] = {}
   367	    for horizon in HORIZONS:
   368	        price_label = TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=horizon)
   369	        returns_label = f"target_return_{horizon}d"
   370	        frame[returns_label] = pd.to_numeric(frame[price_label], errors="coerce") / close - 1.0
   371	        label_map[horizon] = returns_label
   372	
   373	    for label in label_map.values():
   374	        usable = int(frame[label].notna().sum())
   375	        if usable == 0:
   376	            raise TrainingContractError(f"returns target column has no non-null rows: {label}")
   377	
   378	    return frame, label_map
   379	
   380	
   381	def _validate_local_training_db_url(db_url: str) -> None:
   382	    parsed = urlparse(db_url)
   383	    if parsed.scheme not in {"postgres", "postgresql"}:
   384	        raise TrainingContractError(f"local AG DB URL must be postgres/postgresql, got: {parsed.scheme!r}")
   385	    host = (parsed.hostname or "").lower()
   386	    if host not in {"localhost", "127.0.0.1", "::1"}:
   387	        raise TrainingContractError(
   388	            "local AG DB URL must resolve to localhost/127.0.0.1/::1. "
   389	            + f"got host={host or '<empty>'!r}"
   390	        )
   391	    db_name = (parsed.path or "").lstrip("/")
   392	    if db_name != "fusion":
   393	        raise TrainingContractError(
   394	            "local AG DB URL must target database 'fusion'. "
   395	            + f"got {db_name or '<empty>'!r}"
   396	        )
   397	
   398	
   399	def _load_training_frame_from_local_postgres(*, target_mode: str) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, dict[int, str]]:
   400	    db_url = resolve_local_training_db_url()
   401	    _validate_local_training_db_url(db_url)
   402	
   403	    try:
   404	        with psycopg2.connect(db_url, connect_timeout=10, application_name="fusion_train_local_source") as conn:
   405	            with conn.cursor() as cur:
   406	                cur.execute("SELECT trade_date, feature_snapshot FROM training.matrix_1d ORDER BY trade_date")
   407	                matrix_rows = pd.DataFrame(cur.fetchall(), columns=["trade_date", "feature_snapshot"])
   408	                cur.execute(
   409	                    """
   410	                    SELECT trade_date, target_price_30d, target_price_90d, target_price_180d
   411	                    FROM training.matrix_targets_1d
   412	                    ORDER BY trade_date
   413	                    """
   414	                )
   415	                target_rows = pd.DataFrame(
   416	                    cur.fetchall(),
   417	                    columns=["trade_date", "target_price_30d", "target_price_90d", "target_price_180d"],
   418	                )
   419	    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
   420	        message = str(exc)
