   116	
   117	def _parse_csv(value: str | None, default: tuple[str, ...]) -> tuple[str, ...]:
   118	    if not value:
   119	        return default
   120	    parsed = tuple(item.strip().upper() for item in value.split(",") if item.strip())
   121	    return parsed or default
   122	
   123	
   124	def _parse_float(value: str | None, default: float) -> float:
   125	    if not value:
   126	        return default
   127	    return float(value)
   128	
   129	
   130	def _as_utc_datetime(value: Any) -> datetime | None:
   131	    if value is None:
   132	        return None
   133	    if isinstance(value, datetime):
   134	        return value.astimezone(timezone.utc) if value.tzinfo else value.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   135	    if isinstance(value, date):
   136	        return datetime(value.year, value.month, value.day, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   137	    if isinstance(value, str):
   138	        parsed = pd.to_datetime(value, errors="coerce", utc=True)
   139	        if pd.isna(parsed):
   140	            return None
   141	        return parsed.to_pydatetime()
   142	    return None
   143	
   144	
   145	def _age_hours(value: Any, now_utc: datetime) -> float | None:
   146	    dt = _as_utc_datetime(value)
   147	    if dt is None:
   148	        return None
   149	    return (now_utc - dt).total_seconds() / 3600.0
   150	
   151	
   152	def _age_days(value: Any, now_utc: datetime) -> float | None:
   153	    hours = _age_hours(value, now_utc)
   154	    if hours is None:
   155	        return None
   156	    return hours / 24.0
   157	
   158	
   159	def _ratio(numerator: int, denominator: int) -> float:
   160	    if denominator <= 0:
   161	        return 0.0
   162	    return float(numerator) / float(denominator)
   163	
   164	
   165	def _format_issues(issues: list[str]) -> str:
   166	    if len(issues) <= _ISSUE_PREVIEW_LIMIT:
   167	        return "; ".join(issues)
   168	    shown = "; ".join(issues[:_ISSUE_PREVIEW_LIMIT])
   169	    return f"{shown}; ... {len(issues) - _ISSUE_PREVIEW_LIMIT} more"
   170	
   171	
   172	def _table_exists(cur: Any, *, schema: str, table: str) -> bool:
   173	    cur.execute(
   174	        """
   175	        SELECT EXISTS (
   176	          SELECT 1
   177	          FROM information_schema.tables
   178	          WHERE table_schema = %s AND table_name = %s
   179	        )
   180	        """,
   181	        (schema, table),
   182	    )
   183	    return bool(cur.fetchone()[0])
   184	
   185	
   186	def _column_exists(cur: Any, *, schema: str, table: str, column: str) -> bool:
   187	    cur.execute(
   188	        """
   189	        SELECT EXISTS (
   190	          SELECT 1
   191	          FROM information_schema.columns
   192	          WHERE table_schema = %s AND table_name = %s AND column_name = %s
   193	        )
   194	        """,
   195	        (schema, table, column),
   196	    )
   197	    return bool(cur.fetchone()[0])

   200	def _load_contract() -> TrainingGateContract:
   201	    enforce_parity = os.getenv("TRAINING_ENFORCE_CLOUD_LOCAL_PARITY", "0").strip().lower()
   202	    single_matrix = os.getenv("TRAINING_SINGLE_MATRIX_CONTRACT", "1").strip().lower()

   205	        required_symbols=_parse_csv(
   206	            os.getenv("TRAINING_REQUIRED_SYMBOLS"),
   207	            (),
   208	        ),
   209	        required_fred_series=_parse_csv(
   210	            os.getenv("TRAINING_REQUIRED_FRED_SERIES"),
   211	            (),

   217	        min_matrix_rows=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_MATRIX_ROWS", "500000")),
   218	        min_signal_rows=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_SIGNAL_ROWS", "250")),

   227	        max_factor_age_days=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_FACTOR_AGE_DAYS", "45")),
   228	        max_profarmer_age_days=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_PROFARMER_AGE_DAYS", "10")),
   229	        # Training labels require forward horizon availability; 180-day targets
   230	        # naturally shift max trade_date far behind "today".
   231	        max_training_trade_date_age_days=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_TRADE_DATE_AGE_DAYS", "320")),

   236	        min_signal_keys=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_SIGNAL_KEYS", str(len(SPECIALISTS) * 3))),
   237	        max_specialist_leakage_match_ratio=_parse_float(
   238	            os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_SPECIALIST_LEAKAGE_MATCH_RATIO"),
   239	            0.98,
   240	        ),

   242	            os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_SIGNAL_IDENTITY_RATIO"),
   243	            0.98,
   244	        ),

   246	        max_cloud_local_date_lag_days=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_CLOUD_LOCAL_DATE_LAG_DAYS", "0")),

   260	        require_options_data=require_options in {"1", "true", "yes", "on"},
   261	        min_options_rows=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MIN_OPTIONS_ROWS", "1000")),
   262	        max_options_age_days=int(os.getenv("TRAINING_MAX_OPTIONS_AGE_DAYS", "14")),
   263	    )

   265	
   266	def _check_symbol_table(
   267	    cur: Any,
   268	    *,
   269	    schema: str,
   270	    table: str,
   271	    ts_column: str,
   272	    required_symbols: tuple[str, ...],
   273	    min_rows: int,
   274	    max_age_hours: int | None,
   275	    max_age_days: int | None,
   276	    now_utc: datetime,
   277	) -> tuple[bool, str]:
   278	    query = sql.SQL(
   279	        "SELECT symbol, COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS row_count, MAX({ts_col}) AS latest_ts "
   280	        "FROM {schema_name}.{table_name} "
   281	        "WHERE symbol = ANY(%s) "
   282	        "GROUP BY symbol"
   283	    ).format(
   284	        ts_col=sql.Identifier(ts_column),
   285	        schema_name=sql.Identifier(schema),
   286	        table_name=sql.Identifier(table),
   287	    )
   288	    cur.execute(query, (list(required_symbols),))
   289	    rows = cur.fetchall()
   290	    by_symbol = {row[0].upper(): {"rows": int(row[1]), "latest": row[2]} for row in rows}
   291	    issues: list[str] = []
   292	
   293	    for symbol in required_symbols:
   294	        info = by_symbol.get(symbol)
   295	        if info is None:
   296	            issues.append(f"{symbol}: missing")
   297	            continue
   298	        if info["rows"] < min_rows:
   299	            issues.append(f"{symbol}: rows={info['rows']} (<{min_rows})")
   300	        if max_age_hours is not None:
   301	            age = _age_hours(info["latest"], now_utc)
   302	            if age is None:
   303	                issues.append(f"{symbol}: no latest timestamp")
   304	            elif age > max_age_hours:
   305	                issues.append(f"{symbol}: stale age_hours={age:.1f} (>{max_age_hours})")
   306	        if max_age_days is not None:
   307	            age_days = _age_days(info["latest"], now_utc)
   308	            if age_days is None:
   309	                issues.append(f"{symbol}: no latest timestamp")
   310	            elif age_days > max_age_days:
   311	                issues.append(f"{symbol}: stale age_days={age_days:.1f} (>{max_age_days})")
   312	
   313	    if issues:
   314	        return False, f"{schema}.{table} failed -> " + _format_issues(issues)
   315	    return True, f"{schema}.{table} passed for {len(required_symbols)} symbols"
   316	
   317	
   318	def _check_ohlc_integrity(
   319	    cur: Any,
   320	    *,
   321	    schema: str,
   322	    table: str,
   323	    required_symbols: tuple[str, ...],
   324	    max_violations: int,
   325	) -> tuple[bool, str]:
   326	    query = sql.SQL(
   327	        "SELECT "
   328	        "COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE high < GREATEST(open, close))::BIGINT AS high_violations, "
   329	        "COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE low > LEAST(open, close))::BIGINT AS low_violations "
   330	        "FROM {schema_name}.{table_name} "
   331	        "WHERE symbol = ANY(%s)"
   332	    ).format(
   333	        schema_name=sql.Identifier(schema),
   334	        table_name=sql.Identifier(table),
   335	    )
   336	    cur.execute(query, (list(required_symbols),))
   337	    high_violations, low_violations = cur.fetchone()
   338	    high_violations = int(high_violations or 0)
   339	    low_violations = int(low_violations or 0)
   340	    total = high_violations + low_violations
   341	
   342	    if total > max_violations:
   343	        return (
   344	            False,
   345	            f"{schema}.{table} ohlc violations={total} (high={high_violations}, low={low_violations}, "
   346	            f"max={max_violations})",
   347	        )
   348	    return True, f"{schema}.{table} ohlc violations={total}"
   349	
   350	
   351	def _discover_local_symbols(cur: Any, *, contract: TrainingGateContract) -> tuple[tuple[str, ...], str]:
   352	    if contract.required_symbols:
   353	        return contract.required_symbols, f"env override ({len(contract.required_symbols)} symbols)"
   354	
   355	    if not _table_exists(cur, schema="raw", table="databento_ohlcv_1h"):
   356	        return (), "raw.databento_ohlcv_1h missing"
   357	
   358	    cur.execute(
   359	        """
   360	        SELECT symbol

   569	
   570	def _train_one_horizon(
   571	    frame: pd.DataFrame,
   572	    *,
   573	    horizon: int,
   574	    label: str,
   575	    target_mode: str,
   576	    run_id: str,
   577	    presets: str,
   578	    time_limit: int,
   579	    num_cpus: int,
   580	    min_directional_accuracy: float,
   581	    model_selection_mode: str,
   582	    included_model_types: list[str],
   583	    excluded_model_types: list[str],
   584	    num_bag_folds: int,
   585	    num_stack_levels: int,
   586	) -> dict[str, object]:
   587	    from autogluon.tabular import TabularPredictor
   588	
   589	    train, val, test, split_meta = _split_temporal(frame, label=label, horizon=horizon)
   590	    output_dir = model_artifact_dir(run_id).joinpath(f"horizon_{horizon}d")
   591	    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=False)
   592	
   593	    predictor = TabularPredictor(
   594	        label=label,
   595	        problem_type="regression",
   596	        eval_metric="mae",
   597	        path=str(output_dir),
   598	        verbosity=2,
   599	        log_to_file=True,
   600	    )
   601	    fit_kwargs: dict[str, object] = {
   602	        "train_data": train,
   603	        "tuning_data": val,
   604	        "presets": presets,
   605	        "time_limit": time_limit,
   606	        "num_cpus": num_cpus,
   607	        "ag_args_fit": {"num_gpus": 0},
   608	    }
   609	    if included_model_types:
   610	        fit_kwargs["included_model_types"] = included_model_types
   611	    if excluded_model_types:
   612	        fit_kwargs["excluded_model_types"] = excluded_model_types
   613	    if num_bag_folds >= 2:
   614	        fit_kwargs["num_bag_folds"] = num_bag_folds
   615	        fit_kwargs["num_stack_levels"] = num_stack_levels
   616	        fit_kwargs["use_bag_holdout"] = True
   617	    predictor.fit(**fit_kwargs)
   618	
   619	    leaderboard = predictor.leaderboard(test, silent=True)
   620	    leaderboard_path = output_dir.joinpath("leaderboard.csv")
   621	    leaderboard.to_csv(leaderboard_path, index=False)
   622	
   623	    importance = predictor.feature_importance(data=test, num_shuffle_sets=5)
   624	    importance_path = output_dir.joinpath("feature_importance.csv")
   625	    importance.to_csv(importance_path)
   626	
   627	    predictions = predictor.predict(test.drop(columns=[label]))
   628	    mae = float((predictions - test[label]).abs().mean())
   629	    if target_mode == "returns":
   630	        naive_mae = float(test[label].abs().mean())
   631	    elif "close" in test.columns:
   632	        naive_mae = float((pd.to_numeric(test["close"], errors="coerce") - test[label]).abs().mean())
   633	    else:
   634	        naive_mae = float((test[label].shift(1).fillna(test[label].iloc[0]) - test[label]).abs().mean())
   635	
   636	    if target_mode == "returns":
   637	        predicted_direction = pd.Series(predictions).astype(float).apply(lambda x: 1 if x > 0 else (-1 if x < 0 else 0))
   638	        actual_direction = pd.to_numeric(test[label], errors="coerce").apply(lambda x: 1 if x > 0 else (-1 if x < 0 else 0))
   639	    else:
   640	        if "close" in test.columns:
   641	            baseline = pd.to_numeric(test["close"], errors="coerce")
   642	        else:
   643	            baseline = pd.to_numeric(test[label], errors="coerce").shift(1).fillna(pd.to_numeric(test[label], errors="coerce").iloc[0])
   644	        predicted_direction = (pd.Series(predictions).astype(float) - baseline).apply(lambda x: 1 if x > 0 else (-1 if x < 0 else 0))
   645	        actual_direction = (pd.to_numeric(test[label], errors="coerce") - baseline).apply(lambda x: 1 if x > 0 else (-1 if x < 0 else 0))
   646	
   647	    direction_pairs = pd.DataFrame({"pred": predicted_direction, "actual": actual_direction}).dropna()
   648	    directional_accuracy = float((direction_pairs["pred"] == direction_pairs["actual"]).mean()) if not direction_pairs.empty else 0.0
   649	    passes_accuracy_threshold = directional_accuracy >= min_directional_accuracy
   650	
   651	    summary = {
   652	        "horizon_days": horizon,
   653	        "label": label,
   654	        "eval_metric": "mae",
   655	        "target_mode": target_mode,
   656	        "model_selection_mode": model_selection_mode,
   657	        "included_model_types": included_model_types,
   658	        "excluded_model_types": excluded_model_types,
   659	        "mae": mae,
   660	        "naive_mae": naive_mae,
   661	        "beats_naive": mae < naive_mae,
   662	        "directional_accuracy": directional_accuracy,
   663	        "min_directional_accuracy": min_directional_accuracy,
   664	        "passes_accuracy_threshold": passes_accuracy_threshold,
   665	        "model_path": str(output_dir),
   666	        "leaderboard_path": str(leaderboard_path),
   667	        "feature_importance_path": str(importance_path),
   668	        "split": split_meta,
   669	    }
   670	    output_dir.joinpath("summary.json").write_text(json.dumps(summary, indent=2, sort_keys=True), encoding="utf-8")
   671	    return summary
   672	
   673	
   674	def run(*, dry_run: bool = False, approved: bool = False) -> dict[str, object]:
   675	    readiness = run_training_readiness(dry_run=dry_run)
   676	    cfg = load_config()
   677	    target_mode = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_TARGET_MODE", "price").strip().lower() or "price"
   678	    min_directional_accuracy = _parse_float_env("AUTOGLUON_MIN_DIRECTIONAL_ACCURACY", LOCKED_MIN_DIRECTIONAL_ACCURACY)
   679	    labels = [TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=horizon) for horizon in HORIZONS]
   680	    run_id = f"{cfg.model_version}-{datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ')}-{uuid4().hex[:8]}"
   681	    runtime_guard = _resolve_runtime_guard(dry_run=dry_run)
   682	    num_cpus = _resolve_num_cpus()
   683	    runtime_thread_guard = _apply_runtime_thread_guard(num_cpus=num_cpus)
   684	    openmp_runtime = _resolve_openmp_runtime()
   685	    allow_multiple_openmp = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_MULTIPLE_OPENMP", "0").strip() == "1"
   686	    strict_openmp_guard = os.getenv("AUTOGLUON_STRICT_OPENMP_GUARD", "0").strip() == "1"
   687	    (
   688	        time_limit,
   689	        presets,
   690	        num_bag_folds,
   691	        num_stack_levels,
   692	        model_selection_mode,
   693	        included_model_types,
   694	        excluded_model_types,
   695	        available_full_zoo,
   696	        training_source,
   697	        contract_lock_enforced,
   698	        model_selection_lock_enforced,
   699	    ) = _resolve_training_contract()
   700	    if num_stack_levels > 0 and num_bag_folds < 2:
   701	        raise TrainingContractError("AUTOGLUON_NUM_STACK_LEVELS requires AUTOGLUON_NUM_BAG_FOLDS >= 2")
   702	    if target_mode not in {"price", "returns"}:
   703	        raise TrainingContractError("AUTOGLUON_TARGET_MODE must be 'price' or 'returns'")
   704	    if min_directional_accuracy <= 0 or min_directional_accuracy > 1:
   705	        raise TrainingContractError("AUTOGLUON_MIN_DIRECTIONAL_ACCURACY must be in (0, 1]")
   706	    if (
   707	        not dry_run
   708	        and openmp_runtime.get("detected", False)
   709	        and int(openmp_runtime.get("openmp_library_count", 0)) > 1
   710	        and (
   711	            bool(runtime_guard.get("requires_safe_runtime", False))
   712	            or strict_openmp_guard
   713	        )
   714	        and not allow_multiple_openmp
   715	    ):
   716	        raise TrainingContractError(
   717	            "Multiple OpenMP runtimes detected in process. "
   718	            + f"libraries={openmp_runtime.get('openmp_libraries', [])}. "
   719	            + "This is a known crash risk for full-zoo runs. Align libraries to one OpenMP runtime "
   720	            + "or set AUTOGLUON_ALLOW_MULTIPLE_OPENMP=1 for explicit risk override."
   721	        )
   722	
   723	    if dry_run:
   724	        frame_status: dict[str, object]
   725	        try:
   726	            frame, label_map = _load_training_frame(target_mode=target_mode, training_source=training_source)
   727	            frame_status = {
   728	                "rows": int(len(frame)),
   729	                "feature_columns": len(feature_columns(frame.columns)),
   730	                "target_columns": list(label_map.values()),
   731	                "trade_date_min": str(frame["trade_date"].min()),
   732	                "trade_date_max": str(frame["trade_date"].max()),
   733	            }
   734	        except Exception as exc:
   735	            frame_status = {"training_source_check": "blocked", "error": str(exc)}
   736	
   737	        return {
   738	            "phase": "train",
   739	            "dry_run": True,
   740	            "approved": approved,
   741	            "readiness": readiness,
   742	            "training_frame": frame_status,
   743	            "labels": labels,
   744	            "target_mode": target_mode,
   745	            "model_run_id_example": run_id,
   746	            "presets": presets,
   747	            "time_limit_seconds": time_limit,
   748	            "num_cpus": num_cpus,
   749	            "num_bag_folds": num_bag_folds,
   750	            "num_stack_levels": num_stack_levels,
   751	            "model_selection_mode": model_selection_mode,
   752	            "training_source": training_source,
   753	            "included_model_types": included_model_types,
   754	            "excluded_model_types": excluded_model_types,
   755	            "available_full_zoo_model_types": available_full_zoo,
   756	            "contract_lock_enforced": contract_lock_enforced,
   757	            "model_selection_lock_enforced": model_selection_lock_enforced,
   758	            "min_directional_accuracy": min_directional_accuracy,
   759	            "runtime_guard": runtime_guard,
   760	            "runtime_thread_guard": runtime_thread_guard,
   761	            "openmp_runtime": openmp_runtime,
   762	            "allow_multiple_openmp": allow_multiple_openmp,
   763	            "strict_openmp_guard": strict_openmp_guard,
   764	            "writes": [str(model_artifact_dir(run_id)), str(training_runs_path())],
   765	            "cloud_writes": [],
   766	            "single_matrix_training_contract": True,
   767	            "status": "dry-run",
   768	        }
   769	
   770	    if not approved:
   771	        raise TrainingApprovalError(
   772	            "Training requires explicit approval. Use dry-run or pass approved=True."
   773	        )
   774	    if not readiness.get("ready", False):
   775	        blockers = readiness.get("blockers", [])
   776	        lines = "\n".join(f"- {item}" for item in blockers)
   777	        raise TrainingReadinessError(
   778	            "Training readiness gate failed. Resolve blockers before running train:\n" + lines
   779	        )
   780	    if time_limit <= 0:
   781	        raise TrainingContractError("AUTOGLUON_TIME_LIMIT_SECONDS must be > 0")
   782	
   783	    frame, label_map = _load_training_frame(target_mode=target_mode, training_source=training_source)
   784	    run_dir = model_artifact_dir(run_id)
   785	    run_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=False)
   786	    started_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
   787	
   788	    summaries = [
   789	        _train_one_horizon(
   790	            frame,
   791	            horizon=horizon,
   792	            label=label_map[horizon],
   793	            target_mode=target_mode,
   794	            run_id=run_id,
   795	            presets=presets,
   796	            time_limit=time_limit,
   797	            num_cpus=num_cpus,
   798	            min_directional_accuracy=min_directional_accuracy,
   799	            model_selection_mode=model_selection_mode,
   800	            included_model_types=included_model_types,
   801	            excluded_model_types=excluded_model_types,
   802	            num_bag_folds=num_bag_folds,
   803	            num_stack_levels=num_stack_levels,
   804	        )
   805	        for horizon in HORIZONS
   806	    ]
   807	    failed_accuracy = [item for item in summaries if not item.get("passes_accuracy_threshold", False)]
   808	    accuracy_gate_passed = len(failed_accuracy) == 0
   809	    run_status = "ok" if accuracy_gate_passed else "accuracy-blocked"
   810	
   811	    run_record = {
   812	        "run_id": run_id,
   813	        "model_version": cfg.model_version,
   814	        "started_at": started_at,
   815	        "finished_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
   816	        "git_sha": _git_sha(),
   817	        "matrix_path": str(matrix_path()) if training_source == "parquet_artifacts" else "local_postgres.training.matrix_1d",
   818	        "signals_path": "not_used_single_matrix_contract",
   819	        "model_artifact_dir": str(run_dir),
   820	        "presets": presets,
   821	        "time_limit_seconds": time_limit,
   822	        "num_cpus": num_cpus,
   823	        "target_mode": target_mode,
   824	        "num_bag_folds": num_bag_folds,
   825	        "num_stack_levels": num_stack_levels,
   826	        "model_selection_mode": model_selection_mode,
   827	        "training_source": training_source,
   828	        "included_model_types": included_model_types,
   829	        "excluded_model_types": excluded_model_types,
   830	        "contract_lock_enforced": contract_lock_enforced,
   831	        "model_selection_lock_enforced": model_selection_lock_enforced,
   832	        "min_directional_accuracy": min_directional_accuracy,
   833	        "accuracy_gate_passed": accuracy_gate_passed,
   834	        "failed_accuracy_horizons": [item["horizon_days"] for item in failed_accuracy],
   835	        "runtime_guard": runtime_guard,
   836	        "runtime_thread_guard": runtime_thread_guard,
   837	        "openmp_runtime": openmp_runtime,
   838	        "allow_multiple_openmp": allow_multiple_openmp,
   839	        "strict_openmp_guard": strict_openmp_guard,
   840	        "status": run_status,
   841	        "horizons": summaries,
   842	        "pip_freeze": _pip_freeze(),
   843	        "single_matrix_training_contract": True,
   844	    }
   845	    run_dir.joinpath("training_run.json").write_text(json.dumps(run_record, indent=2, sort_keys=True), encoding="utf-8")
   846	
   847	    run_history_row = {
   848	        "run_id": run_id,
   849	        "model_version": cfg.model_version,
   850	        "started_at": run_record["started_at"],
   851	        "finished_at": run_record["finished_at"],
   852	        "git_sha": run_record["git_sha"],
   853	        "matrix_path": run_record["matrix_path"],
   854	        "signals_path": run_record["signals_path"],
   855	        "model_artifact_dir": run_record["model_artifact_dir"],
   856	        "presets": presets,
   857	        "time_limit_seconds": time_limit,
   858	        "num_cpus": num_cpus,
   859	        "target_mode": target_mode,
   860	        "num_bag_folds": num_bag_folds,
   861	        "num_stack_levels": num_stack_levels,
   862	        "model_selection_mode": model_selection_mode,
   863	        "training_source": training_source,
   864	        "included_model_types": json.dumps(included_model_types, separators=(",", ":")),
   865	        "excluded_model_types": json.dumps(excluded_model_types, separators=(",", ":")),
   866	        "contract_lock_enforced": contract_lock_enforced,
   867	        "model_selection_lock_enforced": model_selection_lock_enforced,
   868	        "min_directional_accuracy": min_directional_accuracy,
   869	        "accuracy_gate_passed": accuracy_gate_passed,
   870	        "failed_accuracy_horizons": json.dumps(
   871	            [item["horizon_days"] for item in failed_accuracy], separators=(",", ":")
   872	        ),
   873	        "status": run_status,
   874	        "horizons": json.dumps(summaries, separators=(",", ":"), sort_keys=True),
   875	    }
   876	    existing = pd.read_parquet(training_runs_path()) if training_runs_path().exists() else pd.DataFrame()
   877	    updated = pd.concat([existing, pd.DataFrame([run_history_row])], ignore_index=True)
   878	    write_parquet(updated, training_runs_path())
   879	    if not accuracy_gate_passed:
   880	        details = ", ".join(
   881	            [
   882	                f"{item['horizon_days']}d={item['directional_accuracy']:.3f}"
   883	                for item in failed_accuracy
   884	            ]
   885	        )
   886	        raise TrainingContractError(
   887	            "Directional accuracy gate failed. "
   888	            + f"minimum={min_directional_accuracy:.3f}, failed={details}. "
   889	            + "Artifacts and run metadata were saved for forensic review."
   890	        )
   891	
   892	    return {
   893	        "phase": "train",
   894	        "dry_run": False,
   895	        "approved": approved,
   896	        "readiness": readiness,
   897	        "run_id": run_id,
   898	        "writes": [str(run_dir), str(training_runs_path())],
   899	        "cloud_writes": [],
   900	        "status": run_status,
   901	        "runtime_guard": runtime_guard,
   902	        "runtime_thread_guard": runtime_thread_guard,
   903	        "openmp_runtime": openmp_runtime,
   904	        "allow_multiple_openmp": allow_multiple_openmp,
   905	        "strict_openmp_guard": strict_openmp_guard,
   906	        "num_cpus": num_cpus,
   907	        "model_selection_mode": model_selection_mode,
   908	        "training_source": training_source,
   909	        "included_model_types": included_model_types,
   910	        "excluded_model_types": excluded_model_types,
   911	        "available_full_zoo_model_types": available_full_zoo,
   912	        "min_directional_accuracy": min_directional_accuracy,
   913	        "accuracy_gate_passed": accuracy_gate_passed,
   914	        "single_matrix_training_contract": True,
   915	        "horizons": summaries,
   916	    }

     1	from __future__ import annotations
     2	
     3	import argparse
     4	import json
     5	from datetime import datetime, timezone
     6	from typing import Any
     7	
     8	import pandas as pd
     9	import psycopg2
    10	from psycopg2 import sql as pgsql
    11	from psycopg2.extras import execute_values
    12	
    13	from .artifacts import (
    14	    assert_no_target_columns,
    15	    feature_columns,
    16	    matrix_path,
    17	    read_parquet,
    18	    signals_path,
    19	    specialist_features_path,
    20	    target_columns,
    21	)
    22	from .config import SPECIALISTS, resolve_cloud_db_url
    23	
    24	
    25	class PromotionApprovalError(RuntimeError):
    26	    pass
    27	
    28	
    29	def _json_from_row(row: pd.Series, *, exclude: set[str]) -> str:
    30	    payload: dict[str, Any] = {}
    31	    for key, value in row.items():
    32	        if key in exclude:
    33	            continue
    34	        if pd.isna(value):
    35	            continue
    36	        if isinstance(value, (pd.Timestamp, datetime)):
    37	            payload[key] = value.isoformat()
    38	        elif hasattr(value, "item"):
    39	            payload[key] = value.item()
    40	        else:
    41	            payload[key] = value
    42	    return json.dumps(payload, separators=(",", ":"), sort_keys=True)
    43	
    44	
    45	def _validate_matrix() -> pd.DataFrame:
    46	    matrix = read_parquet(matrix_path())
    47	    labels = target_columns(matrix.columns)
    48	    if not labels:
    49	        raise RuntimeError("matrix artifact has no target label columns")
    50	    features = feature_columns(matrix.columns)
    51	    if not features:
    52	        raise RuntimeError("matrix artifact has no feature columns")
    53	    for label in labels:
    54	        series = pd.to_numeric(matrix[label], errors="coerce")
    55	        null_count = int(series.isna().sum())
    56	        try:
    57	            horizon = int(label.replace("target_price_", "").replace("d", ""))
    58	        except ValueError:
    59	            horizon = 0
    60	        if null_count > horizon:
    61	            raise RuntimeError(f"{label} NULL rows={null_count} (>horizon={horizon})")
    62	        if null_count > 0:
    63	            null_positions = series[series.isna()].index.to_list()
    64	            trailing = list(range(len(series) - null_count, len(series)))
    65	            if null_positions != trailing:
    66	                raise RuntimeError(f"{label} NULL rows are not trailing-only")
    67	    return matrix
    68	
    69	
    70	def _validate_specialist(specialist: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    71	    frame = read_parquet(specialist_features_path(specialist))
    72	    if frame.empty:
    73	        raise RuntimeError(f"specialist artifact is empty: {specialist}")
    74	    assert_no_target_columns(frame, context=f"{specialist} promotion artifact")
    75	    return frame
    76	
    77	
    78	def _validate_signals() -> pd.DataFrame:
    79	    signals = read_parquet(signals_path())
    80	    if signals.empty:
    81	        raise RuntimeError("specialist signals artifact is empty")
    82	    assert_no_target_columns(signals, context="signals promotion artifact")
    83	    expected = len(SPECIALISTS) * 3
    84	    actual = len([column for column in signals.columns if column != "trade_date"])
    85	    if actual != expected:
    86	        raise RuntimeError(f"specialist signals column count={actual}, expected={expected}")
    87	    return signals
    88	
    89	
    90	def _promote_matrix(cur: Any, matrix: pd.DataFrame) -> int:
    91	    excluded = {"trade_date", *target_columns(matrix.columns)}
    92	    rows = [
    93	        (row["trade_date"], _json_from_row(row, exclude=excluded))
    94	        for _, row in matrix.iterrows()
    95	    ]
    96	    cur.execute("TRUNCATE TABLE training.matrix_1d")
    97	    execute_values(
    98	        cur,
    99	        """
   100	        INSERT INTO training.matrix_1d (trade_date, feature_snapshot, created_at, ingested_at)
   101	        VALUES %s
   102	        """,
   103	        rows,
   104	        template="(%s, %s::jsonb, NOW(), NOW())",
   105	        page_size=1000,
   106	    )
   107	    return len(rows)
   108	
   109	
   110	def _promote_specialist(cur: Any, specialist: str, frame: pd.DataFrame) -> int:
   111	    rows = [
   112	        (row["trade_date"], _json_from_row(row, exclude={"trade_date"}))
   113	        for _, row in frame.iterrows()
   114	    ]
   115	    table_id = pgsql.Identifier("training", f"specialist_features_{specialist}")
   116	    cur.execute(pgsql.SQL("TRUNCATE TABLE {}").format(table_id))
   117	    execute_values(
   118	        cur,
   119	        pgsql.SQL(
   120	            "INSERT INTO {} (trade_date, feature_payload, created_at, ingested_at) VALUES %s"
   121	        ).format(table_id),
   122	        rows,
   123	        template="(%s, %s::jsonb, NOW(), NOW())",
   124	        page_size=1000,
   125	    )
   126	    return len(rows)
   127	
   128	
   129	def _promote_signals(cur: Any, signals: pd.DataFrame) -> int:
   130	    rows = [
   131	        (row["trade_date"], _json_from_row(row, exclude={"trade_date"}))
   132	        for _, row in signals.iterrows()
   133	    ]
   134	    cur.execute("TRUNCATE TABLE training.specialist_signals_1d")
   135	    execute_values(
   136	        cur,
   137	        """
   138	        INSERT INTO training.specialist_signals_1d (trade_date, signal_payload, created_at, ingested_at)
   139	        VALUES %s
   140	        """,
   141	        rows,
   142	        template="(%s, %s::jsonb, NOW(), NOW())",
   143	        page_size=1000,
   144	    )
   145	    return len(rows)
   146	
   147	
   148	def run(*, dry_run: bool = True, approved: bool = False) -> dict[str, object]:
   149	    matrix = _validate_matrix()
   150	    specialists = {specialist: _validate_specialist(specialist) for specialist in SPECIALISTS}
   151	    signals = _validate_signals()
   152	
   153	    payload: dict[str, object] = {
   154	        "phase": "promote",
   155	        "dry_run": dry_run,
   156	        "approved": approved,
   157	        "reads": [
   158	            str(matrix_path()),
   159	            str(signals_path()),
   160	            *[str(specialist_features_path(specialist)) for specialist in SPECIALISTS],
   161	        ],
   162	        "writes": ["training.matrix_1d", "training.specialist_signals_1d", *[f"training.specialist_features_{s}" for s in SPECIALISTS]],
   163	        "target_columns_stripped_from_matrix_payload": target_columns(matrix.columns),
   164	        "matrix_rows": int(len(matrix)),
   165	        "signal_rows": int(len(signals)),
   166	        "specialist_rows": {specialist: int(len(frame)) for specialist, frame in specialists.items()},
   167	        "status": "dry-run" if dry_run else "pending",
   168	    }
   169	
   170	    if dry_run:
   171	        return payload
   172	    if not approved:
   173	        raise PromotionApprovalError("Cloud promotion requires explicit approval. Pass approved=True or --execute.")
   174	
   175	    db_url = resolve_cloud_db_url()
   176	    if not db_url:
   177	        raise RuntimeError(
   178	            "Cloud DB URL is not set. Configure DATABASE_URL, SUPABASE_DB_URL, POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING, or SUPABASE_POOLER_URL."
   179	        )
   180	
   181	    with psycopg2.connect(db_url, connect_timeout=10, application_name="fusion_promote_to_cloud") as conn:
   182	        with conn.cursor() as cur:
   183	            promoted = {
   184	                "training.matrix_1d": _promote_matrix(cur, matrix),
   185	                "training.specialist_signals_1d": _promote_signals(cur, signals),
   186	            }
   187	            for specialist, frame in specialists.items():
   188	                promoted[f"training.specialist_features_{specialist}"] = _promote_specialist(cur, specialist, frame)
   189	
   190	    payload["status"] = "ok"
   191	    payload["promoted_rows"] = promoted
   192	    payload["promoted_at"] = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
   193	    return payload
   194	
   195	
   196	def main() -> None:
   197	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Validate and promote local V16 training artifacts to cloud Supabase")
   198	    parser.add_argument("--dry-run", action="store_true", default=True, help="Validate local artifacts without cloud writes")
   199	    parser.add_argument("--execute", action="store_true", help="Perform approved cloud promotion")
   200	    args = parser.parse_args()
   201	
   202	    result = run(dry_run=not args.execute, approved=args.execute)
   203	    print(result)
   204	
   205	
   206	if __name__ == "__main__":
   207	    main()

     7	        "dry_run": dry_run,
     8	        "writes": ["forecasts.target_zones"],
     9	        "status": "scaffold",

   137	
   138	def _safe_name(value: Any) -> str:
   139	    cleaned = re.sub(r"[^0-9a-zA-Z]+", "_", str(value).strip().lower()).strip("_")
   140	    return cleaned or "unknown"
   141	
   142	
   143	def _read_daily_series(
   144	    conn: Any,
   145	    *,
   146	    table: str,
   147	    prefix: str,
   148	    limit_series: int | None = None,
   149	    align_dates: pd.Series | None = None,
   150	    fill_to_calendar: bool = False,
   151	) -> pd.DataFrame:
   152	    series_filter = ""
   153	    if limit_series is not None:
   154	        series_filter = f"""
   155	        WHERE series_id IN (
   156	          SELECT series_id
   157	          FROM {table}
   158	          GROUP BY series_id
   159	          ORDER BY MAX(observation_date) DESC, COUNT(*) DESC, series_id
   160	          LIMIT {int(limit_series)}
   161	        )
   162	        """
   163	
   164	    query = f"""
   165	    SELECT observation_date::date AS trade_date, series_id, value::numeric AS value
   166	    FROM {table}
   167	    {series_filter}
   168	    ORDER BY observation_date, series_id
   169	    """
   170	    frame = pd.read_sql_query(query, conn)
   171	    if frame.empty:
   172	        return pd.DataFrame(columns=["trade_date"])
   173	
   174	    frame["trade_date"] = pd.to_datetime(frame["trade_date"]).dt.date
   175	    frame["series_id"] = frame["series_id"].map(lambda item: f"{prefix}_{_safe_name(item)}")
   176	    frame["value"] = pd.to_numeric(frame["value"], errors="coerce")
   177	    pivot = frame.pivot_table(index="trade_date", columns="series_id", values="value", aggfunc="last")
   178	    pivot = pivot.reset_index().sort_values("trade_date")
   179	    if align_dates is not None:
   180	        calendar = (
   181	            pd.DataFrame({"trade_date": pd.to_datetime(align_dates, errors="coerce").dt.date})
   182	            .dropna(subset=["trade_date"])
   183	            .drop_duplicates()
   184	            .sort_values("trade_date")
   185	        )
   186	        if not calendar.empty:
   187	            pivot = calendar.merge(pivot, on="trade_date", how="left").sort_values("trade_date")
   188	            if fill_to_calendar:
   189	                value_cols = [column for column in pivot.columns if column != "trade_date"]
   190	                if value_cols:
   191	                    # Backfill with nearest real observations only; no synthetic constants.
   192	                    pivot[value_cols] = pivot[value_cols].ffill().bfill()
   193	    return pivot
   194	
   195	
   196	def _read_event_frame(conn: Any, *, table: str, date_column: str, prefix: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
   197	    query = f"""
   198	    SELECT
   199	      t.{date_column}::date AS event_date,
   200	      COALESCE(to_jsonb(t)->>'title', '') AS title,
   201	      COALESCE(to_jsonb(t)->>'source', '') AS source,
   202	      COALESCE(to_jsonb(t)->>'specialist_tags', '') AS specialist_tags,
   203	      COALESCE(to_jsonb(t)->>'url', '') AS url
   204	    FROM {table} t
   205	    WHERE t.{date_column} IS NOT NULL
   206	    ORDER BY t.{date_column}
   207	    """
   208	    frame = pd.read_sql_query(query, conn)
   209	    if frame.empty:
   210	        return pd.DataFrame(columns=["event_date", "search_text", "prefix"])
   211	    frame["event_date"] = pd.to_datetime(frame["event_date"]).dt.date
   212	    frame["search_text"] = (
   213	        frame["title"].fillna("")
   214	        + " "
   215	        + frame["source"].fillna("")
   216	        + " "
   217	        + frame["specialist_tags"].fillna("")
   218	    ).str.lower()
   219	    if table == "alt.profarmer_news":
   220	        title_clean = frame["title"].fillna("").str.strip().str.lower()
     1	from __future__ import annotations
     2	
     3	import math
     4	
     5	import pandas as pd
     6	
     7	from .artifacts import (
     8	    assert_no_target_columns,
     9	    numeric_feature_columns,
    10	    signals_path,
    11	    specialist_features_path,
    12	    write_parquet,
    13	)

    16	
    17	def _bounded_tanh(value: float, scale: float = 1.0) -> float:
    18	    if pd.isna(value):
    19	        return 0.0
    20	    return max(-1.0, min(1.0, math.tanh(float(value) * scale)))
    21	
    22	
    23	def _rolling_zscore(series: pd.Series, *, window: int = 252) -> pd.Series:
    24	    numeric = pd.to_numeric(series, errors="coerce")
    25	    mean = numeric.rolling(window=window, min_periods=20).mean()
    26	    std = numeric.rolling(window=window, min_periods=20).std(ddof=0)
    27	    z = (numeric - mean) / std.replace(0, pd.NA)
    28	    return z.clip(-5, 5).fillna(0.0)
    29	
    30	
    31	def _family_columns(columns: list[str], tokens: tuple[str, ...]) -> list[str]:
    32	    return [column for column in columns if any(token in column for token in tokens)]
    33	
    34	
    35	def _signal_from_columns(frame: pd.DataFrame, columns: list[str], *, scale: float) -> pd.Series:
    36	    if not columns:
    37	        return pd.Series(0.0, index=frame.index)
    38	    zscores = [_rolling_zscore(frame[column]) for column in columns]
    39	    combined = pd.concat(zscores, axis=1).mean(axis=1)
    40	    return combined.map(lambda value: _bounded_tanh(value, scale=scale))
    41	
    42	
    43	def _build_specialist_signal(specialist: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    44	    frame = pd.read_parquet(specialist_features_path(specialist))
    45	    if frame.empty:
    46	        raise RuntimeError(f"specialist feature parquet is empty: {specialist}")
    47	    assert_no_target_columns(frame, context=f"{specialist} signal input")
    48	
    49	    frame = frame.sort_values("trade_date").reset_index(drop=True)
    50	    numeric_cols = numeric_feature_columns(frame)
    51	    short_cols = _family_columns(numeric_cols, ("ret_20d", "ret_30d", "count_30d", "vol_", "std_20"))
    52	    long_cols = _family_columns(numeric_cols, ("ret_90d", "ret_180d", "count_90d", "activity_", "weather_", "std_60"))
    53	
    54	    if not short_cols:
    55	        short_cols = numeric_cols[: max(1, min(5, len(numeric_cols)))]
    56	    if not long_cols:
    57	        long_cols = numeric_cols[-max(1, min(5, len(numeric_cols))) :]
    58	
    59	    sig_1 = _signal_from_columns(frame, short_cols, scale=0.75)
    60	    sig_2 = _signal_from_columns(frame, long_cols, scale=0.55)
    61	
    62	    observed_ratio = frame[numeric_cols].notna().mean(axis=1) if numeric_cols else pd.Series(0.0, index=frame.index)
    63	    confidence = (observed_ratio * 0.65 + (sig_1.abs() + sig_2.abs()) * 0.175).clip(0, 1)
    64	
    65	    return pd.DataFrame(
    66	        {
    67	            "trade_date": pd.to_datetime(frame["trade_date"]).dt.date,
    68	            f"sig_{specialist}_1": sig_1.round(8),
    69	            f"sig_{specialist}_2": sig_2.round(8),
    70	            f"sig_{specialist}_conf": confidence.round(8),
    71	        }
    72	    )
    73	
    74	
    75	def run(*, dry_run: bool = False) -> dict[str, object]:
    76	    output_path = signals_path()
    77	    input_paths = [specialist_features_path(specialist) for specialist in SPECIALISTS]
    78	    if dry_run:
    79	        return {
    80	            "phase": "specialist-signals",
    81	            "dry_run": True,
    82	            "reads": [str(path) for path in input_paths],
    83	            "writes": [str(output_path)],
    84	            "cloud_writes": [],
    85	            "status": "dry-run",
    86	        }
    87	
    88	    merged: pd.DataFrame | None = None
    89	    for specialist in SPECIALISTS:
    90	        specialist_signal = _build_specialist_signal(specialist)
    91	        merged = specialist_signal if merged is None else merged.merge(specialist_signal, on="trade_date", how="inner")
    92	
    93	    if merged is None or merged.empty:
    94	        raise RuntimeError("no aligned specialist signal rows were produced")
    95	
    96	    assert_no_target_columns(merged, context="specialist signal output")
    97	    write_parquet(merged, output_path)
    98	
    99	    signal_columns = [column for column in merged.columns if column != "trade_date"]
   100	    return {
   101	        "phase": "specialist-signals",
   102	        "dry_run": False,
   103	        "reads": [str(path) for path in input_paths],
   104	        "writes": [str(output_path)],
   105	        "cloud_writes": [],
   106	        "status": "ok",
   107	        "rows_written": int(len(merged)),
   108	        "signal_columns": len(signal_columns),
   109	        "trade_date_min": str(merged["trade_date"].min()),
   110	        "trade_date_max": str(merged["trade_date"].max()),
   111	    }

     4	from typing import Any
     5	
     6	import pandas as pd

     8

    10	from .config import HORIZONS, TARGET_TEMPLATE, resolve_cloud_db_url

    12	
    13	_MATRIX_SQL = """
    14	WITH
    15	zl AS (
    16	  SELECT
    17	    bucket_ts::date AS trade_date,
    18	    open::numeric AS open,
    19	    high::numeric AS high,
    20	    low::numeric AS low,
    21	    close::numeric AS close,
    22	    volume::numeric AS volume
    23	  FROM mkt.price_1d
    24	  WHERE symbol = 'ZL'
    25	),
    26	zs AS (
    27	  SELECT bucket_ts::date AS trade_date, close::numeric AS close
    28	  FROM mkt.price_1d
    29	  WHERE symbol = 'ZS'
    30	),
    31	zm AS (
    32	  SELECT bucket_ts::date AS trade_date, close::numeric AS close
    33	  FROM mkt.price_1d
    34	  WHERE symbol = 'ZM'
    35	),
    36	cl AS (
    37	  SELECT bucket_ts::date AS trade_date, close::numeric AS close
    38	  FROM mkt.price_1d
    39	  WHERE symbol = 'CL'
    40	),
    41	joined AS (
    42	  SELECT
    43	    z.trade_date,
    44	    z.open,
    45	    z.high,
    46	    z.low,
    47	    z.close,
    48	    z.volume,
    49	    zs.close AS zs_close,
    50	    zm.close AS zm_close,
    51	    cl.close AS cl_close
    52	  FROM zl z
    53	  LEFT JOIN zs USING (trade_date)
    54	  LEFT JOIN zm USING (trade_date)
    55	  LEFT JOIN cl USING (trade_date)
    56	),
    57	features AS (
    58	  SELECT
    59	    trade_date,
    60	    open,
    61	    high,
    62	    low,
    63	    close,
    64	    volume,
    65	    zs_close,
    66	    zm_close,
    67	    cl_close,
    68	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 1) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_1d,
    69	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 5) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_5d,
    70	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 10) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_10d,
    71	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 20) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_20d,
    72	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 30) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_30d,
    73	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 60) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_60d,
    74	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 90) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_90d,
    75	    (close / NULLIF(LAG(close, 180) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS ret_180d,
    76	    (volume / NULLIF(LAG(volume, 1) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS vol_chg_1d,
    77	    (volume / NULLIF(LAG(volume, 5) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date), 0)) - 1 AS vol_chg_5d,
    78	    AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 49 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_50,
    79	    AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 99 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_100,
    80	    AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 199 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_200,
    81	    STDDEV_SAMP(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS std_20,
    82	    STDDEV_SAMP(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS std_60,
    83	    close - AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 19 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS mean_revert_20,
    84	    close - AVG(close) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS BETWEEN 49 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS mean_revert_50,
    85	    close - COALESCE(zs_close, close) AS spread_zl_zs,
    86	    close - COALESCE(zm_close, close) AS spread_zl_zm,
    87	    close - COALESCE(cl_close, close) AS spread_zl_cl,
    88	    close / NULLIF(zs_close, 0) AS ratio_zl_zs,
    89	    close / NULLIF(zm_close, 0) AS ratio_zl_zm,
    90	    close / NULLIF(cl_close, 0) AS ratio_zl_cl,
    91	    CASE
    92	      WHEN zs_close IS NULL OR zm_close IS NULL THEN NULL
    93	      ELSE (0.022 * zm_close) + (11.0 * (close / 100.0)) - (zs_close / 100.0)
    94	    END AS crush_margin_board,
    95	    CASE
    96	      WHEN zs_close IS NULL OR zm_close IS NULL THEN NULL
    97	      ELSE (
    98	        (
    99	          (0.022 * zm_close) + (11.0 * (close / 100.0)) - (zs_close / 100.0)
   100	        ) - LAG((0.022 * zm_close) + (11.0 * (close / 100.0)) - (zs_close / 100.0), 20) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date)
   101	      )
   102	    END AS crush_margin_chg_20d,
   103	    CASE
   104	      WHEN zs_close IS NULL OR zm_close IS NULL THEN NULL
   105	      ELSE ((11.0 * (close / 100.0)) / NULLIF((0.022 * zm_close) + (11.0 * (close / 100.0)), 0)) * 100.0
   106	    END AS crush_oil_share_pct,
   107	    LEAD(close, 30) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date) AS target_price_30d,
   108	    LEAD(close, 90) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date) AS target_price_90d,
   109	    LEAD(close, 180) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date) AS target_price_180d
   110	  FROM joined
   111	)
   112	SELECT *
   113	FROM features
   114	WHERE ret_1d IS NOT NULL
   115	  AND ret_5d IS NOT NULL
   116	  AND ret_10d IS NOT NULL
   117	  AND ret_20d IS NOT NULL
   118	  AND ret_30d IS NOT NULL
   119	  AND ret_60d IS NOT NULL
   120	  AND ret_90d IS NOT NULL
   121	  AND ret_180d IS NOT NULL
   122	  AND ma_50 IS NOT NULL
   123	  AND ma_100 IS NOT NULL
   124	  AND ma_200 IS NOT NULL
   125	  AND std_20 IS NOT NULL
   126	  AND std_60 IS NOT NULL
   127	ORDER BY trade_date;
   128	"""
   129	
   130	
   131	def _to_float(value: Any) -> float | None:
   132	    if value is None:
   133	        return None
   134	    if isinstance(value, Decimal):
   135	        return float(value)
   136	    if isinstance(value, (int, float)):
   137	        return float(value)
   138	    return float(value)
   139	
   140	
   141	def _normalize_matrix(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
   142	    if df.empty:
   143	        raise RuntimeError("matrix build returned 0 rows")
   144	
   145	    df = df.copy()
   146	    df["trade_date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["trade_date"]).dt.date
   147	
   148	    for column in df.columns:
   149	        if column == "trade_date":
   150	            continue
   151	        df[column] = df[column].map(_to_float).astype("float64")
   152	
   153	    expected_targets = [TARGET_TEMPLATE.format(h=h) for h in HORIZONS]
   154	    missing_targets = [column for column in expected_targets if column not in df.columns]
   155	    if missing_targets:
   156	        raise RuntimeError(f"matrix is missing target columns: {', '.join(missing_targets)}")
   157	
   158	    feature_cols = feature_columns(df.columns)
   159	    label_cols = target_columns(df.columns)
   160	    if not feature_cols:
   161	        raise RuntimeError("matrix has no non-target feature columns")
   162	    return df[["trade_date", *feature_cols, *label_cols]]
   163	
   164	
   165	def run(*, dry_run: bool = False) -> dict[str, object]:
   166	    output_path = matrix_path()
   167	    if dry_run:
   168	        return {
   169	            "phase": "matrix",
   170	            "dry_run": True,
   171	            "reads": ["mkt.price_1d"],
   172	            "writes": [str(output_path)],
   173	            "cloud_writes": [],
   174	            "status": "dry-run",
   175	        }
   176	
   177	    db_url = resolve_cloud_db_url()
   178	    if not db_url:
   179	        raise RuntimeError(
   180	            "Cloud DB URL is not set. Configure DATABASE_URL, SUPABASE_DB_URL, POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING, or SUPABASE_POOLER_URL."
   181	        )
   182	
   183	    with psycopg2.connect(db_url, connect_timeout=10, application_name="fusion_build_matrix") as conn:
   184	        df = pd.read_sql_query(_MATRIX_SQL, conn)
   185	
   186	    matrix = _normalize_matrix(df)
   187	    write_parquet(matrix, output_path)
   188	
   189	    return {
   190	        "phase": "matrix",
   191	        "dry_run": False,
   192	        "reads": ["mkt.price_1d"],
   193	        "writes": [str(output_path)],
   194	        "cloud_writes": [],
   195	        "status": "ok",
   196	        "rows_written": int(len(matrix)),
   197	        "feature_columns": len(feature_columns(matrix.columns)),
   198	        "target_columns": target_columns(matrix.columns),
   199	        "target_non_null_counts": {
   200	            column: int(matrix[column].notna().sum()) for column in target_columns(matrix.columns)
   201	        },
   202	        "target_null_counts": {
   203	            column: int(matrix[column].isna().sum()) for column in target_columns(matrix.columns)
   204	        },
   205	        "trade_date_min": str(matrix["trade_date"].min()),
   206	        "trade_date_max": str(matrix["trade_date"].max()),
   207	    }

   240	                f"{prefix}_{specialist}_days_since_latest": pd.NA,
   241	            }
   242	        )
   243	
   244	    aliases = _TAG_ALIASES[specialist]
   245	    pattern = "|".join(re.escape(alias) for alias in aliases)
   246	    matched = events[events["search_text"].str.contains(pattern, regex=True, na=False)].copy()
   247	    if matched.empty:
   248	        return dates.assign(
   249	            **{
   250	                f"{prefix}_{specialist}_count_30d": 0.0,
   251	                f"{prefix}_{specialist}_count_90d": 0.0,
   252	                f"{prefix}_{specialist}_days_since_latest": pd.NA,
   253	            }
   254	        )
   255	
   256	    counts = matched.groupby("event_date").size().rename("count").sort_index()
   257	    full_index = pd.Index(dates["trade_date"], name="trade_date")
   258	    daily = counts.reindex(full_index, fill_value=0).astype(float)
   259	    out = pd.DataFrame({"trade_date": full_index})
   260	    out[f"{prefix}_{specialist}_count_30d"] = daily.rolling(30, min_periods=1).sum().to_numpy()
   261	    out[f"{prefix}_{specialist}_count_90d"] = daily.rolling(90, min_periods=1).sum().to_numpy()
   262	
   263	    latest_seen: list[float | None] = []
   264	    matched_dates = sorted(pd.to_datetime(matched["event_date"]).dt.date.unique())
   265	    cursor = -1
   266	    for trade_date in full_index:
   267	        while cursor + 1 < len(matched_dates) and matched_dates[cursor + 1] <= trade_date:
   268	            cursor += 1
   269	        if cursor < 0:
   270	            latest_seen.append(None)
   271	        else:
   272	            latest_seen.append(float((trade_date - matched_dates[cursor]).days))
   273	    out[f"{prefix}_{specialist}_days_since_latest"] = latest_seen
   274	    return out

   276	
   277	def _merge_context(base: pd.DataFrame, context: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
   278	    if context.empty or list(context.columns) == ["trade_date"]:
   279	        return base
   280	    left = base.sort_values("trade_date")
   281	    right = context.sort_values("trade_date")
   282	    return pd.merge_asof(left, right, on="trade_date", direction="backward")
   283	
   284	
   285	def _source_context(conn: Any, matrix_dates: pd.Series) -> dict[str, pd.DataFrame]:
   286	    contexts: dict[str, pd.DataFrame] = {
   287	        "rates": _read_daily_series(conn, table="econ.rates_1d", prefix="rates"),
   288	        "commodities": _read_daily_series(conn, table="econ.commodities_1d", prefix="commodities"),
   289	        "vol": _read_daily_series(conn, table="econ.vol_indices_1d", prefix="vol"),
   290	        "activity": _read_daily_series(conn, table="econ.activity_1d", prefix="activity"),
   291	        "weather": _read_daily_series(
   292	            conn,
   293	            table="econ.weather_1d",
   294	            prefix="weather",
   295	            limit_series=12,
   296	            align_dates=matrix_dates,
   297	            fill_to_calendar=True,
   298	        ),
   299	    }
   300	
   301	    event_sources = [
   302	        _read_event_frame(conn, table="alt.profarmer_news", date_column="published_at", prefix="profarmer"),
   303	        _read_event_frame(conn, table="alt.news_events", date_column="published_at", prefix="news"),
   304	        _read_event_frame(conn, table="alt.legislation_1d", date_column="published_at", prefix="legislation"),
   305	        _read_event_frame(conn, table="alt.fed_speeches", date_column="published_at", prefix="fed_speech"),
   306	        _read_event_frame(conn, table="alt.executive_actions", date_column="published_at", prefix="executive"),
   307	    ]
   308	
   309	    for source_events in event_sources:
   310	        if source_events.empty:
   311	            continue
   312	        prefix = str(source_events["prefix"].iloc[0])
   313	        for specialist in SPECIALISTS:
   314	            contexts[f"{prefix}_{specialist}"] = _event_features(
   315	                matrix_dates,
   316	                source_events,
   317	                specialist=specialist,
   318	                prefix=prefix,
   319	            )
   320	
   321	    return contexts
   322	
   323	
   324	def _select_columns(frame: pd.DataFrame, specialist: str) -> list[str]:
   325	    selected = ["trade_date"]
   326	    market_cols = [*_COMMON_MARKET_COLUMNS, *_SPECIALIST_MARKET_COLUMNS[specialist]]
   327	    for column in market_cols:
   328	        if column in frame.columns and column not in selected:
   329	            selected.append(column)
   330	
   331	    patterns = _SPECIALIST_SOURCE_PATTERNS[specialist]
   332	    for column in frame.columns:
   333	        if column in selected or column == "specialist":
   334	            continue
   335	        if any(column.startswith(pattern) for pattern in patterns):
   336	            selected.append(column)
   337	
   338	    return selected
   339	
   340	
   341	def _validate_symbol_ownership_for_specialist(*, specialist: str, columns: list[str]) -> None:
   342	    column_set = set(columns)
   343	    for symbol, owner in _SPECIALIST_SYMBOL_OWNERSHIP.items():
   344	        symbol_cols = _SYMBOL_MARKET_COLUMNS[symbol]
   345	        used = sorted(column_set.intersection(symbol_cols))
   346	        if not used:
   347	            continue
   348	        if specialist != owner:
   349	            raise RuntimeError(
   350	                f"{specialist} includes {symbol}-owned fields {used}; {symbol} is owned by {owner}"
   351	            )
   352	
   353	
   354	def _validate_symbol_ownership_across_specialists(frames: dict[str, pd.DataFrame]) -> None:
   355	    symbol_users: dict[str, set[str]] = {symbol: set() for symbol in _SYMBOL_MARKET_COLUMNS}
   356	    for specialist, frame in frames.items():
   357	        cols = set(frame.columns)
   358	        for symbol, symbol_cols in _SYMBOL_MARKET_COLUMNS.items():
   359	            if cols.intersection(symbol_cols):
   360	                symbol_users[symbol].add(specialist)
   361	
   362	    violations: list[str] = []
   363	    for symbol, users in symbol_users.items():
   364	        owner = _SPECIALIST_SYMBOL_OWNERSHIP[symbol]
   365	        if not users:
   366	            continue
   367	        if users != {owner}:
   368	            violations.append(f"{symbol}: users={sorted(users)} owner={owner}")
   369	
   370	    if violations:
   371	        raise RuntimeError("specialist symbol ownership violation: " + "; ".join(violations))
   372	
   373	
   374	def _build_specialist_frame(matrix: pd.DataFrame, contexts: dict[str, pd.DataFrame], specialist: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
   375	    frame = matrix[["trade_date", *feature_columns(matrix.columns)]].copy()
   376	    assert_no_target_columns(frame, context=f"{specialist} specialist feature input")
   377	    frame["trade_date"] = pd.to_datetime(frame["trade_date"])
   378	
   379	    for context in contexts.values():
   380	        if context.empty or "trade_date" not in context.columns:
   381	            continue
   382	        clean_context = context.copy()
   383	        clean_context["trade_date"] = pd.to_datetime(clean_context["trade_date"])
   384	        frame = _merge_context(frame, clean_context)
   385	
   386	    selected_columns = _select_columns(frame, specialist)
   387	    _validate_symbol_ownership_for_specialist(specialist=specialist, columns=selected_columns)
   388	    selected = frame[selected_columns].copy()
   389	    numeric_cols = [column for column in selected.columns if column != "trade_date"]
   390	    for column in numeric_cols:
   391	        selected[column] = pd.to_numeric(selected[column], errors="coerce")
   392	
   393	    source_cols = [column for column in numeric_cols if column not in _COMMON_MARKET_COLUMNS]
   394	    selected.insert(1, "specialist", specialist)
   395	    selected["source_feature_count"] = float(len(source_cols))
   396	    if source_cols:
   397	        selected["source_null_ratio"] = selected[source_cols].isna().mean(axis=1).astype(float)
   398	    else:
   399	        selected["source_null_ratio"] = 1.0
   400	
   401	    assert_no_target_columns(selected, context=f"{specialist} specialist feature output")
   402	    selected["trade_date"] = pd.to_datetime(selected["trade_date"]).dt.date
   403	    return selected
   404	
   405	
   406	def run(*, dry_run: bool = False) -> dict[str, object]:
   407	    output_paths = [specialist_features_path(specialist) for specialist in SPECIALISTS]
   408	    if dry_run:
   409	        return {
   410	            "phase": "specialist-features",
   411	            "dry_run": True,
   412	            "reads": [
   413	                str(matrix_path()),
   414	                "econ.rates_1d",
   415	                "econ.commodities_1d",
   416	                "econ.vol_indices_1d",
   417	                "econ.activity_1d",
   418	                "econ.weather_1d",
   419	                "alt.*",
   420	            ],
   421	            "writes": [str(path) for path in output_paths],
   422	            "cloud_writes": [],
   423	            "specialists": SPECIALISTS,
   424	            "status": "dry-run",
   425	        }
   426	
   427	    matrix = read_parquet(matrix_path())
   428	    if matrix.empty:
   429	        raise RuntimeError("local matrix parquet is empty; build matrix first")
   430	
   431	    db_url = resolve_cloud_db_url()
   432	    if not db_url:
   433	        raise RuntimeError(
   434	            "Cloud DB URL is not set. Configure DATABASE_URL, SUPABASE_DB_URL, POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING, or SUPABASE_POOLER_URL."
   435	        )
   436	
   437	    with psycopg2.connect(db_url, connect_timeout=10, application_name="fusion_specialist_features") as conn:
   438	        contexts = _source_context(conn, matrix["trade_date"])
   439	
   440	    specialist_counts: dict[str, int] = {}
   441	    source_feature_counts: dict[str, int] = {}
   442	    specialist_frames: dict[str, pd.DataFrame] = {}
   443	    for specialist in SPECIALISTS:
   444	        specialist_frame = _build_specialist_frame(matrix, contexts, specialist)
   445	        specialist_frames[specialist] = specialist_frame
   446	
   447	    _validate_symbol_ownership_across_specialists(specialist_frames)
   448	
   449	    for specialist, specialist_frame in specialist_frames.items():
   450	        output_path = specialist_features_path(specialist)
   451	        write_parquet(specialist_frame, output_path)
   452	        specialist_counts[specialist] = int(len(specialist_frame))
   453	        source_feature_counts[specialist] = int(specialist_frame["source_feature_count"].iloc[0])
   454	
   455	    return {
   456	        "phase": "specialist-features",
   457	        "dry_run": False,
   458	        "reads": [
   459	            str(matrix_path()),
   460	            "econ.rates_1d",
   461	            "econ.commodities_1d",
   462	            "econ.vol_indices_1d",
   463	            "econ.activity_1d",
   464	            "econ.weather_1d",
   465	            "alt.*",
   466	        ],
   467	        "writes": [str(path) for path in output_paths],
   468	        "cloud_writes": [],
   469	        "specialists": SPECIALISTS,
   470	        "status": "ok",
   471	        "rows_written_per_specialist": specialist_counts,
   472	        "source_feature_counts": source_feature_counts,
   473	    }

     1	from __future__ import annotations
     2	
     3	from pathlib import Path
     4	from typing import Iterable
     5	
     6	import pandas as pd
     7	
     8	from .config import SPECIALISTS, load_config
     9	
    10	MATRIX_FILE = "matrix_1d.parquet"
    11	SIGNALS_FILE = "specialist_signals.parquet"
    12	TRAINING_RUNS_FILE = "training_runs.parquet"
    13	
    14	TARGET_PREFIX = "target_price_"
    15	
    16	
    17	def local_data_dir() -> Path:
    18	    return load_config().local_data_dir
    19	
    20	
    21	def artifact_path(*parts: str) -> Path:
    22	    return local_data_dir().joinpath(*parts)
    23	
    24	
    25	def matrix_path() -> Path:
    26	    return artifact_path(MATRIX_FILE)
    27	
    28	
    29	def specialist_features_dir() -> Path:
    30	    return artifact_path("specialist_features")
    31	
    32	
    33	def specialist_features_path(specialist: str) -> Path:
    34	    if specialist not in SPECIALISTS:
    35	        raise ValueError(f"unknown specialist: {specialist}")
    36	    return specialist_features_dir().joinpath(f"{specialist}.parquet")
    37	
    38	
    39	def signals_path() -> Path:
    40	    return artifact_path(SIGNALS_FILE)
    41	
    42	
    43	def training_runs_path() -> Path:
    44	    return artifact_path(TRAINING_RUNS_FILE)
    45	
    46	
    47	def model_artifact_dir(run_id: str) -> Path:
    48	    return load_config().model_artifact_dir.joinpath(run_id)
    49	
    50	
    51	def ensure_parent(path: Path) -> None:
    52	    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    53	
    54	
    55	def write_parquet(df: pd.DataFrame, path: Path) -> None:
    56	    if df.empty:
    57	        raise RuntimeError(f"refusing to write empty parquet artifact: {path}")
    58	    ensure_parent(path)
    59	    df.to_parquet(path, index=False)
    60	
    61	
    62	def read_parquet(path: Path) -> pd.DataFrame:
    63	    if not path.exists():
    64	        raise FileNotFoundError(f"missing local parquet artifact: {path}")
    65	    return pd.read_parquet(path)
    66	
    67	
    68	def target_columns(columns: Iterable[str]) -> list[str]:
    69	    return [column for column in columns if column.startswith(TARGET_PREFIX)]
    70	
    71	
    72	def feature_columns(columns: Iterable[str]) -> list[str]:
    73	    return [
    74	        column
    75	        for column in columns
    76	        if column != "trade_date" and not column.startswith(TARGET_PREFIX)
    77	    ]
    78	
    79	
    80	def assert_no_target_columns(df: pd.DataFrame, *, context: str) -> None:
    81	    leaked = target_columns(df.columns)
    82	    if leaked:
    83	        raise RuntimeError(f"{context} contains target columns: {', '.join(leaked)}")
    84	
    85	
    86	def numeric_feature_columns(df: pd.DataFrame) -> list[str]:
    87	    excluded = {"trade_date", "specialist"}
    88	    return [
    89	        column
    90	        for column in df.columns
    91	        if column not in excluded
    92	        and not column.startswith(TARGET_PREFIX)
    93	        and pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(df[column])
    94	    ]

    18	class LocalCloudSyncError(RuntimeError):
    19	    pass
    20	
    21	
    22	@dataclass(frozen=True)
    23	class MirrorTable:
    24	    schema: str
    25	    table: str
    26	    columns: tuple[str, ...]
    27	    select_sql: str
    28	    create_sql: str
    29	    indexes_sql: tuple[str, ...]
    30	
    31	    @property
    32	    def fq_name(self) -> str:
    33	        return f"{self.schema}.{self.table}"
    34	
    35	
    36	def _validate_local_db_url(db_url: str) -> None:
    37	    parsed = urlparse(db_url)
    38	    if parsed.scheme not in {"postgres", "postgresql"}:
    39	        raise LocalCloudSyncError(f"local DB URL must be postgres/postgresql, got: {parsed.scheme!r}")
    40	    host = (parsed.hostname or "").lower()
    41	    if host not in {"localhost", "127.0.0.1", "::1"}:
    42	        raise LocalCloudSyncError(f"local sync refuses non-local host: {host or '<empty>'!r}")
    43	    db_name = (parsed.path or "").lstrip("/")
    44	    if db_name != "fusion":
    45	        raise LocalCloudSyncError(f"local sync expects database 'fusion', got: {db_name or '<empty>'!r}")
    46	
    47	
    48	def _normalize_value(value: Any) -> Any:
    49	    if isinstance(value, dict):
    50	        return Json(value)
    51	    if isinstance(value, list):
    52	        return value
    53	    if isinstance(value, Decimal):
    54	        return value
    55	    return value

   250	
   251	def _ensure_manifest_table(cur: Any) -> None:
   252	    cur.execute("CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS ops")
   253	    cur.execute(
   254	        """
   255	        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ops.local_cloud_sync_manifest (
   256	          run_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
   257	          synced_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
   258	          cloud_reads JSONB NOT NULL,
   259	          local_writes JSONB NOT NULL,
   260	          row_counts JSONB NOT NULL,
   261	          notes TEXT NOT NULL
   262	        )
   263	        """
   264	    )
   265	
   266	
   267	def _ensure_target_table(cur: Any, spec: MirrorTable) -> None:
   268	    cur.execute(pgsql.SQL("CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS {}").format(pgsql.Identifier(spec.schema)))
   269	    cur.execute(spec.create_sql)
   270	    for index_sql in spec.indexes_sql:
   271	        cur.execute(index_sql)
   272	
   273	
   274	def _fetch_rows(cur: Any, spec: MirrorTable, *, batch_size: int) -> list[tuple[Any, ...]]:
   275	    cur.execute(spec.select_sql)
   276	    rows: list[tuple[Any, ...]] = []
   277	    while True:
   278	        batch = cur.fetchmany(batch_size)
   279	        if not batch:
   280	            break
   281	        rows.extend(batch)
   282	    return rows
   283	
   284	
   285	def _replace_local_table(cur: Any, spec: MirrorTable, rows: list[tuple[Any, ...]], *, page_size: int) -> int:
   286	    _ensure_target_table(cur, spec)
   287	    table_id = pgsql.Identifier(spec.schema, spec.table)
   288	    cur.execute(pgsql.SQL("TRUNCATE TABLE {} RESTART IDENTITY").format(table_id))
   289	    if not rows:
   290	        return 0
   291	    col_ids = pgsql.SQL(", ").join(pgsql.Identifier(c) for c in spec.columns)
   292	    template = "(" + ", ".join(["%s"] * len(spec.columns)) + ")"
   293	    values = [tuple(_normalize_value(value) for value in row) for row in rows]
   294	    execute_values(
   295	        cur,
   296	        pgsql.SQL("INSERT INTO {} ({}) VALUES %s").format(table_id, col_ids),
   297	        values,
   298	        template=template,
   299	        page_size=page_size,
   300	    )
   301	    return len(values)
   302	
   303	
   304	def run(*, dry_run: bool = True, batch_size: int = 10000, page_size: int = 5000) -> dict[str, object]:
   305	    cloud_url = resolve_cloud_db_url()
   306	    local_url = resolve_local_training_db_url()
   307	    if not cloud_url:
   308	        raise LocalCloudSyncError("Cloud DB URL is not configured")
   309	    _validate_local_db_url(local_url)
   310	
   311	    payload: dict[str, object] = {
   312	        "phase": "sync-cloud-sources-to-local",
   313	        "dry_run": dry_run,
   314	        "cloud_reads": [spec.fq_name for spec in MIRROR_TABLES],
   315	        "local_writes": [spec.fq_name for spec in MIRROR_TABLES] + ["ops.local_cloud_sync_manifest"],
   316	        "row_counts": {},
   317	        "status": "dry-run" if dry_run else "pending",
   318	    }
   319	
   320	    row_counts: dict[str, int] = {}
   321	    fetched: dict[str, list[tuple[Any, ...]]] = {}
   322	    with psycopg2.connect(cloud_url, connect_timeout=10, application_name="fusion_sync_cloud_sources_read") as cloud:
   323	        with cloud.cursor() as cur:
   324	            for spec in MIRROR_TABLES:
   325	                rows = _fetch_rows(cur, spec, batch_size=batch_size)
   326	                row_counts[spec.fq_name] = len(rows)
   327	                if not dry_run:
   328	                    fetched[spec.fq_name] = rows
   329	
   330	    payload["row_counts"] = row_counts
   331	    if dry_run:
   332	        return payload
   333	
   334	    run_id = f"local-cloud-sync-{datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ')}"
   335	    with psycopg2.connect(local_url, connect_timeout=10, application_name="fusion_sync_cloud_sources_write") as local:
   336	        with local.cursor() as cur:
   337	            _ensure_manifest_table(cur)
   338	            promoted: dict[str, int] = {}
   339	            for spec in MIRROR_TABLES:
   340	                promoted[spec.fq_name] = _replace_local_table(
   341	                    cur,
   342	                    spec,
   343	                    fetched[spec.fq_name],
   344	                    page_size=page_size,
   345	                )
   346	            cur.execute(
   347	                """
   348	                INSERT INTO ops.local_cloud_sync_manifest (
   349	                  run_id, cloud_reads, local_writes, row_counts, notes
   350	                ) VALUES (%s, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb, %s)
   351	                """,
   352	                (
   353	                    run_id,
   354	                    json.dumps(payload["cloud_reads"]),
   355	                    json.dumps(payload["local_writes"]),
   356	                    json.dumps(promoted, sort_keys=True),
   357	                    "Cloud-to-local mirror for AG staging only; no cloud writes and no model training.",
   358	                ),
   359	            )
   360	
   361	    payload["status"] = "ok"
   362	    payload["run_id"] = run_id
   363	    payload["promoted_rows"] = promoted
   364	    return payload
   365	
   366	
   367	def main() -> None:
   368	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Mirror cloud source tables into local Postgres for AG staging")
   369	    parser.add_argument("--execute", action="store_true", help="write mirrored tables into local localhost/fusion")
   370	    parser.add_argument("--batch-size", type=int, default=10000)
   371	    parser.add_argument("--page-size", type=int, default=5000)
   372	    args = parser.parse_args()
   373	    result = run(dry_run=not args.execute, batch_size=args.batch_size, page_size=args.page_size)
   374	    print(json.dumps(result, indent=2, sort_keys=True, default=str))
   375	
   376	
   377	if __name__ == "__main__":
   378	    main()
