    25	
    26	class LocalLoadError(RuntimeError):
    27	    pass
    28	
    29	
    30	DEFAULT_LOCAL_DB_URL = resolve_local_training_db_url()
    31	
    32	
    33	@dataclass(frozen=True)
    34	class LocalLoadSummary:
    35	    matrix_rows: int
    36	    matrix_target_rows: int
    37	    signal_rows: int
    38	    unified_feature_count: int
    39	    specialist_rows: dict[str, int]
    40	    target_columns_stripped_from_matrix_payload: list[str]
    41	    matrix_label_null_counts: dict[str, int]
    42	
    43	
    44	def _validate_local_db_url(db_url: str) -> None:
    45	    parsed = urlparse(db_url)
    46	    if parsed.scheme not in {"postgres", "postgresql"}:
    47	        raise LocalLoadError(f"db url must be postgres/postgresql, got: {parsed.scheme!r}")
    48	    host = (parsed.hostname or "").lower()
    49	    if host not in {"localhost", "127.0.0.1", "::1"}:
    50	        raise LocalLoadError(
    51	            "local loader is hard-locked to localhost. refusing non-local host"
    52	        )
    53	    db_name = (parsed.path or "").lstrip("/")
    54	    if db_name != "fusion":
    55	        raise LocalLoadError(
    56	            f"local loader expects database 'fusion'. got: {db_name or '<empty>'}"
    57	        )
    58	
    59	
    60	def _json_from_row(row: pd.Series, *, exclude: set[str]) -> str:
    61	    payload: dict[str, Any] = {}
    62	    for key, value in row.items():
    63	        if key in exclude:
    64	            continue
    65	        if pd.isna(value):
    66	            continue
    67	        if isinstance(value, (pd.Timestamp, datetime)):
    68	            payload[key] = value.isoformat()
    69	        elif hasattr(value, "item"):
    70	            payload[key] = value.item()
    71	        else:
    72	            payload[key] = value
    73	    return json.dumps(payload, separators=(",", ":"), sort_keys=True)
    74	
    75	
    76	def _validate_matrix() -> pd.DataFrame:
    77	    matrix = read_parquet(matrix_path())
    78	    labels = target_columns(matrix.columns)
    79	    if not labels:
    80	        raise LocalLoadError("matrix artifact has no target label columns")
    81	    features = feature_columns(matrix.columns)
    82	    if not features:
    83	        raise LocalLoadError("matrix artifact has no feature columns")
    84	    # Forward-label horizons naturally create trailing NULL rows; this is expected.
    85	    # We only block if a target column has no usable labels at all.
    86	    for label in labels:
    87	        usable = int(matrix[label].notna().sum())
    88	        if usable == 0:
    89	            raise LocalLoadError(f"matrix target label column has no non-null rows: {label}")
    90	    if "trade_date" not in matrix.columns:
    91	        raise LocalLoadError("matrix artifact missing trade_date")
    92	    return matrix.sort_values("trade_date").reset_index(drop=True)
    93	
    94	
    95	def _validate_signals() -> pd.DataFrame:
    96	    signals = read_parquet(signals_path())
    97	    if signals.empty:
    98	        raise LocalLoadError("specialist signals artifact is empty")
    99	    expected = len(SPECIALISTS) * 3
   100	    actual = len([column for column in signals.columns if column != "trade_date"])
   101	    if actual != expected:
   102	        raise LocalLoadError(f"specialist signals column count={actual}, expected={expected}")
   103	    if "trade_date" not in signals.columns:
   104	        raise LocalLoadError("specialist signals artifact missing trade_date")
   105	    return signals.sort_values("trade_date").reset_index(drop=True)
   106	
   107	
   108	def _maybe_validate_signals() -> pd.DataFrame | None:
   109	    try:
   110	        return _validate_signals()
   111	    except FileNotFoundError:
   112	        return None
   113	
   114	
   115	def _validate_specialists() -> dict[str, pd.DataFrame]:
   116	    payload: dict[str, pd.DataFrame] = {}
   117	    for specialist in SPECIALISTS:
   118	        frame = read_parquet(specialist_features_path(specialist))
   119	        if frame.empty:
   120	            raise LocalLoadError(f"specialist artifact is empty: {specialist}")
   121	        leaked = target_columns(frame.columns)
   122	        if leaked:
   123	            raise LocalLoadError(f"specialist artifact {specialist} leaked targets: {leaked}")
   124	        if "trade_date" not in frame.columns:
   125	            raise LocalLoadError(f"specialist artifact missing trade_date: {specialist}")
   126	        payload[specialist] = frame.sort_values("trade_date").reset_index(drop=True)
   127	    return payload
   128	
   129	
   130	def _coerce_trade_date(frame: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
   131	    normalized = frame.copy()
   132	    normalized["trade_date"] = pd.to_datetime(normalized["trade_date"], errors="coerce").dt.date
   133	    normalized = normalized.dropna(subset=["trade_date"])
   134	    normalized = normalized.sort_values("trade_date").drop_duplicates(subset=["trade_date"], keep="last")
   135	    return normalized.reset_index(drop=True)
   136	
   137	
   138	def _build_unified_matrix(matrix: pd.DataFrame, specialists: dict[str, pd.DataFrame]) -> pd.DataFrame:
   139	    unified = _coerce_trade_date(matrix)
   140	    for specialist, frame in specialists.items():
   141	        source = _coerce_trade_date(frame)
   142	        prefix = f"{specialist}_"
   143	        feature_cols = [
   144	            column
   145	            for column in source.columns
   146	            if column not in {"trade_date", "specialist"} and not column.startswith("target_price_")
   147	        ]
   148	        if not feature_cols:
   149	            continue
   150	        scoped = source[["trade_date", *feature_cols]].copy()
   151	        scoped = scoped.rename(columns={column: f"{prefix}{column}" for column in feature_cols})
   152	        unified = unified.merge(scoped, on="trade_date", how="left")
   153	    return unified.sort_values("trade_date").reset_index(drop=True)
   154	
   155	
   156	def _ensure_training_tables(cur: Any) -> None:
   157	    cur.execute("CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS training")
   158	    cur.execute("CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS ops")
   159	
   160	    cur.execute(
   161	        """
   162	        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS training.matrix_1d (
   163	          id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   164	          trade_date DATE NOT NULL UNIQUE,
   165	          feature_snapshot JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
   166	          created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
   167	          ingested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
   168	        )
   169	        """
   170	    )
   171	    cur.execute(
   172	        """
   173	        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS training.matrix_targets_1d (
   174	          trade_date DATE PRIMARY KEY,
   175	          target_price_30d NUMERIC,
   176	          target_price_90d NUMERIC,
   177	          target_price_180d NUMERIC,
   178	          created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
   179	          ingested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
   180	        )
   181	        """
   182	    )
   183	    cur.execute(
   184	        """
   185	        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS training.specialist_signals_1d (
   186	          id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   187	          trade_date DATE NOT NULL UNIQUE,
   188	          signal_payload JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
   189	          created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
   190	          ingested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
   191	        )
   192	        """
   193	    )
   194	
   195	    for specialist in SPECIALISTS:
   196	        cur.execute(
   197	            pgsql.SQL("""
   198	            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {schema}.{table} (
   199	              id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   200	              trade_date DATE NOT NULL UNIQUE,
   201	              feature_payload JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{{}}'::jsonb,
   202	              created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
   203	              ingested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
   204	            )
   205	            """).format(
   206	                schema=pgsql.Identifier("training"),
   207	                table=pgsql.Identifier(f"specialist_features_{specialist}"),
   208	            )
   209	        )
   210	
   211	    cur.execute(
   212	        """
   213	        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ops.local_load_manifest (
   214	          run_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
   215	          loaded_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
   216	          db_url TEXT NOT NULL,
   217	          matrix_rows BIGINT NOT NULL,
   218	          signal_rows BIGINT NOT NULL,
   219	          specialist_rows JSONB NOT NULL,
   220	          source_paths JSONB NOT NULL,
   221	          max_trade_date DATE NOT NULL
   222	        )
   223	        """
   224	    )
   225	
   226	
   227	def _load_matrix(cur: Any, matrix: pd.DataFrame) -> int:
   228	    excluded = {"trade_date", *target_columns(matrix.columns)}
   229	    rows = [(row["trade_date"], _json_from_row(row, exclude=excluded)) for _, row in matrix.iterrows()]
   230	    cur.execute("TRUNCATE TABLE training.matrix_1d")
   231	    execute_values(
   232	        cur,
   233	        """
   234	        INSERT INTO training.matrix_1d (trade_date, feature_snapshot, created_at, ingested_at)
   235	        VALUES %s
   236	        """,
   237	        rows,
   238	        template="(%s, %s::jsonb, NOW(), NOW())",
   239	        page_size=1000,
   240	    )
   241	    return len(rows)
   242	
   243	
   244	def _load_matrix_targets(cur: Any, matrix: pd.DataFrame) -> int:
   245	    expected = {"target_price_30d", "target_price_90d", "target_price_180d"}
   246	    labels = set(target_columns(matrix.columns))
   247	    missing = sorted(expected - labels)
   248	    if missing:
   249	        raise LocalLoadError(f"matrix artifact missing required target columns: {missing}")
   250	    rows = [
   251	        (
   252	            row["trade_date"],
   253	            None if pd.isna(row["target_price_30d"]) else float(row["target_price_30d"]),
   254	            None if pd.isna(row["target_price_90d"]) else float(row["target_price_90d"]),
   255	            None if pd.isna(row["target_price_180d"]) else float(row["target_price_180d"]),
   256	        )
   257	        for _, row in matrix.iterrows()
   258	    ]
   259	    cur.execute("TRUNCATE TABLE training.matrix_targets_1d")
   260	    execute_values(
   261	        cur,
   262	        """
   263	        INSERT INTO training.matrix_targets_1d (
   264	          trade_date,
   265	          target_price_30d,
   266	          target_price_90d,
   267	          target_price_180d,
   268	          created_at,
   269	          ingested_at
   270	        )
   271	        VALUES %s
   272	        """,
   273	        rows,
   274	        template="(%s, %s, %s, %s, NOW(), NOW())",
   275	        page_size=1000,
   276	    )
   277	    return len(rows)
   278	
   279	
   280	def _load_signals(cur: Any, signals: pd.DataFrame) -> int:
   281	    rows = [(row["trade_date"], _json_from_row(row, exclude={"trade_date"})) for _, row in signals.iterrows()]
   282	    cur.execute("TRUNCATE TABLE training.specialist_signals_1d")
   283	    execute_values(
   284	        cur,
   285	        """
   286	        INSERT INTO training.specialist_signals_1d (trade_date, signal_payload, created_at, ingested_at)
   287	        VALUES %s
   288	        """,
   289	        rows,
   290	        template="(%s, %s::jsonb, NOW(), NOW())",
   291	        page_size=1000,
   292	    )
   293	    return len(rows)
   294	
   295	
   296	def _load_specialist(cur: Any, specialist: str, frame: pd.DataFrame) -> int:
   297	    rows = [(row["trade_date"], _json_from_row(row, exclude={"trade_date"})) for _, row in frame.iterrows()]
   298	    table_id = pgsql.Identifier("training", f"specialist_features_{specialist}")
   299	    cur.execute(pgsql.SQL("TRUNCATE TABLE {}").format(table_id))
   300	    execute_values(
   301	        cur,
   302	        pgsql.SQL(
   303	            "INSERT INTO {} (trade_date, feature_payload, created_at, ingested_at) VALUES %s"
   304	        ).format(table_id),
   305	        rows,
   306	        template="(%s, %s::jsonb, NOW(), NOW())",
   307	        page_size=1000,
   308	    )
   309	    return len(rows)
   310	
   311	
   312	def _touch_source_manifest(
   313	    cur: Any,
   314	    *,
   315	    min_trade_date: str,
   316	    max_trade_date: str,
   317	    include_signals: bool,
   318	) -> None:
   319	    cur.execute(
   320	        """
   321	        INSERT INTO ops.source_manifest (
   322	          source_name, source_table, update_frequency, expected_row_count, min_date, max_date, last_validated, health_status, notes
   323	        ) VALUES
   324	          ('ag_matrix_local', 'training.matrix_1d', 'manual', NULL, %s::date, %s::date, NOW(), 'ok', 'Local AG matrix artifact load')
   325	        ON CONFLICT (source_name) DO UPDATE SET
   326	          source_table = EXCLUDED.source_table,
   327	          update_frequency = EXCLUDED.update_frequency,
   328	          min_date = EXCLUDED.min_date,
   329	          max_date = EXCLUDED.max_date,
   330	          last_validated = EXCLUDED.last_validated,
   331	          health_status = EXCLUDED.health_status,
   332	          notes = EXCLUDED.notes
   333	        """,
   334	        (min_trade_date, max_trade_date),
   335	    )
   336	    if include_signals:
   337	        cur.execute(
   338	            """
   339	            INSERT INTO ops.source_manifest (
   340	              source_name, source_table, update_frequency, expected_row_count, min_date, max_date, last_validated, health_status, notes
   341	            ) VALUES
   342	              ('ag_signals_local', 'training.specialist_signals_1d', 'manual', NULL, %s::date, %s::date, NOW(), 'ok', 'Local AG specialist signal artifact load')
   343	            ON CONFLICT (source_name) DO UPDATE SET
   344	              source_table = EXCLUDED.source_table,
   345	              update_frequency = EXCLUDED.update_frequency,
   346	              min_date = EXCLUDED.min_date,
   347	              max_date = EXCLUDED.max_date,
   348	              last_validated = EXCLUDED.last_validated,
   349	              health_status = EXCLUDED.health_status,
   350	              notes = EXCLUDED.notes
   351	            """,
   352	            (min_trade_date, max_trade_date),
   353	        )
   354	
   355	
   356	def run(*, db_url: str = DEFAULT_LOCAL_DB_URL, dry_run: bool = True, approved: bool = False) -> dict[str, object]:
   357	    _validate_local_db_url(db_url)
   358	    matrix = _validate_matrix()
   359	    signals = _maybe_validate_signals()
   360	    specialists = _validate_specialists()
   361	    unified_matrix = _build_unified_matrix(matrix, specialists)
   362	    read_paths = [str(matrix_path()), *[str(specialist_features_path(specialist)) for specialist in SPECIALISTS]]
   363	    if signals is not None:
   364	        read_paths.append(str(signals_path()))
   365	
   366	    min_trade_date = str(pd.to_datetime(matrix["trade_date"]).min().date())
   367	    max_trade_date = str(pd.to_datetime(matrix["trade_date"]).max().date())
   368	
   369	    summary = LocalLoadSummary(
   370	        matrix_rows=int(len(unified_matrix)),
   371	        matrix_target_rows=int(len(matrix)),
   372	        signal_rows=int(len(signals)) if signals is not None else 0,
   373	        unified_feature_count=int(len(feature_columns(unified_matrix.columns))),
   374	        specialist_rows={name: int(len(frame)) for name, frame in specialists.items()},
   375	        target_columns_stripped_from_matrix_payload=target_columns(matrix.columns),
   376	        matrix_label_null_counts={
   377	            label: int(matrix[label].isna().sum()) for label in target_columns(matrix.columns)
   378	        },
   379	    )
   380	
   381	    payload: dict[str, object] = {
   382	        "phase": "local-load",
   383	        "dry_run": dry_run,
   384	        "approved": approved,
   385	        "db_url": db_url,
   386	        "reads": [
   387	            *read_paths,
   388	        ],
   389	        "writes": [
   390	            "training.matrix_1d",
   391	            "training.matrix_targets_1d",
   392	            "training.specialist_signals_1d (optional)",
   393	            *[f"training.specialist_features_{specialist}" for specialist in SPECIALISTS],
   394	            "ops.local_load_manifest",
   395	            "ops.source_manifest",
   396	        ],
   397	        "matrix_rows": summary.matrix_rows,
   398	        "matrix_target_rows": summary.matrix_target_rows,
   399	        "signal_rows": summary.signal_rows,
   400	        "unified_feature_count": summary.unified_feature_count,
   401	        "specialist_rows": summary.specialist_rows,
   402	        "trade_date_min": min_trade_date,
   403	        "trade_date_max": max_trade_date,
   404	        "target_columns_stripped_from_matrix_payload": summary.target_columns_stripped_from_matrix_payload,
   405	        "matrix_label_null_counts": summary.matrix_label_null_counts,
   406	        "single_matrix_training_contract": True,
   407	        "status": "dry-run" if dry_run else "pending",
   408	    }
   409	
   410	    if dry_run:

     1	from __future__ import annotations
     2	
     3	import unittest
     4	from decimal import Decimal
     5	
     6	import pandas as pd
     7	
     8	from fusion.train_models import TrainingContractError, _split_temporal
     9	
    10	
    11	def _frame_with_target(values: list[object]) -> pd.DataFrame:
    12	    rows = len(values)
    13	    return pd.DataFrame(
    14	        {
    15	            "trade_date": pd.date_range("2020-01-01", periods=rows, freq="D"),
    16	            "close": [50.0 + (idx * 0.01) for idx in range(rows)],
    17	            "volume": [1000 + idx for idx in range(rows)],
    18	            "target_price_30d": values,
    19	        }
    20	    )
    21	
    22	
    23	class SplitTemporalContractTest(unittest.TestCase):
    24	    def test_decimal_object_target_is_coerced_to_numeric_before_fit(self) -> None:
    25	        frame = _frame_with_target([Decimal("70.25") + Decimal(idx) / Decimal("100") for idx in range(1200)])
    26	
    27	        train, validation, test, meta = _split_temporal(frame, label="target_price_30d", horizon=30)
    28	
    29	        self.assertEqual(meta["label"], "target_price_30d")
    30	        self.assertTrue(pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(train["target_price_30d"]))
    31	        self.assertTrue(pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(validation["target_price_30d"]))
    32	        self.assertTrue(pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(test["target_price_30d"]))
    33	
    34	    def test_non_numeric_target_fails_before_autogluon_fit(self) -> None:
    35	        frame = _frame_with_target(["not-a-price"] * 1200)
    36	
    37	        with self.assertRaisesRegex(TrainingContractError, "target_price_30d has no numeric values"):
    38	            _split_temporal(frame, label="target_price_30d", horizon=30)
    39	
    40	
    41	if __name__ == "__main__":
    42	    unittest.main()

     6	
     7	from fusion import training_readiness_gate
     8	
     9	
    10	class TrainingReadinessGateContractTest(unittest.TestCase):
    11	    def test_default_contract_uses_dynamic_local_source_scope(self) -> None:
    12	        env_keys = [
    13	            "TRAINING_REQUIRED_SYMBOLS",
    14	            "TRAINING_REQUIRED_FRED_SERIES",
    15	            "TRAINING_MIN_MATRIX_ROWS",
    16	            "TRAINING_ENFORCE_CLOUD_LOCAL_PARITY",
    17	            "TRAINING_REQUIRE_OPTIONS",
    18	        ]
    19	        saved = {key: os.environ.pop(key, None) for key in env_keys}
    20	        try:
    21	            contract = training_readiness_gate._load_contract()
    22	        finally:
    23	            for key, value in saved.items():
    24	                if value is not None:
    25	                    os.environ[key] = value
    26	
    27	        self.assertEqual(contract.required_symbols, ())
    28	        self.assertEqual(contract.required_fred_series, ())
    29	        self.assertEqual(contract.min_matrix_rows, 500000)
    30	        self.assertFalse(contract.enforce_cloud_local_parity)
    31	        self.assertFalse(contract.require_options_data)
    32	
    33	    def test_readiness_gate_prefers_normalized_local_mirrors(self) -> None:
    34	        self.assertIn(
    35	            ("econ", "weather_1d", "series_id", "observation_date"),
    36	            training_readiness_gate._WEATHER_SOURCE_TABLES,
    37	        )
    38	        self.assertIn(
    39	            ("alt", "profarmer_news", "published_at"),
    40	            training_readiness_gate._ALT_SOURCE_TABLES,
    41	        )
    42	
    43	    def test_dry_run_evaluates_gate_and_can_block(self) -> None:
    44	        with patch.object(
    45	            training_readiness_gate,
    46	            "_check_local_matrix_artifact",
    47	            return_value=(False, "local matrix artifact failed -> rows=6439 (<500000)"),
    48	        ), patch.object(
    49	            training_readiness_gate.psycopg2,
    50	            "connect",
    51	            side_effect=RuntimeError("local db unavailable"),
    52	        ):
    53	            result = training_readiness_gate.run(dry_run=True)
    54	
    55	        self.assertFalse(result["ready"])
    56	        self.assertEqual(result["status"], "blocked")
    57	        self.assertIn("local matrix artifact failed -> rows=6439 (<500000)", result["blockers"])
    58	        self.assertTrue(
    59	            any(str(item).startswith("readiness query failure: local db unavailable") for item in result["blockers"])
    60	        )
    61

    64	    unittest.main()

     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     4	
     5	export async function GET() {
     6	  const checkedAt = new Date().toISOString();
     7	  const siteUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL?.trim() ?? null;
     8	  const siteUrlConfigured = Boolean(siteUrl);
     9	  const siteUrlIsLocalhost = Boolean(siteUrl && siteUrl.includes("localhost"));
    10	
    11	  try {
    12	    const admin = createSupabaseAdminClient();
    13	    const { error } = await admin
    14	      .schema("ops")
    15	      .from("source_registry")
    16	      .select("source_id", { count: "exact", head: true })
    17	      .limit(1);
    18	
    19	    if (!error) {
    20	      return NextResponse.json({
    21	        ok: true,
    22	        dbReachable: true,
    23	        schemaReady: true,
    24	        siteUrlConfigured,
    25	        siteUrlIsLocalhost,
    26	        checkedAt,
    27	      });
    28	    }
    29	
    30	    const schemaNotReady = error.code === "42P01";
    31	
    32	    return NextResponse.json(
    33	      {
    34	        ok: schemaNotReady,
    35	        dbReachable: true,
    36	        schemaReady: false,
    37	        siteUrlConfigured,
    38	        siteUrlIsLocalhost,
    39	        error: error.message,
    40	        checkedAt,
    41	      },
    42	      { status: schemaNotReady ? 200 : 503 },
    43	    );
    44	  } catch (error) {
    45	    return NextResponse.json(
    46	      {
    47	        ok: false,
    48	        dbReachable: false,
    49	        schemaReady: false,
    50	        siteUrlConfigured,
    51	        siteUrlIsLocalhost,
    52	        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown health error",
    53	        checkedAt,
    54	      },
    55	      { status: 503 },
    56	    );
    57	  }
    58	}

     1	import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
     4	import { hasEnvVars } from "@/lib/utils";
     5	
     6	export async function GET() {
     7	  if (!hasEnvVars) {
     8	    return NextResponse.json(
     9	      {
    10	        ok: false,
    11	        authenticated: false,
    12	        error: "Supabase auth env vars are not configured",
    13	        checkedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    14	      },
    15	      { status: 503 },
    16	    );
    17	  }
    18	
    19	  const supabase = await createClient();
    20	  const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.getClaims();
    21	
    22	  if (error) {
    23	    return NextResponse.json(
    24	      {
    25	        ok: false,
    26	        authenticated: false,
    27	        error: error.message,
    28	        checkedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    29	      },
    30	      { status: 401 },
    31	    );
    32	  }
    33	
    34	  if (!data?.claims) {
    35	    return NextResponse.json(
    36	      {
    37	        ok: false,
    38	        authenticated: false,
    39	        error: "No authenticated user claims",
    40	        checkedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    41	      },
    42	      { status: 401 },
    43	    );
    44	  }
    45	
    46	  return NextResponse.json({
    47	    ok: true,
    48	    authenticated: true,
    49	    checkedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    50	  });
    51	}

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	import { createServerClient } from "@supabase/ssr";
     2	import { cookies } from "next/headers";
     3	
     4	/**
     5	 * Especially important if using Fluid compute: Don't put this client in a
     6	 * global variable. Always create a new client within each function when using
     7	 * it.
     8	 */
     9	export async function createClient() {
    10	  const cookieStore = await cookies();
    11	
    12	  return createServerClient(
    13	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    14	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY!,
    15	    {
    16	      cookies: {
    17	        getAll() {
    18	          return cookieStore.getAll();
    19	        },
    20	        setAll(cookiesToSet) {
    21	          try {
    22	            cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value, options }) =>
    23	              cookieStore.set(name, value, options),
    24	            );
    25	          } catch {
    26	            // The `setAll` method was called from a Server Component.
    27	            // This can be ignored if you have proxy refreshing
    28	            // user sessions.
    29	          }
    30	        },
    31	      },
    32	    },
    33	  );
    34	}

    69	  metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    70	  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    71	  ingested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    72	);
    73	
    74	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vegas.venues (
    75	  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    76	  venue_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    77	  metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    78	  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    79	  ingested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    80	);
    81	
    82	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vegas.fryers (
    83	  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    84	  restaurant_id BIGINT,
    85	  fryer_count INTEGER,
    86	  metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    87	  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    88	  ingested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    89	);
    90	
    91	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vegas.customer_scores (
    92	  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    93	  restaurant_id BIGINT,
    94	  score_date DATE NOT NULL,
    95	  score NUMERIC(18, 6),
    96	  metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
    97	  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    98	  ingested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    99	  UNIQUE(restaurant_id, score_date)
   100	);
   101	
   102	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vegas.event_impact (
   103	  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   104	  event_id BIGINT,
   105	  restaurant_id BIGINT,
   106	  impact_score NUMERIC(18, 6),
   107	  metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
   108	  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
   109	  ingested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
   110	  UNIQUE(event_id, restaurant_id)
   111	);
   112

     4	DECLARE
     5	  rec RECORD;
     6	  policy_name TEXT;
     7	BEGIN
     8	  FOR rec IN
     9	    SELECT schemaname, tablename
    10	    FROM pg_tables
    11	    WHERE schemaname IN ('mkt', 'econ', 'alt', 'supply', 'training', 'forecasts', 'analytics', 'vegas')
    12	  LOOP
    13	    EXECUTE format('ALTER TABLE %I.%I ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY', rec.schemaname, rec.tablename);
    14

    16	    EXECUTE format('CREATE POLICY authenticated_read ON %I.%I FOR SELECT TO authenticated USING (true)', rec.schemaname, rec.tablename);
    17	
    18	    EXECUTE format('DROP POLICY IF EXISTS service_role_insert ON %I.%I', rec.schemaname, rec.tablename);
    19	    EXECUTE format('CREATE POLICY service_role_insert ON %I.%I FOR INSERT TO service_role WITH CHECK (true)', rec.schemaname, rec.tablename);
    20

    25	    EXECUTE format('CREATE POLICY service_role_delete ON %I.%I FOR DELETE TO service_role USING (true)', rec.schemaname, rec.tablename);

    29	    SELECT schemaname, tablename
    30	    FROM pg_tables
    31	    WHERE schemaname = 'ops'

    43

    46	  END LOOP;
    47	END $$;
    48	
    49	DO $$
    50	DECLARE
    51	  schema_name TEXT;
    52	BEGIN
    53	  FOR schema_name IN
    54	    SELECT unnest(ARRAY['mkt', 'econ', 'alt', 'supply', 'training', 'forecasts', 'analytics', 'vegas'])
    55	  LOOP
    56	    EXECUTE format('GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA %I TO authenticated, service_role', schema_name);
    57	    EXECUTE format('GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA %I TO authenticated', schema_name);
    58	    EXECUTE format('GRANT INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA %I TO service_role', schema_name);
    59	    EXECUTE format('GRANT USAGE, SELECT ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA %I TO service_role', schema_name);
    60	    EXECUTE format('ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA %I GRANT SELECT ON TABLES TO authenticated', schema_name);
    61	    EXECUTE format('ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA %I GRANT INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE ON TABLES TO service_role', schema_name);
    62	    EXECUTE format('ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA %I GRANT USAGE, SELECT ON SEQUENCES TO service_role', schema_name);
    63	  END LOOP;
    64	
    65	  EXECUTE 'GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA ops TO service_role';
    66	  EXECUTE 'GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA ops TO service_role';
    67	  EXECUTE 'GRANT USAGE, SELECT ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA ops TO service_role';
    68	  EXECUTE 'ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA ops GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE ON TABLES TO service_role';
    69	  EXECUTE 'ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA ops GRANT USAGE, SELECT ON SEQUENCES TO service_role';
    70	END $$;
    71	
    72	DO $$
    73	DECLARE
    74	  rec RECORD;
    75	  idx_name TEXT;
    76	BEGIN
    77	  FOR rec IN
    78	    SELECT table_schema, table_name, column_name
    79	    FROM information_schema.columns
    80	    WHERE table_schema IN ('mkt', 'econ', 'alt', 'supply', 'training', 'forecasts', 'analytics', 'ops', 'vegas')
    81	      AND column_name IN ('bucket_ts', 'observation_date', 'trade_date', 'event_date', 'forecast_date', 'ingested_at', 'created_at')
    82	  LOOP
    83	    idx_name := format('idx_%s_%s_%s', rec.table_schema, rec.table_name, rec.column_name);
    84	    IF length(idx_name) > 60 THEN
    85	      idx_name := 'idx_' || substr(md5(idx_name), 1, 24);
    86	    END IF;
    87	
    88	    EXECUTE format(
    89	      'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS %I ON %I.%I (%I)',
    90	      idx_name,
    91	      rec.table_schema,
    92	      rec.table_name,
    93	      rec.column_name
    94	    );
    95	  END LOOP;
    96	END $$;
    97	
    98	COMMIT;

     1	BEGIN;
     2	
     3	CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_cron;
     4	
     5	CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION ops.mark_stale_ingest_runs() RETURNS INTEGER
     6	LANGUAGE plpgsql
     7	AS $$
     8	DECLARE
     9	  updated_rows INTEGER;
    10	BEGIN
    11	  UPDATE ops.ingest_run
    12	  SET status = 'TIMEOUT',
    13	      finished_at = NOW()
    14	  WHERE status = 'RUNNING'
    15	    AND started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
    16	
    17	  GET DIAGNOSTICS updated_rows = ROW_COUNT;
    18	  RETURN updated_rows;
    19	END;
    20	$$;
    21	
    22	CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION ops.refresh_dashboard_summary() RETURNS VOID

    27	  RETURN;
    28	END;
    29	$$;

/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba supabase/migrations/20260414001_ingest_zl_intraday.sql | sed -n '1,360p'" in /Users/zincdigital/mnt/SatechiHub/ZINC-FUSION-V16
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- =============================================================================
     2	-- ingest_zl_intraday() + rollup_zl_daily()
     3	--
     4	-- Pulls 1h ZL bars from Databento REST API into mkt.price_1h.
     5	-- Rolls up 1h bars into mkt.price_1d daily bars.
     6	-- Updates mkt.latest_price with the most recent close.
     7	-- Logs all runs to ops.ingest_run.
     8	--
     9	-- pg_cron: runs hourly. 1h bars form the daily bar progressively.
    10	-- =============================================================================
    11	
    12	-- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    13	-- Function A: ingest_zl_intraday()
    14	--
    15	-- Fetches 1h OHLCV bars from Databento for ZL continuous front-month.
    16	-- Uses the newest bar in mkt.price_1h to determine the start date.
    17	-- Databento returns NDJSON (newline-delimited JSON lines).
    18	-- Prices are fixed-point integers (divide by 1e9).
    19	-- ts_event is nanosecond epoch.
    20	-- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    21	CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION ingest_zl_intraday()
    22	RETURNS jsonb
    23	SECURITY DEFINER
    24	SET search_path = public, extensions
    25	LANGUAGE plpgsql
    26	AS $$
    27	DECLARE
    28	  api_key     TEXT;
    29	  start_date  TEXT;
    30	  end_date    TEXT;
    31	  url         TEXT;
    32	  response    http_response;
    33	  line        TEXT;
    34	  rec         JSONB;
    35	  bar_ts      TIMESTAMPTZ;
    36	  bar_open    NUMERIC;
    37	  bar_high    NUMERIC;
    38	  bar_low     NUMERIC;
    39	  bar_close   NUMERIC;
    40	  bar_volume  BIGINT;
    41	  records_in  INT := 0;
    42	  started     TIMESTAMPTZ := now();
    43	BEGIN
    44	  -- 1. Get API key from Vault
    45	  SELECT decrypted_secret INTO api_key
    46	  FROM vault.decrypted_secrets
    47	  WHERE name = 'databento_api_key_v2';
    48	
    49	  IF api_key IS NULL THEN
    50	    INSERT INTO ops.ingest_run (job_name, source, started_at, finished_at, status, records_upserted, error_message)
    51	    VALUES ('ingest_zl_intraday', 'databento', started, now(), 'failed', 0, 'Databento API key not found in Vault');
    52	    RETURN jsonb_build_object('status', 'error', 'message', 'API key not in Vault');
    53	  END IF;
    54	
    55	  -- 2. Determine date range: start from max existing 1h bar or 30 days back
    56	  SELECT COALESCE(
    57	    to_char((max(bucket_ts) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    58	    to_char((now() - interval '30 days')::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    59	  ) INTO start_date
    60	  FROM mkt.price_1h
    61	  WHERE symbol = 'ZL';
    62	
    63	  -- End = today (Databento will clamp to available data)
    64	  end_date := to_char((now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD');
    65	
    66	  -- If start = end, go back 1 day to ensure we get today's bars
    67	  IF start_date = end_date THEN
    68	    start_date := to_char(((now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - interval '1 day')::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD');
    69	  END IF;
    70	
    71	  -- 3. Call Databento REST API
    72	  url := 'https://hist.databento.com/v0/timeseries.get_range'
    73	    || '?dataset=GLBX.MDP3'
    74	    || '&symbols=ZL.c.0'
    75	    || '&schema=ohlcv-1h'
    76	    || '&stype_in=continuous'
    77	    || '&start=' || start_date
    78	    || '&end=' || end_date
    79	    || '&encoding=json';
    80	
    81	  SELECT * INTO response FROM http((
    82	    'GET',
    83	    url,
    84	    ARRAY[http_header('Authorization', 'Basic ' || encode(convert_to(api_key || ':', 'UTF8'), 'base64'))],
    85	    NULL,
    86	    NULL
    87	  )::http_request);
    88	
    89	  IF response.status != 200 THEN
    90	    INSERT INTO ops.ingest_run (job_name, source, started_at, finished_at, status, records_upserted, error_message)
    91	    VALUES ('ingest_zl_intraday', 'databento', started, now(), 'failed', 0,
    92	            'Databento HTTP ' || response.status || ': ' || left(response.content, 200));
    93	    RETURN jsonb_build_object('status', 'error', 'http_status', response.status);
    94	  END IF;
    95	
    96	  -- 4. Parse NDJSON response (one JSON object per line)
    97	  FOR line IN SELECT unnest(string_to_array(response.content, E'\n'))
    98	  LOOP
    99	    -- Skip empty lines
   100	    CONTINUE WHEN trim(line) = '';
   101	
   102	    BEGIN
   103	      rec := line::jsonb;
   104	
   105	      -- ts_event is nanosecond epoch -> convert to timestamptz
   106	      bar_ts := to_timestamp(((rec->'hd'->>'ts_event')::bigint) / 1000000000.0);
   107	
   108	      -- Prices are fixed-point (divide by 1e9)
   109	      bar_open   := (rec->>'open')::bigint   / 1000000000.0;
   110	      bar_high   := (rec->>'high')::bigint   / 1000000000.0;
   111	      bar_low    := (rec->>'low')::bigint    / 1000000000.0;
   112	      bar_close  := (rec->>'close')::bigint  / 1000000000.0;
   113	      bar_volume := (rec->>'volume')::bigint;
   114	
   115	      -- Skip bars with zero or null close
   116	      CONTINUE WHEN bar_close IS NULL OR bar_close = 0;
   117	
   118	      -- UPSERT into mkt.price_1h
   119	      INSERT INTO mkt.price_1h (symbol, bucket_ts, open, high, low, close, volume)
   120	      VALUES ('ZL', bar_ts, bar_open, bar_high, bar_low, bar_close, bar_volume)
   121	      ON CONFLICT (symbol, bucket_ts) DO UPDATE SET
   122	        open       = EXCLUDED.open,
   123	        high       = EXCLUDED.high,
   124	        low        = EXCLUDED.low,
   125	        close      = EXCLUDED.close,
   126	        volume     = EXCLUDED.volume,
   127	        ingested_at = now();
   128	
   129	      records_in := records_in + 1;
   130	
   131	    EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
   132	      -- Skip malformed lines, continue processing
   133	      CONTINUE;
   134	    END;
   135	  END LOOP;
   136	
   137	  -- 5. Log success
   138	  INSERT INTO ops.ingest_run (job_name, source, started_at, finished_at, status, records_upserted, error_message)
   139	  VALUES ('ingest_zl_intraday', 'databento', started, now(), 'ok', records_in, NULL);
   140	
   141	  RETURN jsonb_build_object('status', 'ok', 'records', records_in, 'start', start_date, 'end', end_date);
   142	END;
   143	$$;
   144	
   145	
   146	-- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   147	-- Function B: rollup_zl_daily()
   148	--
   149	-- Aggregates 1h bars from mkt.price_1h into mkt.price_1d.
   150	-- For each calendar day with 1h bars:
   151	--   open  = open of first 1h bar (by bucket_ts)
   152	--   high  = max high across all 1h bars
   153	--   low   = min low across all 1h bars
   154	--   close = close of last 1h bar (by bucket_ts)
   155	--   volume = sum of all 1h bar volumes
   156	--
   157	-- Also updates mkt.latest_price with the most recent close.
   158	-- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   159	CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION rollup_zl_daily()
   160	RETURNS jsonb
   161	SECURITY DEFINER
   162	SET search_path = public
   163	LANGUAGE plpgsql
   164	AS $$
   165	DECLARE
   166	  records_out INT := 0;
   167	  started     TIMESTAMPTZ := now();
   168	  latest_close NUMERIC;
   169	  latest_ts    TIMESTAMPTZ;
   170	BEGIN
   171	  -- 1. Aggregate 1h bars into daily bars
   172	  --    Only process days that have 1h bars newer than the latest ingested_at in price_1d,
   173	  --    OR days that don't exist in price_1d yet.
   174	  INSERT INTO mkt.price_1d (symbol, bucket_ts, open, high, low, close, volume)
   175	  SELECT
   176	    'ZL' AS symbol,
   177	    date_trunc('day', bucket_ts AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS day_ts,
   178	    (ARRAY_AGG(open ORDER BY bucket_ts ASC))[1]  AS open,
   179	    MAX(high)                                      AS high,
   180	    MIN(low)                                       AS low,
   181	    (ARRAY_AGG(close ORDER BY bucket_ts DESC))[1] AS close,
   182	    SUM(volume)                                    AS volume
   183	  FROM mkt.price_1h
   184	  WHERE symbol = 'ZL'
   185	    AND bucket_ts >= COALESCE(
   186	      (SELECT max(bucket_ts) - interval '2 days' FROM mkt.price_1d WHERE symbol = 'ZL'),
   187	      '2020-01-01'::timestamptz
   188	    )
   189	  GROUP BY date_trunc('day', bucket_ts AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')
   190	  HAVING SUM(volume) >= 100  -- skip roll artifact days (< 100 total contracts)
   191	  ON CONFLICT (symbol, bucket_ts) DO UPDATE SET
   192	    open       = EXCLUDED.open,
   193	    high       = EXCLUDED.high,
   194	    low        = EXCLUDED.low,
   195	    close      = EXCLUDED.close,
   196	    volume     = EXCLUDED.volume,
   197	    ingested_at = now();
   198	
   199	  GET DIAGNOSTICS records_out = ROW_COUNT;
   200	
   201	  -- 2. Update latest_price with most recent close
   202	  SELECT close, bucket_ts INTO latest_close, latest_ts
   203	  FROM mkt.price_1d
   204	  WHERE symbol = 'ZL'
   205	  ORDER BY bucket_ts DESC
   206	  LIMIT 1;
   207	
   208	  IF latest_close IS NOT NULL THEN
   209	    INSERT INTO mkt.latest_price (symbol, price, observed_at, ingested_at)
   210	    VALUES ('ZL', latest_close, latest_ts, now())
   211	    ON CONFLICT (symbol) DO UPDATE SET
   212	      price       = EXCLUDED.price,
   213	      observed_at = EXCLUDED.observed_at,
   214	      ingested_at = now();
   215	  END IF;
   216	
   217	  -- 3. Log success
   218	  INSERT INTO ops.ingest_run (job_name, source, started_at, finished_at, status, records_upserted, error_message)
   219	  VALUES ('rollup_zl_daily', 'rollup', started, now(), 'ok', records_out, NULL);
   220	
   221	  RETURN jsonb_build_object('status', 'ok', 'daily_bars_upserted', records_out, 'latest_price', latest_close);
   222	END;
   223	$$;
   224	
   225	
   226	-- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   227	-- pg_cron schedules: hourly, staggered off :00
   228	-- ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   229	SELECT cron.schedule('ingest_zl_intraday', '7 * * * *', $$SELECT ingest_zl_intraday()$$);
   230	SELECT cron.schedule('rollup_zl_daily',    '9 * * * *', $$SELECT rollup_zl_daily()$$);

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- =============================================================================
     2	-- Fix ZL hourly ingest freshness:
     3	-- 1) Use active continuous contract (open-interest ranked) instead of stale c.0
     4	-- 2) Bound request end to Databento schema availability to avoid lag/422 issues
     5	-- =============================================================================
     6	
     7	CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION ingest_zl_intraday()
     8	RETURNS jsonb
     9	SECURITY DEFINER
    10	SET search_path = public, extensions
    11	LANGUAGE plpgsql
    12	AS $$
    13	DECLARE
    14	  api_key      TEXT;
    15	  start_date   TEXT;
    16	  end_ts       TEXT;
    17	  url          TEXT;
    18	  meta_status  INT;
    19	  meta_body    TEXT;
    20	  resp_status  INT;
    21	  resp_body    TEXT;
    22	  line         TEXT;
    23	  rec          JSONB;
    24	  bar_ts       TIMESTAMPTZ;
    25	  bar_open     NUMERIC;
    26	  bar_high     NUMERIC;
    27	  bar_low      NUMERIC;
    28	  bar_close    NUMERIC;
    29	  bar_volume   BIGINT;
    30	  records_in   INT := 0;
    31	  started      TIMESTAMPTZ := now();
    32	BEGIN
    33	  -- 1) Databento key from Vault.
    34	  SELECT decrypted_secret INTO api_key
    35	  FROM vault.decrypted_secrets
    36	  WHERE name = 'databento_api_key_v2';
    37	
    38	  IF api_key IS NULL THEN
    39	    INSERT INTO ops.ingest_run (job_name, source, started_at, finished_at, status, records_upserted, error_message)
    40	    VALUES ('ingest_zl_intraday', 'databento', started, now(), 'failed', 0, 'Databento API key not found in Vault');
    41	    RETURN jsonb_build_object('status', 'error', 'message', 'API key not in Vault');
    42	  END IF;
    43	
    44	  -- 1b) Increase pgsql-http curl timeouts for larger Databento responses.
    45	  PERFORM extensions.http_set_curlopt('CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT_MS', '5000');
    46	  PERFORM extensions.http_set_curlopt('CURLOPT_TIMEOUT_MS', '20000');
    47	
    48	  -- 2) Always backfill a rolling window to repair stale rows across roll periods.
    49	  --    Keep the window small enough for extension HTTP timeout limits.
    50	  SELECT COALESCE(
    51	    to_char(((max(bucket_ts) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date - 2), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    52	    to_char(((now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - interval '30 days')::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    53	  ) INTO start_date
    54	  FROM mkt.price_1h
    55	  WHERE symbol = 'ZL';
    56	
    57	  -- 3) Ask Databento for the available end for ohlcv-1h (exclusive endpoint).
    58	  BEGIN
    59	    SELECT status, content
    60	      INTO meta_status, meta_body
    61	    FROM extensions.http((
    62	      'GET',
    63	      'https://hist.databento.com/v0/metadata.get_dataset_range?dataset=GLBX.MDP3',
    64	      ARRAY[extensions.http_header('Authorization', 'Basic ' || encode(convert_to(api_key || ':', 'UTF8'), 'base64'))],
    65	      NULL,
    66	      NULL
    67	    )::extensions.http_request);
    68	  EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
    69	    meta_status := NULL;
    70	    meta_body := NULL;
    71	  END;
    72	
    73	  IF meta_status = 200 THEN
    74	    BEGIN
    75	      end_ts := COALESCE(
    76	        (meta_body::jsonb #>> '{schema,ohlcv-1h,end}'),
    77	        (meta_body::jsonb ->> 'end')
    78	      );
    79	    EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
    80	      end_ts := NULL;
    81	    END;
    82	  END IF;
    83	
    84	  -- Fallback if metadata request fails/parsing fails.
    85	  IF end_ts IS NULL THEN
    86	    end_ts := to_char(
    87	      date_trunc('hour', now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'),
    88	      'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS"Z"'
    89	    );
    90	  END IF;
    91	
    92	  -- If already on the same UTC day as endpoint end, include prior day overlap.
    93	  IF start_date = left(end_ts, 10) THEN
    94	    start_date := to_char(((now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - interval '1 day')::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD');
    95	  END IF;
    96	
    97	  -- 4) Pull 1h bars.
    98	  -- NOTE: n.0 = highest open-interest contract and stays active through roll periods.
    99	  url := 'https://hist.databento.com/v0/timeseries.get_range'
   100	    || '?dataset=GLBX.MDP3'
   101	    || '&symbols=ZL.n.0'
   102	    || '&schema=ohlcv-1h'
   103	    || '&stype_in=continuous'
   104	    || '&start=' || start_date
   105	    || '&end=' || end_ts
   106	    || '&encoding=json';
   107	
   108	  SELECT status, content
   109	    INTO resp_status, resp_body
   110	  FROM extensions.http((
   111	    'GET',
   112	    url,
   113	    ARRAY[extensions.http_header('Authorization', 'Basic ' || encode(convert_to(api_key || ':', 'UTF8'), 'base64'))],
   114	    NULL,
   115	    NULL
   116	  )::extensions.http_request);
   117	
   118	  IF resp_status != 200 THEN
   119	    INSERT INTO ops.ingest_run (job_name, source, started_at, finished_at, status, records_upserted, error_message)
   120	    VALUES ('ingest_zl_intraday', 'databento', started, now(), 'failed', 0,
   121	            'Databento HTTP ' || resp_status || ': ' || left(resp_body, 200));
   122	    RETURN jsonb_build_object(
   123	      'status', 'error',
   124	      'http_status', resp_status,
   125	      'start', start_date,
   126	      'end', end_ts
   127	    );
   128	  END IF;
   129	
   130	  -- 5) Parse NDJSON and upsert.
   131	  FOR line IN SELECT unnest(string_to_array(resp_body, E'\n'))
   132	  LOOP
   133	    CONTINUE WHEN trim(line) = '';
   134	    BEGIN
   135	      rec := line::jsonb;
   136	
   137	      bar_ts := to_timestamp(((rec->'hd'->>'ts_event')::bigint) / 1000000000.0);
   138	      bar_open := (rec->>'open')::bigint / 1000000000.0;
   139	      bar_high := (rec->>'high')::bigint / 1000000000.0;
   140	      bar_low := (rec->>'low')::bigint / 1000000000.0;
   141	      bar_close := (rec->>'close')::bigint / 1000000000.0;
   142	      bar_volume := (rec->>'volume')::bigint;
   143	
   144	      CONTINUE WHEN bar_close IS NULL OR bar_close = 0;
   145	
   146	      INSERT INTO mkt.price_1h (symbol, bucket_ts, open, high, low, close, volume)
   147	      VALUES ('ZL', bar_ts, bar_open, bar_high, bar_low, bar_close, bar_volume)
   148	      ON CONFLICT (symbol, bucket_ts) DO UPDATE SET
   149	        open = EXCLUDED.open,
   150	        high = EXCLUDED.high,
   151	        low = EXCLUDED.low,
   152	        close = EXCLUDED.close,
   153	        volume = EXCLUDED.volume,
   154	        ingested_at = now();
   155	
   156	      records_in := records_in + 1;
   157	    EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
   158	      CONTINUE;
   159	    END;
   160	  END LOOP;
   161	
   162	  -- 6) Log success.
   163	  INSERT INTO ops.ingest_run (job_name, source, started_at, finished_at, status, records_upserted, error_message)
   164	  VALUES ('ingest_zl_intraday', 'databento', started, now(), 'ok', records_in, NULL);
   165	
   166	  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
   167	    'status', 'ok',
   168	    'records', records_in,
   169	    'start', start_date,
   170	    'end', end_ts,
   171	    'symbol', 'ZL.n.0'
   172	  );
   173	END;
   174	$$;

exec

     1	-- Enforce hourly-only ZL ingestion cadence.
     2	-- Hourly 1H pulls feed the intraday table, then hourly daily rollup builds the live day bar.
     3	
     4	DO $$
     5	DECLARE
     6	  job_id bigint;
     7	BEGIN
     8	  FOR job_id IN
     9	    SELECT jobid
    10	    FROM cron.job
    11	    WHERE jobname IN ('ingest_zl_intraday', 'rollup_zl_daily')
    12	       OR command ILIKE '%ingest_zl_intraday(%'
    13	       OR command ILIKE '%rollup_zl_daily(%'
    14	  LOOP
    15	    PERFORM cron.unschedule(job_id);
    16	  END LOOP;
    17	END
    18	$$;
    19

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- AI-first cadence pivot:
     2	-- keep chart freshness hourly, but cut card-driver pull frequency to weekly.
     3	-- AG training stays manual batch-triggered outside pg_cron.
     4	
     5	CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_cron;
     6	
     7	DO $$
     8	DECLARE
     9	  job_id BIGINT;
    10	BEGIN
    11	  FOR job_id IN
    12	    SELECT jobid
    13	    FROM cron.job
    14	    WHERE jobname = 'trusted_site_fill'
    15	       OR command ILIKE '%ops.ingest_trusted_site_fill(%'
    16	  LOOP
    17	    PERFORM cron.unschedule(job_id);
    18	  END LOOP;
    19	END
    20	$$;
    21	
    22	-- Weekly run: Monday 11:17 UTC (06:17 America/Chicago during CDT).
    23	SELECT cron.schedule(
    24	  'trusted_site_fill',
    25	  '17 11 * * 1',
    26	  $$SELECT ops.ingest_trusted_site_fill()$$
    27	);

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- Supabase-only trusted dashboard fill:
     2	-- refreshes analytics risk-factor metrics/attribution from live market pulls
     3	-- and carries forward non-market fields until AG training publishes fresh rows.
     4	
     5	CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION ops.ingest_trusted_site_fill()
     6	RETURNS jsonb
     7	SECURITY DEFINER
     8	SET search_path = public, extensions
     9	LANGUAGE plpgsql
    10	AS $$
    11	DECLARE
    12	  v_run_id UUID := gen_random_uuid();
    13	  started TIMESTAMPTZ := now();
    14	  v_trade_date DATE := (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York')::date;
    15	  now_et_iso TEXT := to_char(now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York', 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SSOF');
    16	  prev_date DATE;
    17	
    18	  resp_cl http_response;
    19	  resp_cny http_response;
    20	  resp_vix http_response;
    21	  resp_ovx http_response;
    22	
    23	  cl_price NUMERIC;
    24	  cl_anchor NUMERIC;
    25	  cl_change_5d NUMERIC;
    26	  cny_rate NUMERIC;
    27	  vix_value NUMERIC;
    28	  ovx_value NUMERIC;
    29	
    30	  board_crush_value NUMERIC;
    31	  oil_share_value NUMERIC;
    32	  oil_share_5d_change NUMERIC;
    33	  uncertainty_value NUMERIC;
    34	  soy_china_news_count NUMERIC;
    35	  soy_tariff_news_count NUMERIC;
    36	  macro_news_count NUMERIC;
    37	  energy_news_count NUMERIC;
    38	
    39	  vix_stress_score NUMERIC;
    40	  crush_pressure_score NUMERIC;
    41	  china_tension_score NUMERIC;
    42	  tariff_threat_score NUMERIC;
    43	  energy_stress_score NUMERIC;
    44	
    45	  avg_score NUMERIC;
    46	  top_driver_key TEXT;
    47	  top_driver_score NUMERIC;
    48	  posture TEXT;
    49	  regime TEXT;
    50	  regime_confidence NUMERIC;
    51	  v_records_upserted INT := 0;
    52	  non_null_points INT := 0;
    53	  payload JSONB;
    54	BEGIN
    55	  INSERT INTO ops.ingest_run (run_id, job_name, source, status, started_at)
    56	  VALUES (v_run_id, 'trusted_site_fill', 'supabase-http-yahoo', 'running', started);
    57	
    58	  -- Avoid transient HTTP timeout failures in pgsql-http.
    59	  PERFORM extensions.http_set_curlopt('CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT_MS', '5000');
    60	  PERFORM extensions.http_set_curlopt('CURLOPT_TIMEOUT_MS', '20000');
    61	
    62	  SELECT max(trade_date) INTO prev_date
    63	  FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    64	  WHERE trade_date <= v_trade_date;
    65	
    66	  IF prev_date IS NOT NULL THEN
    67	    SELECT metric_value INTO board_crush_value
    68	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    69	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'board_crush_value'
    70	    LIMIT 1;
    71	
    72	    SELECT metric_value INTO oil_share_value
    73	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    74	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'oil_share_value'
    75	    LIMIT 1;
    76	
    77	    SELECT metric_value INTO oil_share_5d_change
    78	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    79	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'oil_share_5d_change'
    80	    LIMIT 1;
    81	
    82	    SELECT metric_value INTO uncertainty_value
    83	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    84	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'uncertainty_value'
    85	    LIMIT 1;
    86	
    87	    SELECT metric_value INTO soy_china_news_count
    88	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    89	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'soy_china_news_count'
    90	    LIMIT 1;
    91	
    92	    SELECT metric_value INTO soy_tariff_news_count
    93	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    94	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'soy_tariff_news_count'
    95	    LIMIT 1;
    96	
    97	    SELECT metric_value INTO macro_news_count
    98	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    99	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'macro_news_count'
   100	    LIMIT 1;
   101	
   102	    SELECT metric_value INTO energy_news_count
   103	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
   104	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'energy_news_count'
   105	    LIMIT 1;
   106	  END IF;
   107	
   108	  SELECT * INTO resp_cl
   109	  FROM extensions.http_get('https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/CL%3DF?interval=1d&range=1mo');
   110	  IF resp_cl.status = 200 THEN
   111	    WITH closes AS (
   112	      SELECT ordinality AS idx, value::text::numeric AS close
   113	      FROM jsonb_array_elements(
   114	        COALESCE(resp_cl.content::jsonb #> '{chart,result,0,indicators,quote,0,close}', '[]'::jsonb)
   115	      ) WITH ORDINALITY AS e(value, ordinality)
   116	      WHERE jsonb_typeof(value) = 'number'
   117	    ),
   118	    latest AS (
   119	      SELECT idx, close FROM closes ORDER BY idx DESC LIMIT 1
   120	    ),
   121	    anchor AS (
   122	      SELECT close FROM closes WHERE idx <= (SELECT idx FROM latest) - 5 ORDER BY idx DESC LIMIT 1
   123	    )
   124	    SELECT l.close, a.close
   125	      INTO cl_price, cl_anchor
   126	    FROM latest l
   127	    LEFT JOIN anchor a ON TRUE;
   128	  END IF;
   129	  IF cl_anchor IS NOT NULL AND cl_anchor <> 0 THEN
   130	    cl_change_5d := (cl_price - cl_anchor) / cl_anchor;
   131	  END IF;
   132	
   133	  SELECT * INTO resp_cny
   134	  FROM extensions.http_get('https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/CNY%3DX?interval=1d&range=1mo');
   135	  IF resp_cny.status = 200 THEN
   136	    SELECT value::text::numeric INTO cny_rate
   137	    FROM jsonb_array_elements(
   138	      COALESCE(resp_cny.content::jsonb #> '{chart,result,0,indicators,quote,0,close}', '[]'::jsonb)
   139	    ) WITH ORDINALITY AS e(value, ordinality)
   140	    WHERE jsonb_typeof(value) = 'number'
   141	    ORDER BY ordinality DESC
   142	    LIMIT 1;
   143	  END IF;
   144	
   145	  SELECT * INTO resp_vix
   146	  FROM extensions.http_get('https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/%5EVIX?interval=1d&range=1mo');
   147	  IF resp_vix.status = 200 THEN
   148	    SELECT value::text::numeric INTO vix_value
   149	    FROM jsonb_array_elements(
   150	      COALESCE(resp_vix.content::jsonb #> '{chart,result,0,indicators,quote,0,close}', '[]'::jsonb)
   151	    ) WITH ORDINALITY AS e(value, ordinality)
   152	    WHERE jsonb_typeof(value) = 'number'
   153	    ORDER BY ordinality DESC
   154	    LIMIT 1;
   155	  END IF;
   156	
   157	  SELECT * INTO resp_ovx
   158	  FROM extensions.http_get('https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/%5EOVX?interval=1d&range=1mo');
   159	  IF resp_ovx.status = 200 THEN
   160	    SELECT value::text::numeric INTO ovx_value
   161	    FROM jsonb_array_elements(
   162	      COALESCE(resp_ovx.content::jsonb #> '{chart,result,0,indicators,quote,0,close}', '[]'::jsonb)
   163	    ) WITH ORDINALITY AS e(value, ordinality)
   164	    WHERE jsonb_typeof(value) = 'number'
   165	    ORDER BY ordinality DESC
   166	    LIMIT 1;
   167	  END IF;
   168	
   169	  -- If live pulls fail, keep last known values so the surface does not hard-break.
   170	  IF cl_price IS NULL THEN
   171	    SELECT metric_value INTO cl_price
   172	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
   173	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'cl_price'
   174	    LIMIT 1;
   175	  END IF;
   176	  IF cl_change_5d IS NULL THEN
   177	    SELECT metric_value INTO cl_change_5d
   178	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
   179	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'cl_change_5d'
   180	    LIMIT 1;
   181	  END IF;
   182	  IF cny_rate IS NULL THEN
   183	    SELECT metric_value INTO cny_rate
   184	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
   185	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'cny_rate'
   186	    LIMIT 1;
   187	  END IF;
   188	  IF vix_value IS NULL THEN
   189	    SELECT metric_value INTO vix_value
   190	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
   191	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'vix_value'
   192	    LIMIT 1;
   193	  END IF;
   194	  IF ovx_value IS NULL THEN
   195	    SELECT metric_value INTO ovx_value
   196	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
   197	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'ovx_value'
   198	    LIMIT 1;
   199	  END IF;
   200	
   201	  soy_china_news_count := COALESCE(soy_china_news_count, 0);
   202	  soy_tariff_news_count := COALESCE(soy_tariff_news_count, 0);
   203	  macro_news_count := COALESCE(macro_news_count, 0);
   204	  energy_news_count := COALESCE(energy_news_count, 0);
   205	
   206	  vix_stress_score := round((
   207	    (CASE WHEN vix_value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((vix_value - 14) / 21) * 100)) END) * 0.60 +
   208	    (CASE WHEN ovx_value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((ovx_value - 25) / 55) * 100)) END) * 0.40
   209	  )::numeric, 1);
   210	
   211	  crush_pressure_score := round((
   212	    (CASE WHEN board_crush_value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, (((4.2 - board_crush_value) - 0.0) / 3.5) * 100)) END) * 0.70 +
   213	    (CASE WHEN oil_share_5d_change IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((abs(oil_share_5d_change) - 0.2) / 3.8) * 100)) END) * 0.30
   214	  )::numeric, 1);
   215	
   216	  china_tension_score := round((
   217	    (CASE WHEN cny_rate IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((abs(cny_rate - 7.0) - 0.02) / 0.33) * 100)) END) * 0.70 +
   218	    (GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((soy_china_news_count - 2) / 28) * 100))) * 0.30
   219	  )::numeric, 1);
   220	
   221	  tariff_threat_score := round((
   222	    (CASE WHEN uncertainty_value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((uncertainty_value - 150) / 400) * 100)) END) * 0.70 +
   223	    (GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, (((soy_tariff_news_count + macro_news_count) - 4) / 36) * 100))) * 0.30
   224	  )::numeric, 1);
   225	
   226	  energy_stress_score := round((
   227	    (CASE WHEN cl_change_5d IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, (((abs(cl_change_5d * 100)) - 0.8) / 9.2) * 100)) END) * 0.55 +
   228	    (CASE WHEN ovx_value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((ovx_value - 25) / 55) * 100)) END) * 0.30 +
   229	    (GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((energy_news_count - 2) / 28) * 100))) * 0.15
   230	  )::numeric, 1);
   231	
   232	  avg_score := round(((vix_stress_score + crush_pressure_score + china_tension_score + tariff_threat_score + energy_stress_score) / 5.0)::numeric, 1);
   233	
   234	  top_driver_key := 'vix_stress';
   235	  top_driver_score := vix_stress_score;
   236	  IF crush_pressure_score > top_driver_score THEN
   237	    top_driver_key := 'crush_pressure';
   238	    top_driver_score := crush_pressure_score;
   239	  END IF;
   240	  IF china_tension_score > top_driver_score THEN
   241	    top_driver_key := 'china_tension';
   242	    top_driver_score := china_tension_score;
   243	  END IF;
   244	  IF tariff_threat_score > top_driver_score THEN
   245	    top_driver_key := 'tariff_threat';
   246	    top_driver_score := tariff_threat_score;
   247	  END IF;
   248	  IF energy_stress_score > top_driver_score THEN
   249	    top_driver_key := 'energy_stress';
   250	    top_driver_score := energy_stress_score;
   251	  END IF;
   252	
   253	  IF avg_score >= 78 AND top_driver_score >= 85 THEN
   254	    posture := 'DEFER';
   255	  ELSIF avg_score >= 62 THEN
   256	    posture := 'WAIT';
   257	  ELSE
   258	    posture := 'ACCUMULATE';
   259	  END IF;
   260	
   261	  IF avg_score >= 70 THEN
   262	    regime := 'SUPPLY_CRISIS';
   263	  ELSIF avg_score >= 55 THEN
   264	    regime := 'BEARISH';
   265	  ELSIF avg_score <= 30 THEN
   266	    regime := 'BULLISH';
   267	  ELSE
   268	    regime := 'NEUTRAL';
   269	  END IF;
   270	
   271	  non_null_points :=
   272	    (CASE WHEN cl_price IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   273	    (CASE WHEN cl_change_5d IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   274	    (CASE WHEN cny_rate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   275	    (CASE WHEN vix_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   276	    (CASE WHEN ovx_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   277	    (CASE WHEN board_crush_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   278	    (CASE WHEN oil_share_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   279	    (CASE WHEN oil_share_5d_change IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   280	    (CASE WHEN uncertainty_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END);
   281	  regime_confidence := round(LEAST(0.95, 0.45 + non_null_points * 0.05)::numeric, 4);
   282	
   283	  payload := jsonb_build_object(
   284	    'source', 'supabase_pg_cron_trusted_fill',
   285	    'asOf', now_et_iso,
   286	    'carriedFromDate', prev_date,
   287	    'pulledBy', 'ops.ingest_trusted_site_fill'
   288	  );
   289	
   290	  INSERT INTO analytics.dashboard_metrics (trade_date, metric_key, metric_value, payload)
   291	  VALUES
   292	    (v_trade_date, 'vix_value', vix_value, payload),
   293	    (v_trade_date, 'ovx_value', ovx_value, payload),
   294	    (v_trade_date, 'cl_price', cl_price, payload),
   295	    (v_trade_date, 'cl_change_5d', cl_change_5d, payload),
   296	    (v_trade_date, 'oil_change_5d', cl_change_5d, payload),
   297	    (v_trade_date, 'cny_rate', cny_rate, payload),
   298	    (v_trade_date, 'board_crush_value', board_crush_value, payload),
   299	    (v_trade_date, 'oil_share_value', oil_share_value, payload),
   300	    (v_trade_date, 'oil_share_5d_change', oil_share_5d_change, payload),
   301	    (v_trade_date, 'uncertainty_value', uncertainty_value, payload),
   302	    (v_trade_date, 'tpu_value', uncertainty_value, payload),
   303	    (v_trade_date, 'soy_china_news_count', soy_china_news_count, payload),
   304	    (v_trade_date, 'soy_tariff_news_count', soy_tariff_news_count, payload),
   305	    (v_trade_date, 'macro_news_count', macro_news_count, payload),
   306	    (v_trade_date, 'energy_news_count', energy_news_count, payload),
   307	    (v_trade_date, 'vix_stress_score', vix_stress_score, payload),
   308	    (v_trade_date, 'crush_pressure_score', crush_pressure_score, payload),
   309	    (v_trade_date, 'china_tension_score', china_tension_score, payload),
   310	    (v_trade_date, 'tariff_threat_score', tariff_threat_score, payload),
   311	    (v_trade_date, 'energy_stress_score', energy_stress_score, payload)
   312	  ON CONFLICT (trade_date, metric_key) DO UPDATE
   313	    SET metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value,
   314	        payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
   315	        ingested_at = now();
   316	  GET DIAGNOSTICS v_records_upserted = ROW_COUNT;
   317	
   318	  INSERT INTO analytics.driver_attribution_1d (trade_date, rank, factor, contribution, confidence, payload)
   319	  VALUES
   320	    (v_trade_date, 1, 'energy_transmission', energy_stress_score, round(LEAST(0.95, 0.5 + abs(energy_stress_score - 50.0) / 120.0)::numeric, 4), payload),
   321	    (v_trade_date, 2, 'macro_policy_uncertainty', tariff_threat_score, round(LEAST(0.95, 0.5 + abs(tariff_threat_score - 50.0) / 120.0)::numeric, 4), payload),
   322	    (v_trade_date, 3, 'china_flow_currency', china_tension_score, round(LEAST(0.95, 0.5 + abs(china_tension_score - 50.0) / 120.0)::numeric, 4), payload),
   323	    (v_trade_date, 4, 'crush_margin_oil_share', crush_pressure_score, round(LEAST(0.95, 0.5 + abs(crush_pressure_score - 50.0) / 120.0)::numeric, 4), payload),
   324	    (v_trade_date, 5, 'vix_volatility_regime', vix_stress_score, round(LEAST(0.95, 0.5 + abs(vix_stress_score - 50.0) / 120.0)::numeric, 4), payload)
   325	  ON CONFLICT (trade_date, rank) DO UPDATE
   326	    SET factor = EXCLUDED.factor,
   327	        contribution = EXCLUDED.contribution,
   328	        confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
   329	        payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
   330	        ingested_at = now();
   331	
   332	  INSERT INTO analytics.market_posture (trade_date, posture, rationale, payload)
   333	  VALUES (
   334	    v_trade_date,
   335	    posture,
   336	    format(
   337	      'Buyer posture %s from average score %s; top channel %s at %s.',
   338	      posture,
   339	      to_char(avg_score, 'FM999990.0'),
   340	      top_driver_key,
   341	      to_char(top_driver_score, 'FM999990.0')
   342	    ),
   343	    jsonb_build_object('averageScore', avg_score, 'topDriver', top_driver_key, 'topDriverScore', top_driver_score, 'asOf', now_et_iso, 'source', 'supabase_pg_cron_trusted_fill')
   344	  )
   345	  ON CONFLICT (trade_date) DO UPDATE
   346	    SET posture = EXCLUDED.posture,
   347	        rationale = EXCLUDED.rationale,
   348	        payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
   349	        ingested_at = now();
   350	
   351	  INSERT INTO analytics.regime_state_1d (trade_date, regime, confidence, payload)
   352	  VALUES (
   353	    v_trade_date,
   354	    regime,
   355	    regime_confidence,
   356	    jsonb_build_object('averageScore', avg_score, 'asOf', now_et_iso, 'source', 'supabase_pg_cron_trusted_fill')
   357	  )
   358	  ON CONFLICT (trade_date) DO UPDATE
   359	    SET regime = EXCLUDED.regime,
   360	        confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
   361	        payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
   362	        ingested_at = now();
   363	
   364	  UPDATE ops.ingest_run
   365	  SET status = 'ok',
   366	      finished_at = now(),
   367	      records_upserted = v_records_upserted,
   368	      error_message = NULL,
   369	      ingested_at = now()
   370	  WHERE run_id = v_run_id;
   371	
   372	  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
   373	    'status', 'ok',
   374	    'tradeDate', v_trade_date,
   375	    'recordsUpserted', v_records_upserted,
   376	    'topDriver', top_driver_key,
   377	    'topScore', top_driver_score,
   378	    'averageScore', avg_score
   379	  );

     4	export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
     5	  return twMerge(clsx(inputs));

    10	  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL &&
    11	  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY;
     1	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2	
     3	import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
     4	
     5	export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
     6	  const requestUrl = new URL(request.url);
     7	  const code = requestUrl.searchParams.get("code");
     8	  const next = requestUrl.searchParams.get("next") ?? "/dashboard";
     9	  const safeNext = next.startsWith("/") && !next.startsWith("//") ? next : "/dashboard";
    10	
    11	  if (code) {
    12	    const supabase = await createClient();
    13	    await supabase.auth.exchangeCodeForSession(code);
    14	  }
    15	
    16	  return NextResponse.redirect(new URL(safeNext, requestUrl.origin));
    17	}
     1	const LOCAL_HOSTNAMES = new Set(["localhost", "127.0.0.1"]);
     2	const DEFAULT_PROD_SITE_URL = "https://zinc-fusion-v16.vercel.app";
     3	
     4	function normalizeBaseUrl(url: string): string {
     5	  let parsed: URL;
     6	
     7	  try {
     8	    parsed = new URL(url);
     9	  } catch {
    10	    throw new Error(
    11	      "Invalid NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL. Use a full URL like https://zinc-fusion-v16.vercel.app",
    12	    );
    13	  }
    14	
    15	  if (parsed.protocol !== "http:" && parsed.protocol !== "https:") {
    16	    throw new Error(
    17	      "Invalid NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL protocol. Use http:// or https://",
    18	    );
    19	  }
    20	
    21	  return parsed.origin;
    22	}
    23	
    24	export function getAuthBaseUrl(): string {
    25	  const configuredUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL?.trim();
    26	
    27	  if (configuredUrl) {
    28	    return normalizeBaseUrl(configuredUrl);
    29	  }
    30	
    31	  if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
    32	    const { hostname, origin } = window.location;
    33	
    34	    if (
    35	      LOCAL_HOSTNAMES.has(hostname) ||
    36	      hostname.endsWith(".local") ||
    37	      hostname.endsWith(".localhost")
    38	    ) {
    39	      return origin;
    40	    }
    41	  }
    42	
    43	  return normalizeBaseUrl(DEFAULT_PROD_SITE_URL);
    44	}
    45	
    46	export function buildAuthRedirectUrl(path: string): string {
    47	  if (!path.startsWith("/")) {
    48	    throw new Error(`Auth redirect path must start with '/': received '${path}'`);
    49	  }
    50	
    51	  return `${getAuthBaseUrl()}${path}`;
    52	}
