/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba supabase/migrations/202605080003_supabase_trusted_site_fill_hourly.sql | sed -n '1,420p'" in /Users/zincdigital/mnt/SatechiHub/ZINC-FUSION-V16
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- Supabase-only trusted dashboard fill:
     2	-- refreshes analytics risk-factor metrics/attribution from live market pulls
     3	-- and carries forward non-market fields until AG training publishes fresh rows.
     4	
     5	CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION ops.ingest_trusted_site_fill()
     6	RETURNS jsonb
     7	SECURITY DEFINER
     8	SET search_path = public, extensions
     9	LANGUAGE plpgsql
    10	AS $$
    11	DECLARE
    12	  v_run_id UUID := gen_random_uuid();
    13	  started TIMESTAMPTZ := now();
    14	  v_trade_date DATE := (now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York')::date;
    15	  now_et_iso TEXT := to_char(now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York', 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SSOF');
    16	  prev_date DATE;
    17	
    18	  resp_cl http_response;
    19	  resp_cny http_response;
    20	  resp_vix http_response;
    21	  resp_ovx http_response;
    22	
    23	  cl_price NUMERIC;
    24	  cl_anchor NUMERIC;
    25	  cl_change_5d NUMERIC;
    26	  cny_rate NUMERIC;
    27	  vix_value NUMERIC;
    28	  ovx_value NUMERIC;
    29	
    30	  board_crush_value NUMERIC;
    31	  oil_share_value NUMERIC;
    32	  oil_share_5d_change NUMERIC;
    33	  uncertainty_value NUMERIC;
    34	  soy_china_news_count NUMERIC;
    35	  soy_tariff_news_count NUMERIC;
    36	  macro_news_count NUMERIC;
    37	  energy_news_count NUMERIC;
    38	
    39	  vix_stress_score NUMERIC;
    40	  crush_pressure_score NUMERIC;
    41	  china_tension_score NUMERIC;
    42	  tariff_threat_score NUMERIC;
    43	  energy_stress_score NUMERIC;
    44	
    45	  avg_score NUMERIC;
    46	  top_driver_key TEXT;
    47	  top_driver_score NUMERIC;
    48	  posture TEXT;
    49	  regime TEXT;
    50	  regime_confidence NUMERIC;
    51	  v_records_upserted INT := 0;
    52	  non_null_points INT := 0;
    53	  payload JSONB;
    54	BEGIN
    55	  INSERT INTO ops.ingest_run (run_id, job_name, source, status, started_at)
    56	  VALUES (v_run_id, 'trusted_site_fill', 'supabase-http-yahoo', 'running', started);
    57	
    58	  -- Avoid transient HTTP timeout failures in pgsql-http.
    59	  PERFORM extensions.http_set_curlopt('CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT_MS', '5000');
    60	  PERFORM extensions.http_set_curlopt('CURLOPT_TIMEOUT_MS', '20000');
    61	
    62	  SELECT max(trade_date) INTO prev_date
    63	  FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    64	  WHERE trade_date <= v_trade_date;
    65	
    66	  IF prev_date IS NOT NULL THEN
    67	    SELECT metric_value INTO board_crush_value
    68	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    69	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'board_crush_value'
    70	    LIMIT 1;
    71	
    72	    SELECT metric_value INTO oil_share_value
    73	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    74	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'oil_share_value'
    75	    LIMIT 1;
    76	
    77	    SELECT metric_value INTO oil_share_5d_change
    78	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    79	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'oil_share_5d_change'
    80	    LIMIT 1;
    81	
    82	    SELECT metric_value INTO uncertainty_value
    83	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    84	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'uncertainty_value'
    85	    LIMIT 1;
    86	
    87	    SELECT metric_value INTO soy_china_news_count
    88	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    89	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'soy_china_news_count'
    90	    LIMIT 1;
    91	
    92	    SELECT metric_value INTO soy_tariff_news_count
    93	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    94	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'soy_tariff_news_count'
    95	    LIMIT 1;
    96	
    97	    SELECT metric_value INTO macro_news_count
    98	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
    99	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'macro_news_count'
   100	    LIMIT 1;
   101	
   102	    SELECT metric_value INTO energy_news_count
   103	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
   104	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'energy_news_count'
   105	    LIMIT 1;
   106	  END IF;
   107	
   108	  SELECT * INTO resp_cl
   109	  FROM extensions.http_get('https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/CL%3DF?interval=1d&range=1mo');
   110	  IF resp_cl.status = 200 THEN
   111	    WITH closes AS (
   112	      SELECT ordinality AS idx, value::text::numeric AS close
   113	      FROM jsonb_array_elements(
   114	        COALESCE(resp_cl.content::jsonb #> '{chart,result,0,indicators,quote,0,close}', '[]'::jsonb)
   115	      ) WITH ORDINALITY AS e(value, ordinality)
   116	      WHERE jsonb_typeof(value) = 'number'
   117	    ),
   118	    latest AS (
   119	      SELECT idx, close FROM closes ORDER BY idx DESC LIMIT 1
   120	    ),
   121	    anchor AS (
   122	      SELECT close FROM closes WHERE idx <= (SELECT idx FROM latest) - 5 ORDER BY idx DESC LIMIT 1
   123	    )
   124	    SELECT l.close, a.close
   125	      INTO cl_price, cl_anchor
   126	    FROM latest l
   127	    LEFT JOIN anchor a ON TRUE;
   128	  END IF;
   129	  IF cl_anchor IS NOT NULL AND cl_anchor <> 0 THEN
   130	    cl_change_5d := (cl_price - cl_anchor) / cl_anchor;
   131	  END IF;
   132	
   133	  SELECT * INTO resp_cny
   134	  FROM extensions.http_get('https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/CNY%3DX?interval=1d&range=1mo');
   135	  IF resp_cny.status = 200 THEN
   136	    SELECT value::text::numeric INTO cny_rate
   137	    FROM jsonb_array_elements(
   138	      COALESCE(resp_cny.content::jsonb #> '{chart,result,0,indicators,quote,0,close}', '[]'::jsonb)
   139	    ) WITH ORDINALITY AS e(value, ordinality)
   140	    WHERE jsonb_typeof(value) = 'number'
   141	    ORDER BY ordinality DESC
   142	    LIMIT 1;
   143	  END IF;
   144	
   145	  SELECT * INTO resp_vix
   146	  FROM extensions.http_get('https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/%5EVIX?interval=1d&range=1mo');
   147	  IF resp_vix.status = 200 THEN
   148	    SELECT value::text::numeric INTO vix_value
   149	    FROM jsonb_array_elements(
   150	      COALESCE(resp_vix.content::jsonb #> '{chart,result,0,indicators,quote,0,close}', '[]'::jsonb)
   151	    ) WITH ORDINALITY AS e(value, ordinality)
   152	    WHERE jsonb_typeof(value) = 'number'
   153	    ORDER BY ordinality DESC
   154	    LIMIT 1;
   155	  END IF;
   156	
   157	  SELECT * INTO resp_ovx
   158	  FROM extensions.http_get('https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/%5EOVX?interval=1d&range=1mo');
   159	  IF resp_ovx.status = 200 THEN
   160	    SELECT value::text::numeric INTO ovx_value
   161	    FROM jsonb_array_elements(
   162	      COALESCE(resp_ovx.content::jsonb #> '{chart,result,0,indicators,quote,0,close}', '[]'::jsonb)
   163	    ) WITH ORDINALITY AS e(value, ordinality)
   164	    WHERE jsonb_typeof(value) = 'number'
   165	    ORDER BY ordinality DESC
   166	    LIMIT 1;
   167	  END IF;
   168	
   169	  -- If live pulls fail, keep last known values so the surface does not hard-break.
   170	  IF cl_price IS NULL THEN
   171	    SELECT metric_value INTO cl_price
   172	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
   173	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'cl_price'
   174	    LIMIT 1;
   175	  END IF;
   176	  IF cl_change_5d IS NULL THEN
   177	    SELECT metric_value INTO cl_change_5d
   178	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
   179	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'cl_change_5d'
   180	    LIMIT 1;
   181	  END IF;
   182	  IF cny_rate IS NULL THEN
   183	    SELECT metric_value INTO cny_rate
   184	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
   185	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'cny_rate'
   186	    LIMIT 1;
   187	  END IF;
   188	  IF vix_value IS NULL THEN
   189	    SELECT metric_value INTO vix_value
   190	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
   191	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'vix_value'
   192	    LIMIT 1;
   193	  END IF;
   194	  IF ovx_value IS NULL THEN
   195	    SELECT metric_value INTO ovx_value
   196	    FROM analytics.dashboard_metrics
   197	    WHERE trade_date = prev_date AND metric_key = 'ovx_value'
   198	    LIMIT 1;
   199	  END IF;
   200	
   201	  soy_china_news_count := COALESCE(soy_china_news_count, 0);
   202	  soy_tariff_news_count := COALESCE(soy_tariff_news_count, 0);
   203	  macro_news_count := COALESCE(macro_news_count, 0);
   204	  energy_news_count := COALESCE(energy_news_count, 0);
   205	
   206	  vix_stress_score := round((
   207	    (CASE WHEN vix_value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((vix_value - 14) / 21) * 100)) END) * 0.60 +
   208	    (CASE WHEN ovx_value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((ovx_value - 25) / 55) * 100)) END) * 0.40
   209	  )::numeric, 1);
   210	
   211	  crush_pressure_score := round((
   212	    (CASE WHEN board_crush_value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, (((4.2 - board_crush_value) - 0.0) / 3.5) * 100)) END) * 0.70 +
   213	    (CASE WHEN oil_share_5d_change IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((abs(oil_share_5d_change) - 0.2) / 3.8) * 100)) END) * 0.30
   214	  )::numeric, 1);
   215	
   216	  china_tension_score := round((
   217	    (CASE WHEN cny_rate IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((abs(cny_rate - 7.0) - 0.02) / 0.33) * 100)) END) * 0.70 +
   218	    (GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((soy_china_news_count - 2) / 28) * 100))) * 0.30
   219	  )::numeric, 1);
   220	
   221	  tariff_threat_score := round((
   222	    (CASE WHEN uncertainty_value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((uncertainty_value - 150) / 400) * 100)) END) * 0.70 +
   223	    (GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, (((soy_tariff_news_count + macro_news_count) - 4) / 36) * 100))) * 0.30
   224	  )::numeric, 1);
   225	
   226	  energy_stress_score := round((
   227	    (CASE WHEN cl_change_5d IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, (((abs(cl_change_5d * 100)) - 0.8) / 9.2) * 100)) END) * 0.55 +
   228	    (CASE WHEN ovx_value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((ovx_value - 25) / 55) * 100)) END) * 0.30 +
   229	    (GREATEST(0, LEAST(100, ((energy_news_count - 2) / 28) * 100))) * 0.15
   230	  )::numeric, 1);
   231	
   232	  avg_score := round(((vix_stress_score + crush_pressure_score + china_tension_score + tariff_threat_score + energy_stress_score) / 5.0)::numeric, 1);
   233	
   234	  top_driver_key := 'vix_stress';
   235	  top_driver_score := vix_stress_score;
   236	  IF crush_pressure_score > top_driver_score THEN
   237	    top_driver_key := 'crush_pressure';
   238	    top_driver_score := crush_pressure_score;
   239	  END IF;
   240	  IF china_tension_score > top_driver_score THEN
   241	    top_driver_key := 'china_tension';
   242	    top_driver_score := china_tension_score;
   243	  END IF;
   244	  IF tariff_threat_score > top_driver_score THEN
   245	    top_driver_key := 'tariff_threat';
   246	    top_driver_score := tariff_threat_score;
   247	  END IF;
   248	  IF energy_stress_score > top_driver_score THEN
   249	    top_driver_key := 'energy_stress';
   250	    top_driver_score := energy_stress_score;
   251	  END IF;
   252	
   253	  IF avg_score >= 78 AND top_driver_score >= 85 THEN
   254	    posture := 'DEFER';
   255	  ELSIF avg_score >= 62 THEN
   256	    posture := 'WAIT';
   257	  ELSE
   258	    posture := 'ACCUMULATE';
   259	  END IF;
   260	
   261	  IF avg_score >= 70 THEN
   262	    regime := 'SUPPLY_CRISIS';
   263	  ELSIF avg_score >= 55 THEN
   264	    regime := 'BEARISH';
   265	  ELSIF avg_score <= 30 THEN
   266	    regime := 'BULLISH';
   267	  ELSE
   268	    regime := 'NEUTRAL';
   269	  END IF;
   270	
   271	  non_null_points :=
   272	    (CASE WHEN cl_price IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   273	    (CASE WHEN cl_change_5d IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   274	    (CASE WHEN cny_rate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   275	    (CASE WHEN vix_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   276	    (CASE WHEN ovx_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   277	    (CASE WHEN board_crush_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   278	    (CASE WHEN oil_share_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   279	    (CASE WHEN oil_share_5d_change IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
   280	    (CASE WHEN uncertainty_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END);
   281	  regime_confidence := round(LEAST(0.95, 0.45 + non_null_points * 0.05)::numeric, 4);
   282	
   283	  payload := jsonb_build_object(
   284	    'source', 'supabase_pg_cron_trusted_fill',
   285	    'asOf', now_et_iso,
   286	    'carriedFromDate', prev_date,
   287	    'pulledBy', 'ops.ingest_trusted_site_fill'
   288	  );
   289	
   290	  INSERT INTO analytics.dashboard_metrics (trade_date, metric_key, metric_value, payload)
   291	  VALUES
   292	    (v_trade_date, 'vix_value', vix_value, payload),
   293	    (v_trade_date, 'ovx_value', ovx_value, payload),
   294	    (v_trade_date, 'cl_price', cl_price, payload),
   295	    (v_trade_date, 'cl_change_5d', cl_change_5d, payload),
   296	    (v_trade_date, 'oil_change_5d', cl_change_5d, payload),
   297	    (v_trade_date, 'cny_rate', cny_rate, payload),
   298	    (v_trade_date, 'board_crush_value', board_crush_value, payload),
   299	    (v_trade_date, 'oil_share_value', oil_share_value, payload),
   300	    (v_trade_date, 'oil_share_5d_change', oil_share_5d_change, payload),
   301	    (v_trade_date, 'uncertainty_value', uncertainty_value, payload),
   302	    (v_trade_date, 'tpu_value', uncertainty_value, payload),
   303	    (v_trade_date, 'soy_china_news_count', soy_china_news_count, payload),
   304	    (v_trade_date, 'soy_tariff_news_count', soy_tariff_news_count, payload),
   305	    (v_trade_date, 'macro_news_count', macro_news_count, payload),
   306	    (v_trade_date, 'energy_news_count', energy_news_count, payload),
   307	    (v_trade_date, 'vix_stress_score', vix_stress_score, payload),
   308	    (v_trade_date, 'crush_pressure_score', crush_pressure_score, payload),
   309	    (v_trade_date, 'china_tension_score', china_tension_score, payload),
   310	    (v_trade_date, 'tariff_threat_score', tariff_threat_score, payload),
   311	    (v_trade_date, 'energy_stress_score', energy_stress_score, payload)
   312	  ON CONFLICT (trade_date, metric_key) DO UPDATE
   313	    SET metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value,
   314	        payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
   315	        ingested_at = now();
   316	  GET DIAGNOSTICS v_records_upserted = ROW_COUNT;
   317	
   318	  INSERT INTO analytics.driver_attribution_1d (trade_date, rank, factor, contribution, confidence, payload)
   319	  VALUES
   320	    (v_trade_date, 1, 'energy_transmission', energy_stress_score, round(LEAST(0.95, 0.5 + abs(energy_stress_score - 50.0) / 120.0)::numeric, 4), payload),
   321	    (v_trade_date, 2, 'macro_policy_uncertainty', tariff_threat_score, round(LEAST(0.95, 0.5 + abs(tariff_threat_score - 50.0) / 120.0)::numeric, 4), payload),
   322	    (v_trade_date, 3, 'china_flow_currency', china_tension_score, round(LEAST(0.95, 0.5 + abs(china_tension_score - 50.0) / 120.0)::numeric, 4), payload),
   323	    (v_trade_date, 4, 'crush_margin_oil_share', crush_pressure_score, round(LEAST(0.95, 0.5 + abs(crush_pressure_score - 50.0) / 120.0)::numeric, 4), payload),
   324	    (v_trade_date, 5, 'vix_volatility_regime', vix_stress_score, round(LEAST(0.95, 0.5 + abs(vix_stress_score - 50.0) / 120.0)::numeric, 4), payload)
   325	  ON CONFLICT (trade_date, rank) DO UPDATE
   326	    SET factor = EXCLUDED.factor,
   327	        contribution = EXCLUDED.contribution,
   328	        confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
   329	        payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
   330	        ingested_at = now();
   331	
   332	  INSERT INTO analytics.market_posture (trade_date, posture, rationale, payload)
   333	  VALUES (
   334	    v_trade_date,
   335	    posture,
   336	    format(
   337	      'Buyer posture %s from average score %s; top channel %s at %s.',
   338	      posture,
   339	      to_char(avg_score, 'FM999990.0'),
   340	      top_driver_key,
   341	      to_char(top_driver_score, 'FM999990.0')
   342	    ),
   343	    jsonb_build_object('averageScore', avg_score, 'topDriver', top_driver_key, 'topDriverScore', top_driver_score, 'asOf', now_et_iso, 'source', 'supabase_pg_cron_trusted_fill')
   344	  )
   345	  ON CONFLICT (trade_date) DO UPDATE
   346	    SET posture = EXCLUDED.posture,
   347	        rationale = EXCLUDED.rationale,
   348	        payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
   349	        ingested_at = now();
   350	
   351	  INSERT INTO analytics.regime_state_1d (trade_date, regime, confidence, payload)
   352	  VALUES (
   353	    v_trade_date,
   354	    regime,
   355	    regime_confidence,
   356	    jsonb_build_object('averageScore', avg_score, 'asOf', now_et_iso, 'source', 'supabase_pg_cron_trusted_fill')
   357	  )
   358	  ON CONFLICT (trade_date) DO UPDATE
   359	    SET regime = EXCLUDED.regime,
   360	        confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
   361	        payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
   362	        ingested_at = now();
   363	
   364	  UPDATE ops.ingest_run
   365	  SET status = 'ok',
   366	      finished_at = now(),
   367	      records_upserted = v_records_upserted,
   368	      error_message = NULL,
   369	      ingested_at = now()
   370	  WHERE run_id = v_run_id;
   371	
   372	  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
   373	    'status', 'ok',
   374	    'tradeDate', v_trade_date,
   375	    'recordsUpserted', v_records_upserted,
   376	    'topDriver', top_driver_key,
   377	    'topScore', top_driver_score,
   378	    'averageScore', avg_score
   379	  );
   380	EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
   381	  UPDATE ops.ingest_run
   382	  SET status = 'error',
   383	      finished_at = now(),
   384	      error_message = left(SQLERRM, 1000),
   385	      ingested_at = now()
   386	  WHERE run_id = v_run_id;
   387	  RETURN jsonb_build_object('status', 'error', 'message', SQLERRM);
   388	END;
   389	$$;
   390	
   391	DO $$
   392	DECLARE
   393	  job_id BIGINT;
   394	BEGIN
   395	  FOR job_id IN
   396	    SELECT jobid
   397	    FROM cron.job
   398	    WHERE jobname = 'trusted_site_fill'
   399	       OR command ILIKE '%ops.ingest_trusted_site_fill(%'
   400	  LOOP
   401	    PERFORM cron.unschedule(job_id);
   402	  END LOOP;
   403	END
   404	$$;
   405	
   406	-- Hourly refresh at :17 to keep dashboard drivers fresh without high-frequency pull cost.
   407	SELECT cron.schedule(
   408	  'trusted_site_fill',
   409	  '17 * * * *',
   410	  $$SELECT ops.ingest_trusted_site_fill()$$
   411	);

    24	  headline: string

    31	interface IntelligenceData {
    32	  headline: string
    33	  summary: string

    40	interface MarketDriversResponse {
    41	  as_of_date: string | null
    42	  as_of_date_min?: string
    43	  as_of_date_max?: string
    44	  mixed_vintage?: boolean
    45	  drivers: {
    46	    vix_stress: DriverData
    47	    crush_pressure: DriverData
    48	    china_tension: DriverData
    49	    tariff_threat: DriverData
    50	    energy_stress?: DriverData
    51	  }

    53	    average_pressure: number

    59	
    60	function formatFreshnessLabel(
    61	  payload: Pick<MarketDriversResponse, "as_of_date" | "as_of_date_min" | "as_of_date_max" | "mixed_vintage"> | null | undefined,
    62	): string | null {
    63	  if (!payload) return null
    64	  if (payload.mixed_vintage && payload.as_of_date_min && payload.as_of_date_max) {
    65	    return `Mixed vintage ${payload.as_of_date_min} to ${payload.as_of_date_max}`
    66	  }
    67	  return payload.as_of_date ? `Data as of ${payload.as_of_date}` : null
    68	}
    69	
    70	function formatFreshnessSummary(
    71	  payload: Pick<MarketDriversResponse, "as_of_date" | "as_of_date_min" | "as_of_date_max" | "mixed_vintage"> | null | undefined,
    72	): string {
    73	  if (!payload) return "–"
    74	  if (payload.mixed_vintage && payload.as_of_date_min && payload.as_of_date_max) {
    75	    return `${payload.as_of_date_min} to ${payload.as_of_date_max}`
    76	  }
    77	  return payload.as_of_date ?? "–"
    78	}

   114	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   115	// Score → color
   116	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   117	
   118	function getScoreColor(score: number): { stroke: string; glow: string } {
   119	  const s = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, score))
   120	  if (s <= 25) return { stroke: "#22C55E", glow: "rgba(34,197,94,0.5)" }
   121	  if (s <= 40) {
   122	    const t = (s - 25) / 15
   123	    return {
   124	      stroke: `rgb(${Math.round(34 + (234 - 34) * t)}, ${Math.round(197 - (197 - 179) * t)}, ${Math.round(94 - (94 - 8) * t)})`,
   125	      glow: `rgba(${Math.round(34 + (234 - 34) * t)}, ${Math.round(197 - (197 - 179) * t)}, ${Math.round(94 - (94 - 8) * t)}, 0.5)`,
   126	    }
   127	  }
   128	  if (s <= 55) return { stroke: "#EAB308", glow: "rgba(234,179,8,0.5)" }
   129	  if (s <= 70) {
   130	    const t = (s - 55) / 15
   131	    return {
   132	      stroke: `rgb(${Math.round(234 + (239 - 234) * t)}, ${Math.round(179 - (179 - 115) * t)}, ${Math.round(8 + (0 - 8) * t)})`,
   133	      glow: `rgba(${Math.round(234 + (239 - 234) * t)}, ${Math.round(179 - (179 - 115) * t)}, ${Math.round(8 + (0 - 8) * t)}, 0.5)`,
   134	    }
   135	  }
   136	  if (s <= 85) return { stroke: "#EF7300", glow: "rgba(239,115,0,0.5)" }
   137	  return { stroke: "#EF4444", glow: "rgba(239,68,68,0.6)" }
   138	}
   139	
   140	function getScoreTextColor(score: number | null): string {
   141	  if (score === null) return "text-slate-500"
   142	  if (score >= 70) return "text-red-400"
   143	  if (score >= 55) return "text-orange-400"
   144	  if (score >= 40) return "text-amber-400"
   145	  return "text-green-400"
   146	}
   147	
   148	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   149	// Horizontal Meter
   150	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   151	
   152	function HorizontalMeter({ score }: { score: number | null }) {
   153	  if (score === null) {
   154	    return (
   155	      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 w-full">
   156	        <div className="flex-1 h-3 bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden" />
   157	        <span className="text-3xl font-bold tabular-nums min-w-[3ch] text-right text-slate-500">
   158	          --
   159	        </span>
   160	      </div>
   161	    )
   162	  }
   163	
   164	  const pct = Math.min(Math.max(score, 0), 100)
   165	  const colors = getScoreColor(score)
   166	  return (
   167	    <div className="flex items-center gap-4 w-full">
   168	      <div className="flex-1 h-3 bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   169	        <div
   170	          className="h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-700 ease-out"
   171	          style={{ width: `${pct}%`, backgroundColor: colors.stroke, boxShadow: `0 0 8px ${colors.glow}` }}
   172	        />
   173	      </div>
   174	      <span className="text-3xl font-bold tabular-nums min-w-[3ch] text-right" style={{ color: colors.stroke }}>
   175	        {Math.round(score)}
   176	      </span>
   177	    </div>
   178	  )
   179	}

   181	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   182	// Driver Card
   183	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   184	
   185	interface MetricDef {
   186	  key: string
   187	  label: string
   188	  format: (v: number | null) => string
   189	}
   190	
   191	function DriverCard({
   192	  label,
   193	  data,
   194	  metrics,
   195	  loading,
   196	}: {
   197	  label: string
   198	  data: DriverData | null
   199	  metrics: MetricDef[]
   200	  loading: boolean
   201	}) {
   202	  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false)
   203	  const score = data?.score ?? null
   204	  const level = data?.level ? (LEVEL_LABELS[data.level] ?? data.level) : "--"
   205	  const colors = getScoreColor(score ?? 0)
   206	  const wh = data?.whatsHappening
   207	
   208	  const border =
   209	    score !== null && score >= 65
   210	      ? { borderColor: colors.stroke, boxShadow: `0 0 20px ${colors.glow}` }
   211	      : { borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }
   212	
   213	  return (
   214	    <div
   215	      className="bg-[#0a0a0a] border rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300"
   216	      style={border}
   217	    >
   218	      <div className="text-base font-bold text-slate-300 uppercase tracking-wider mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
   219	        {DRIVER_NAMES[label] ?? label}
   220	        {data?.aiPowered && (
   221	          <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-300 border border-cyan-500/20">AI</span>
   222	        )}
   223	      </div>
   224	
   225	      <div className="w-full mb-2">
   226	        {loading ? (
   227	          <div className="h-3 bg-slate-700/50 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
   228	        ) : (
   229	          <HorizontalMeter score={score} />
   230	        )}
   231	      </div>
   232	
   233	      <div className={`text-lg font-medium mt-1 mb-4 ${loading ? "text-slate-600" : getScoreTextColor(score)}`}>
   234	        {loading ? "..." : level}
   235	      </div>
   236	
   237	      <div className="w-full space-y-2 border-t border-white/5 pt-4">
   238	        {metrics.map((m) => {
   239	          const val = data?.components?.[m.key] ?? null
   240	          return (
   241	            <div key={m.key} className="flex justify-between items-center text-sm">
   242	              <span className="text-slate-400">{m.label}</span>
   243	              <span className="text-slate-200 font-mono">{loading ? "--" : m.format(val)}</span>
   244	            </div>
   245	          )
   246	        })}
   247	      </div>
   248	
   249	      <div className="mt-4 text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed min-h-[40px]">
   250	        {loading ? "..." : (data?.headline ?? "--")}
   251	      </div>
   252	
   253	      {!loading && data?.dataDate && (
   254	        <div className="mt-2 text-xs text-slate-500 font-mono">Data as of: {data.dataDate}</div>
   255	      )}
   256	
   257	      {wh && !loading && (
   258	        <button
   259	          onClick={() => setExpanded(!expanded)}
   260	          className="mt-4 w-full px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium bg-slate-800/80 hover:bg-slate-700/80 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 border border-slate-700/50"
   261	        >
   262	          <span>{expanded ? "\u25BC" : "\u25B6"}</span> What&apos;s Happening?
   263	        </button>
   264	      )}
   265	
   266	      {expanded && wh && (
   267	        <div className="mt-4 w-full text-left space-y-3 animate-in slide-in-from-top-2 duration-200">
   268	          <div className="text-sm text-slate-300 leading-relaxed border-l-2 pl-3" style={{ borderColor: colors.stroke }}>
   269	            {wh.whatsHappening}
   270	          </div>
   271	          <div className="space-y-2 pt-1">
   272	            {[
   273	              { t: "Macro Context", c: wh.macroContext },
   274	              { t: "Supply & Demand", c: wh.supplyDemand },
   275	              { t: "Geopolitical", c: wh.geopolitical },
   276	              { t: "Market Sentiment", c: wh.investorSentiment },
   277	              { t: "Near-Term Outlook", c: wh.nearTermOutlook },
   278	            ].map((s) => (
   279	              <div key={s.t}>
   280	                <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">{s.t}</div>
   281	                <div className="text-sm text-slate-400 leading-snug">{s.c}</div>
   282	              </div>
   283	            ))}
   284	          </div>
   285	          <div className="mt-3 p-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/50">
   286	            <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">What This Means For You</div>
   287	            <div className="text-sm text-slate-200">{wh.zlImplication}</div>
   288	          </div>
   289	        </div>
   290	      )}
   291	    </div>
   292	  )
   293	}

   299	export function MarketRiskFactors() {
   300	  const [data, setData] = useState<MarketDriversResponse | null>(null)
   301	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
   302	
   303	  useEffect(() => {
   304	    fetch("/api/dashboard/risk-factors", { cache: "no-store" })
   305	      .then((r) => {
   306	        if (!r.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${r.status}`)
   307	        return r.json()
   308	      })
   309	      .then((json) => {
   310	        if (!json.error) setData(json as MarketDriversResponse)
   311	      })
   312	      .catch(() => {})
   313	      .finally(() => setLoading(false))
   314	  }, [])
   315	
   316	  const d = data?.drivers
   317	
   318	  return (
   319	    <div className="w-full">
   320	      {/* Section Header */}
   321	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
   322	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 pl-1 border-l-4 border-cyan-500">
   323	          <h3 className="text-base font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider">Market Risk Factors</h3>
   324	          <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-bold bg-cyan-500/10 text-cyan-400 border border-cyan-500/20">
   325	            KEY DRIVERS
   326	          </span>
   327	          {data?.summary?.alert_count != null && data.summary.alert_count > 0 && (
   328	            <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-bold bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 border border-red-500/30">
   329	              {data.summary.alert_count} ALERT{data.summary.alert_count > 1 ? "S" : ""}
   330	            </span>
   331	          )}
   332	        </div>
   333	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   334	          {formatFreshnessLabel(data) && <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">{formatFreshnessLabel(data)}</span>}
   335	        </div>
   336	      </div>
   337	
   338	      {/* Summary Bar */}
   339	      {data?.summary && (
   340	        <div className="mb-6 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3 text-sm">
   341	          <div className="rounded-lg border border-white/10 bg-black/30 px-3 py-2 text-slate-400">
   342	            Average Risk:{" "}
   343	            <span className="font-mono" style={{ color: getScoreColor(data.summary.average_pressure ?? 0).stroke }}>
   344	              {data.summary.average_pressure}
   345	            </span>
   346	          </div>
   347	          <div className="rounded-lg border border-white/10 bg-black/30 px-3 py-2 text-slate-400">
   348	            Top Concern:{" "}

   351	            </span>{" "}
   352	            (<span className="font-mono" style={{ color: getScoreColor(data.summary.highest_pressure?.score ?? 0).stroke }}>
   353	              {data.summary.highest_pressure?.score}
   354	            </span>)
   355	          </div>
   356	          <div className="rounded-lg border border-white/10 bg-black/30 px-3 py-2 text-slate-400">
   357	            Freshness: <span className="text-slate-300">{formatFreshnessSummary(data)}</span>
   358	          </div>
   359	        </div>
   360	      )}

     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useState } from "react"
     4	
     5	type IntelligenceData = {
     6	  headline: string
     7	  summary: string
     8	  drivers: { label: string; outlook: string; detail: string }[]
     9	  zlOutlook: string
    10	  zlColor: string
    11	  tradingImplication?: string
    12	  aiPowered?: boolean
    13	}
    14	
    15	type RiskFactorsEnvelope = {
    16	  intelligence?: IntelligenceData
    17	}
    18	
    19	export function MarketIntelligenceRow() {
    20	  const [intelligence, setIntelligence] = useState<IntelligenceData | null>(null)
    21	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    22	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    23	
    24	  useEffect(() => {
    25	    let active = true
    26	
    27	    async function load() {
    28	      try {
    29	        const res = await fetch("/api/dashboard/risk-factors", { cache: "no-store" })
    30	        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
    31	        const json = (await res.json()) as RiskFactorsEnvelope
    32	        if (!active) return
    33	        if (json.intelligence) {
    34	          setIntelligence(json.intelligence)
    35	        } else {
    36	          setError("Unable to load market intelligence")
    37	        }
    38	      } catch (e) {
    39	        if (!active) return
    40	        setError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Unable to load market intelligence")
    41	      } finally {
    42	        if (active) setLoading(false)
    43	      }
    44	    }
    45	
    46	    void load()
    47	    return () => {
    48	      active = false
    49	    }
    50	  }, [])
    51	
    52	  if (loading && !intelligence) {
    53	    return (
    54	      <div className="w-full bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8">
    55	        <div className="h-6 w-80 bg-slate-700/40 rounded animate-pulse mb-4" />
    56	        <div className="h-4 w-full bg-slate-700/30 rounded animate-pulse mb-2" />
    57	        <div className="h-4 w-5/6 bg-slate-700/30 rounded animate-pulse" />
    58	      </div>
    59	    )
    60	  }
    61	
    62	  if (error && !intelligence) {
    63	    return (
    64	      <div className="w-full bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 text-slate-500">
    65	        {error}
    66	      </div>
    67	    )
    68	  }
    69	
    70	  if (!intelligence) return null
    71	
    72	  return (
    73	    <div className="w-full bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8">
    74	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
    75	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    76	          <div
    77	            className="w-1 h-6 rounded-full"
    78	            style={{ backgroundColor: intelligence.zlColor }}
    79	          />
    80	          <h4 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">{intelligence.headline}</h4>
    81	          {intelligence.aiPowered && (
    82	            <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-bold bg-cyan-500/15 text-cyan-300 border border-cyan-500/20">
    83	              AI
    84	            </span>
    85	          )}
    86	        </div>
    87	        <span
    88	          className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded text-xs font-bold tracking-wider"
    89	          style={{
    90	            backgroundColor: `${intelligence.zlColor}20`,
    91	            color: intelligence.zlColor,
    92	            border: `1px solid ${intelligence.zlColor}40`,
    93	          }}
    94	        >
    95	          ZL {intelligence.zlOutlook}
    96	        </span>
    97	      </div>
    98	
    99	      <p className="text-base text-slate-400 leading-relaxed mb-4">
   100	        {intelligence.summary}
   101	      </p>
   102	
   103	      {intelligence.tradingImplication && (
   104	        <div className="mb-4 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/50">
   105	          <span className="text-xs text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
   106	            What This Means For You
   107	          </span>
   108	          <p className="text-base text-slate-300 mt-1">{intelligence.tradingImplication}</p>
   109	        </div>
   110	      )}
   111	
   112	      {intelligence.drivers?.length > 0 && (
   113	        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   114	          {intelligence.drivers.map((driver, idx) => (
   115	            <div
   116	              key={`${driver.label}-${idx}`}
   117	              className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm"
   118	            >
   119	              <span
   120	                className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-bold shrink-0 ${
   121	                  driver.outlook === "BEARISH" || driver.outlook === "PRESSURE"
   122	                    ? "bg-red-500/20 text-red-400"
   123	                    : driver.outlook === "BULLISH" ||
   124	                        driver.outlook === "SUPPORTIVE" ||
   125	                        driver.outlook === "CALM"
   126	                      ? "bg-green-500/20 text-green-400"
   127	                      : driver.outlook === "MIXED" ||
   128	                          driver.outlook === "WATCH SUPPLY"
   129	                        ? "bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-400"
   130	                        : "bg-slate-500/20 text-slate-400"
   131	                }`}
   132	              >
   133	                {driver.label}
   134	              </span>
   135	              <span className="text-slate-500">{driver.detail}</span>
   136	            </div>
   137	          ))}
   138	        </div>
   139	      )}
   140	    </div>
   141	  )
   142	}

     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"
     4	
     5	type DriverData = {
     6	  score: number | null
     7	  components?: Record<string, number | null>
     8	}
     9	
    10	type RiskFactorsResponse = {
    11	  drivers?: {
    12	    vix_stress?: DriverData
    13	    crush_pressure?: DriverData
    14	    china_tension?: DriverData
    15	    tariff_threat?: DriverData
    16	    energy_stress?: DriverData
    17	  }
    18	  summary?: {
    19	    average_pressure?: number
    20	  }
    21	}
    22	
    23	type TickerRow = {
    24	  label: string
    25	  sublabel: string
    26	  value: number | null
    27	  score: number | null
    28	}
    29	
    30	const PRESSURE_DOMINANCE_THRESHOLD_PCT = 55
    31	const RISK_HIGH = 55
    32	const RISK_LOW = 45
    33	const HOURLY_REFRESH_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000
    34	
    35	function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
    36	  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value))
    37	}
    38	
    39	function toNumber(value: unknown): number | null {
    40	  const parsed = Number(value)
    41	  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null
    42	}
    43	
    44	function stateFromScore(score: number | null): -1 | 0 | 1 {
    45	  if (score == null) return 0
    46	  if (score >= RISK_HIGH) return -1
    47	  if (score <= RISK_LOW) return 1
    48	  return 0
    49	}
    50	
    51	function stateLabel(state: -1 | 0 | 1): string {
    52	  if (state === 1) return "▲"
    53	  if (state === -1) return "▼"
    54	  return "—"
    55	}
    56	
    57	function stateColor(state: -1 | 0 | 1): string {
    58	  if (state === 1) return "#26C6DA"
    59	  if (state === -1) return "#FF0000"
    60	  return "rgba(255,255,255,0.20)"
    61	}
    62	
    63	function formatValue(label: string, value: number | null): string {
    64	  if (value == null) return "—"
    65	  if (label === "CNY") return value.toFixed(4)
    66	  return value.toFixed(2)
    67	}
    68	
    69	export function MarketSymbolPressureBar() {
    70	  const [riskFactors, setRiskFactors] = useState<RiskFactorsResponse | null>(null)
    71	
    72	  useEffect(() => {
    73	    let active = true
    74	
    75	    async function load() {
    76	      try {
    77	        const riskRes = await fetch("/api/dashboard/risk-factors", { cache: "no-store" })
    78	        const riskJson = (await riskRes.json()) as RiskFactorsResponse
    79	
    80	        if (!active) return
    81	        setRiskFactors(riskJson)
    82	      } catch {
    83	        if (!active) return
    84	        setRiskFactors(null)
    85	      }
    86	    }
    87	
    88	    void load()
    89	    const interval = setInterval(load, HOURLY_REFRESH_MS)
    90	    return () => {
    91	      active = false
    92	      clearInterval(interval)
    93	    }
    94	  }, [])
    95	
    96	  const tickerData = useMemo<TickerRow[]>(() => {
    97	    const drivers = riskFactors?.drivers
    98	    const vix = drivers?.vix_stress
    99	    const crush = drivers?.crush_pressure
   100	    const china = drivers?.china_tension
   101	    const tariff = drivers?.tariff_threat
   102	    const energy = drivers?.energy_stress
   103	
   104	    return [
   105	      {
   106	        label: "CL",
   107	        sublabel: "Crude Oil",
   108	        value: toNumber(energy?.components?.cl_price),
   109	        score: toNumber(energy?.score),
   110	      },
   111	      {
   112	        label: "VIX",
   113	        sublabel: "Volatility",
   114	        value: toNumber(vix?.components?.vix_value),
   115	        score: toNumber(vix?.score),
   116	      },
   117	      {
   118	        label: "OVX",
   119	        sublabel: "Oil Volatility",
   120	        value: toNumber(energy?.components?.ovx_value) ?? toNumber(vix?.components?.ovx_value),
   121	        score: toNumber(energy?.score) ?? toNumber(vix?.score),
   122	      },
   123	      {
   124	        label: "CNY",
   125	        sublabel: "Yuan",
   126	        value: toNumber(china?.components?.cny_rate),
   127	        score: toNumber(china?.score),
   128	      },
   129	      {
   130	        label: "CRUSH",
   131	        sublabel: "Crush Margin",
   132	        value: toNumber(crush?.components?.board_crush_value),
   133	        score: toNumber(crush?.score) ?? toNumber(tariff?.score),
   134	      },
   135	    ]
   136	  }, [riskFactors])
   137	
   138	  const laneImpacts = tickerData.map((row) => {
   139	    const score = row.score
   140	    if (score == null) return 0
   141	    return 50 - score
   142	  })
   143	  const upPressure = laneImpacts.reduce((sum, impact) => sum + Math.max(0, impact), 0)
   144	  const downPressure = laneImpacts.reduce((sum, impact) => sum + Math.max(0, -impact), 0)
   145	  const totalAbs = upPressure + downPressure
   146	  const upPressurePct = totalAbs > 0 ? (upPressure / totalAbs) * 100 : 50
   147	  const downPressurePct = 100 - upPressurePct
   148	  const confluencePct = Math.max(upPressurePct, downPressurePct)
   149	
   150	  const netUpDominant = upPressurePct >= PRESSURE_DOMINANCE_THRESHOLD_PCT
   151	  const netDownDominant = downPressurePct >= PRESSURE_DOMINANCE_THRESHOLD_PCT
   152	  const netDirectionLabel = netUpDominant ? "Bullish" : netDownDominant ? "Bearish" : "Balanced"
   153	
   154	  return (
   155	    <div
   156	      className="flex flex-col w-full flex-shrink-0"
   157	      style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}
   158	    >
   159	      <div className="flex items-center gap-0 w-full overflow-x-auto">
   160	        {tickerData.map((row, index) => {
   161	          const laneImpact = laneImpacts[index] ?? 0
   162	          const lanePressurePct = totalAbs > 0 ? (Math.abs(laneImpact) / totalAbs) * 100 : 0
   163	          const state = stateFromScore(row.score)
   164	          const scoreOpacity = row.score == null ? 0.45 : clamp(0.45 + (Math.abs(laneImpact) / 50) * 0.55, 0.45, 1)
   165	          const tintAlpha =
   166	            row.score == null
   167	              ? 0.04
   168	              : clamp(0.07 + (lanePressurePct / 100) * 0.22, 0.07, 0.30)
   169	          const laneBg =
   170	            state === 1
   171	              ? `rgba(38, 198, 218, ${tintAlpha})`
   172	              : state === -1
   173	                ? `rgba(242, 54, 69, ${tintAlpha})`
   174	                : "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)"
   175	
   176	          return (
   177	            <div
   178	              key={row.label}
   179	              className="flex-1 min-w-[90px] px-3 py-0 flex flex-col gap-0"
   180	              style={{
   181	                background: laneBg,
   182	                borderRight: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",
   183	                transition: "background 0.3s ease",
   184	                opacity: scoreOpacity,
   185	              }}
   186	            >
   187	              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   188	                <span className="text-[11px] font-bold" style={{ color: stateColor(state) }}>
   189	                  {stateLabel(state)}
   190	                </span>
   191	                <span className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/55 tracking-wide">
   192	                  {row.label}
   193	                </span>
   194	                <span className="text-[9px] text-white tracking-wider">
   195	                  {row.sublabel}
   196	                </span>
   197	              </div>
   198	              <div className="flex items-baseline gap-2 flex-wrap">
   199	                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-white tabular-nums">
   200	                  {formatValue(row.label, row.value)}
   201	                </span>
   202	                <span className="text-[10px] text-white tabular-nums">
   203	                  {row.score == null ? "—" : `${Math.round(row.score)}`}
   204	                </span>
   205	                <span className="text-[9px] text-white tabular-nums">
   206	                  {lanePressurePct.toFixed(0)}%
   207	                </span>
   208	              </div>
   209	            </div>
   210	          )
   211	        })}
   212	
   213	        <div
   214	          className="flex-none min-w-[80px] px-3 py-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-0"
   215	          style={{
   216	            background: netUpDominant
   217	              ? "rgba(38, 198, 218, 0.14)"
   218	              : netDownDominant
   219	                ? "rgba(242, 54, 69, 0.16)"
   220	                : "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)",
   221	            borderLeft: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
   222	          }}
   223	        >
   224	          <span className="text-[9px] text-white/30 uppercase tracking-wider font-medium">
   225	            Pressure
   226	          </span>
   227	          <span
   228	            className="text-2xl leading-none font-extrabold tabular-nums"
   229	            style={{ color: "#FFFFFF" }}
   230	          >
   231	            {confluencePct.toFixed(0)}%
   232	          </span>
   233	          <span className="text-[9px] text-white uppercase tracking-wide">{netDirectionLabel}</span>
   234	        </div>
   235	      </div>
   236	    </div>
   237	  )
   238	}

     2	
     3	import { createSupabaseAdminClient } from "@/lib/server/supabase-admin";
     4	import type { ApiEnvelope, DriverAttribution } from "@/lib/contracts/api";
     5	
     6	export async function GET() {
     7	  try {
     8	    const supabase = createSupabaseAdminClient();
     9	
    10	    // Get the latest driver attribution (most recent trade_date, top 4 by rank)
    11	    const { data: rows, error } = await supabase
    12	      .schema("analytics")
    13	      .from("driver_attribution_1d")
    14	      .select("factor, contribution, confidence, trade_date, rank")
    15	      .order("trade_date", { ascending: false })
    16	      .order("rank", { ascending: true })
    17	      .limit(20);
    18	
    19	    if (error) {
    20	      return NextResponse.json(
    21	        { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: error.message },
    22	        { status: 500 },
    23	      );
    24	    }
    25	
    26	    if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
    27	      const envelope: ApiEnvelope<DriverAttribution[]> = {
    28	        ok: true,
    29	        data: [],
    30	        asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    31	        source: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
    32	      };
    33	      return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    34	    }
    35	
    36	    // Filter to latest trade_date only
    37	    const latestDate = rows[0].trade_date;
    38	    const latestRows = rows.filter((r) => r.trade_date === latestDate);
    39	
    40	    const drivers: DriverAttribution[] = latestRows.map((row) => ({
    41	      factor: row.factor,
    42	      contribution: Number(row.contribution),
    43	      confidence: Number(row.confidence),
    44	    }));
    45	
    46	    const envelope: ApiEnvelope<DriverAttribution[]> = {
    47	      ok: true,
    48	      data: drivers,
    49	      asOf: new Date().toISOString(),
    50	      source: "analytics.driver_attribution_1d",
    51	    };
    52	
    53	    return NextResponse.json(envelope);
    54	  } catch (err) {
    55	    return NextResponse.json(
    56	      { ok: false, data: [], asOf: new Date().toISOString(), error: String(err) },
    57	      { status: 500 },
    58	    );
    59	  }

     6	export async function GET() {

     5	 * Especially important if using Fluid compute: Don't put this client in a
     6	 * global variable. Always create a new client within each function when using

     9	export async function createClient() {
    10	  const cookieStore = await cookies();
    11	
    12	  return createServerClient(
    13	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    14	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY!,
    15	    {
    16	      cookies: {
    17	        getAll() {
    18	          return cookieStore.getAll();
    19	        },
    20	        setAll(cookiesToSet) {
    21	          try {
    22	            cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value, options }) =>
    23	              cookieStore.set(name, value, options),
    24	            );
    25	          } catch {
    26	            // The `setAll` method was called from a Server Component.

    28	            // user sessions.
    29	          }
    30	        },
    31	      },
    32	    },
    33	  );

     1	import { createServerClient } from "@supabase/ssr";
     2	import { NextResponse, type NextRequest } from "next/server";
     3	import { hasEnvVars } from "../utils";
     4	
     5	function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
     6	  // Landing page
     7	  if (pathname === "/") return true;
     8	  // All auth flows (login, sign-up, callback, confirm, error, etc.)
     9	  if (pathname.startsWith("/auth/")) return true;
    10	  // Public health check endpoint for uptime monitoring
    11	  if (pathname === "/api/health") return true;
    12	  return false;
    13	}
    14	
    15	function isCronPath(pathname: string): boolean {
    16	  return pathname.startsWith("/api/cron/");
    17	}
    18	
    19	function buildLoginRedirect(request: NextRequest): NextResponse {
    20	  const url = request.nextUrl.clone();
    21	  const next = `${request.nextUrl.pathname}${request.nextUrl.search}`;
    22	  url.pathname = "/auth/login";
    23	  url.searchParams.set("next", next);
    24	  return NextResponse.redirect(url);
    25	}
    26	
    27	export async function updateSession(request: NextRequest) {
    28	  const { pathname } = request.nextUrl;
    29	
    30	  let supabaseResponse = NextResponse.next({
    31	    request,
    32	  });
    33	
    34	  // Public splash and auth flows remain reachable without a session.
    35	  if (isPublicPath(pathname)) {
    36	    return supabaseResponse;
    37	  }
    38	
    39	  // Cron routes are machine-to-machine; they enforce CRON_SECRET per route.
    40	  if (isCronPath(pathname)) {
    41	    return supabaseResponse;
    42	  }
    43	
    44	  // Fail closed if auth env is missing for protected surfaces.
    45	  if (!hasEnvVars) {
    46	    if (pathname.startsWith("/api/")) {
    47	      return NextResponse.json(
    48	        { ok: false, error: "Supabase auth env vars are not configured" },
    49	        { status: 503 },
    50	      );
    51	    }
    52	
    53	    return buildLoginRedirect(request);
    54	  }
    55	
    56	  // With Fluid compute, don't put this client in a global environment
    57	  // variable. Always create a new one on each request.
    58	  const supabase = createServerClient(
    59	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    60	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY!,
    61	    {
    62	      cookies: {
    63	        getAll() {
    64	          return request.cookies.getAll();
    65	        },
    66	        setAll(cookiesToSet) {
    67	          cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value }) =>
    68	            request.cookies.set(name, value),
    69	          );
    70	          supabaseResponse = NextResponse.next({
    71	            request,
    72	          });
    73	          cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value, options }) =>
    74	            supabaseResponse.cookies.set(name, value, options),
    75	          );
    76	        },
    77	      },
    78	    },
    79	  );
    80	
    81	  // Do not run code between createServerClient and
    82	  // supabase.auth.getClaims(). A simple mistake could make it very hard to debug
    83	  // issues with users being randomly logged out.
    84	
    85	  // IMPORTANT: If you remove getClaims() and you use server-side rendering
    86	  // with the Supabase client, your users may be randomly logged out.
    87	  const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.getClaims();
    88	  const user = data?.claims;
    89	
    90	  if (error || !user) {
    91	    if (pathname.startsWith("/api/")) {
    92	      return NextResponse.json(
    93	        { ok: false, error: "Authentication required" },
    94	        { status: 401 },
    95	      );
    96	    }
    97	
    98	    return buildLoginRedirect(request);
    99	  }
   100	
   101	  // IMPORTANT: You *must* return the supabaseResponse object as it is.
   102	  // If you're creating a new response object with NextResponse.next() make sure to:
   103	  // 1. Pass the request in it, like so:
   104	  //    const myNewResponse = NextResponse.next({ request })
   105	  // 2. Copy over the cookies, like so:
   106	  //    myNewResponse.cookies.setAll(supabaseResponse.cookies.getAll())
   107	  // 3. Change the myNewResponse object to fit your needs, but avoid changing
   108	  //    the cookies!
   109	  // 4. Finally:
   110	  //    return myNewResponse
   111	  // If this is not done, you may be causing the browser and server to go out
   112	  // of sync and terminate the user's session prematurely!
   113	
   114	  return supabaseResponse;
   115	}

     1	"use client"
     2	
     3	import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react"
     4	
     5	interface ForecastTarget {
     6	  id: string
     7	  horizonDays: number
     8	  horizonLabel: string
     9	  priceLow: number | null
    10	  priceHigh: number | null
    11	  oofPrice: number | null
    12	  coveragePct: number | null
    13	  isMissing?: boolean
    14	}
    15	
    16	const BIN_COUNT = 11
    17	const AG_HORIZON_DAYS = [30, 90, 180] as const
    18	
    19	function horizonLabel(days: number): string {
    20	  if (days === 30) return "1M"
    21	  if (days === 90) return "3M"
    22	  if (days === 180) return "6M"
    23	  return `${days}d`
    24	}
    25	
    26	function clamp(v: number, min: number, max: number): number {
    27	  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, v))
    28	}
    29	
    30	function cellAlpha(price: number, t: ForecastTarget): number {
    31	  if (t.priceLow === null || t.priceHigh === null || t.oofPrice === null) {
    32	    return 0.08
    33	  }
    34	
    35	  const low = Math.min(t.priceLow, t.priceHigh)
    36	  const high = Math.max(t.priceLow, t.priceHigh)
    37	  const halfWidth = Math.max((high - low) / 2, 0.1)
    38	  const centerDist = Math.abs(price - t.oofPrice) / halfWidth
    39	  const insideZone = price >= low && price <= high
    40	
    41	  if (insideZone) {
    42	    return clamp(1 - centerDist * 0.75, 0.25, 1)
    43	  }
    44	
    45	  const outsideDist = Math.abs(price - t.oofPrice) / (halfWidth * 2.5)
    46	  return clamp(0.18 - outsideDist * 0.12, 0.04, 0.18)
    47	}
    48	
    49	export function ProbabilitySurface() {
    50	  const [targets, setTargets] = useState<ForecastTarget[]>([])
    51	  const [asOfDate, setAsOfDate] = useState<string | null>(null)
    52	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    53	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    54	
    55	  useEffect(() => {
    56	    let cancelled = false
    57	
    58	    async function loadTargets() {
    59	      setLoading(true)
    60	      setError(null)
    61	      try {
    62	        const res = await fetch("/api/zl/forecast-targets", { cache: "no-store" })
    63	        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
    64	        const json = await res.json()
    65	        if (cancelled) return
    66	        setTargets(
    67	          (json.targets ?? [])
    68	            .filter(
    69	              (t: ForecastTarget) =>
    70	                AG_HORIZON_DAYS.includes(t?.horizonDays as (typeof AG_HORIZON_DAYS)[number]) &&
    71	                typeof t?.horizonDays === "number" &&
    72	                typeof t?.priceLow === "number" &&
    73	                typeof t?.priceHigh === "number" &&
    74	                typeof t?.oofPrice === "number",
    75	            )
    76	            .map((t: ForecastTarget) => ({
    77	              ...t,
    78	              horizonLabel: horizonLabel(t.horizonDays),
    79	            }))
    80	            .sort((a: ForecastTarget, b: ForecastTarget) => a.horizonDays - b.horizonDays),
    81	        )
    82	        setAsOfDate(json.asOfDate ?? null)
    83	      } catch (e) {
    84	        if (cancelled) return
    85	        setError(e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Failed to load target zones")
    86	      } finally {
    87	        if (!cancelled) setLoading(false)
    88	      }
    89	    }
    90	
    91	    loadTargets()
    92	    return () => { cancelled = true }
    93	  }, [])
    94	
    95	  const priceBins = useMemo(() => {
    96	    const resolvedTargets = targets.filter(
    97	      (t) => t.priceLow !== null && t.priceHigh !== null && t.oofPrice !== null,
    98	    )
    99	    if (resolvedTargets.length === 0) return [] as number[]
   100	
   101	    const low = Math.min(...resolvedTargets.map((t) => Math.min(t.priceLow!, t.priceHigh!)))
   102	    const high = Math.max(...resolvedTargets.map((t) => Math.max(t.priceLow!, t.priceHigh!)))
   103	    if (!Number.isFinite(low) || !Number.isFinite(high)) return [] as number[]
   104	
   105	    const span = Math.max(high - low, 1)
   106	    const min = low - span * 0.05
   107	    const max = high + span * 0.05
   108	    const step = (max - min) / (BIN_COUNT - 1)
   109	
   110	    return Array.from(
   111	      { length: BIN_COUNT },
   112	      (_, idx) => Number((max - idx * step).toFixed(2)),
   113	    )
   114	  }, [targets])
   115	
   116	  const displayTargets = useMemo(() => {
   117	    const byHorizon = new Map<number, ForecastTarget>()
   118	    for (const t of targets) byHorizon.set(t.horizonDays, t)
   119	
   120	    return AG_HORIZON_DAYS.map((horizonDays) => {
   121	      const resolved = byHorizon.get(horizonDays)
   122	      if (resolved) return resolved
   123	
   124	      return {
   125	        id: `missing-${horizonDays}`,
   126	        horizonDays,
   127	        horizonLabel: horizonLabel(horizonDays),
   128	        priceLow: null,
   129	        priceHigh: null,
   130	        oofPrice: null,
   131	        coveragePct: null,
   132	        isMissing: true,
   133	      } satisfies ForecastTarget
   134	    })
   135	  }, [targets])
   136	
   137	  const gridTemplateColumns = `56px repeat(${Math.max(displayTargets.length, 1)}, minmax(0,1fr))`
   138	
   139	  return (
   140	    <div className="w-full bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
   141	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
   142	        <div>
   143	          <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white uppercase tracking-wider">
   144	            L3 Probability Surface
   145	          </h3>
   146	          <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">
   147	            Real target zone density from latest AG trading-model forecast (1M/3M/6M)
   148	            {asOfDate ? ` (as of ${asOfDate})` : ""}
   149	          </p>
   150	        </div>
   151	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-[10px] text-slate-500">
   152	          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   153	            <span className="inline-block w-2 h-2 rounded-[1px] bg-cyan-400/90" />
   154	            High
   155	          </div>
   156	          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   157	            <span className="inline-block w-2 h-2 rounded-[1px] bg-cyan-400/20" />
   158	            Low
   159	          </div>
   160	        </div>
   161	      </div>
   162	
   163	      {loading && (
   164	        <div className="mt-6 text-sm text-slate-400">Loading forecast density...</div>
   165	      )}
   166	
   167	      {!loading && error && (
   168	        <div className="mt-6 text-sm text-red-400">Failed to load probability data: {error}</div>
   169	      )}
   170	
   171	      {!loading && !error && targets.length === 0 && (
   172	        <div className="mt-6 text-sm text-slate-400">
   173	          No production target zones available yet. This view populates automatically once forecast rows are present.
   174	        </div>
   175	      )}
   176	
   177	      {!loading && !error && targets.length > 0 && (
   178	        <div className="mt-6 space-y-2">
   179	          <div className="grid gap-1" style={{ gridTemplateColumns }}>
   180	            <div />
   181	            {displayTargets.map((t) => (
   182	              <div key={`h-${t.id}`} className="text-center text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-mono">
   183	                <div>{t.horizonLabel}</div>
   184	                {t.isMissing && (
   185	                  <div className="text-[9px] text-slate-600">pending</div>
   186	                )}
   187	              </div>
   188	            ))}
   189	
   190	            {priceBins.map((price) => (
   191	              <React.Fragment key={`row-${price}`}>
   192	                <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 font-mono pr-2 text-right">
   193	                  ${price.toFixed(2)}
   194	                </div>
   195	                {displayTargets.map((t) => {
   196	                  const alpha = cellAlpha(price, t)
   197	                  const title = t.isMissing
   198	                    ? `${t.horizonLabel} | awaiting forecast rows`
   199	                    : `${t.horizonLabel} | zone $${t.priceLow!.toFixed(2)}-$${t.priceHigh!.toFixed(2)} | median $${t.oofPrice!.toFixed(2)}`
   200	                  return (
   201	                    <div
   202	                      key={`${t.id}-${price}`}
   203	                      className="h-5 rounded-[2px] border border-white/5"
   204	                      style={{
   205	                        backgroundColor: `rgba(34, 211, 238, ${alpha})`,
   206	                        boxShadow: alpha > 0.75 ? "0 0 10px rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.35)" : "none",
   207	                      }}
   208	                      title={title}
   209	                    />
   210	                  )
   211	                })}
   212	              </React.Fragment>
   213	            ))}
   214	          </div>
   215	
   216	          <div className="grid gap-1 pt-2 border-t border-white/5" style={{ gridTemplateColumns }}>
   217	            <div className="text-[10px] text-slate-600 font-mono pr-2 text-right">Coverage</div>
   218	            {displayTargets.map((t) => (
   219	              <div key={`c-${t.id}`} className="text-center text-[10px] font-mono text-cyan-300/80">
   220	                {t.coveragePct !== null ? `${t.coveragePct}%` : "--"}
   221	              </div>
   222	            ))}
   223	          </div>
   224	        </div>
   225	      )}
   226	    </div>
   227	  )
   228	}

    36	        schemaReady: false,

    39	        error: error.message,

    22	  exit 1
    23	fi
    24	
    25	# Keep legacy alias for existing Python scripts while standardizing on DATABASE_URL.

    34	
    35	linked_project="$(

    39	    process.stdout.write(data.projectName ?? "");
    40	  '

    44	  exit 1
    45	fi

    47

    49	if [ "${schema_count}" -ne 9 ]; then
    50	  echo "[Gate1] FAIL: expected 9 V16 schemas, found ${schema_count}" >&2
    51	  exit 1
    52	fi
    53	echo "[Gate1] Cloud schema reachability passed (9 schemas visible)"
    54

    56	if [ "${source_count}" -lt 6 ]; then
    57	  echo "[Gate1] FAIL: ops.source_registry has ${source_count} rows (expected at least 6 seeded sources)" >&2
    58	  exit 1
    59	fi
    60	echo "[Gate1] Source registry check passed (${source_count} rows)"
    61	
    62	BASE_URL="${BASE_URL:-}"
    63	if [ -n "${BASE_URL}" ]; then
    64	  echo "[Gate1] Runtime health check against ${BASE_URL}/api/health"
    65	  body_file="$(mktemp)"
    66	  status="$(curl -sS -o "${body_file}" -w "%{http_code}" "${BASE_URL}/api/health")"
    67	  if [ "${status}" -ne 200 ]; then
    68	    echo "[Gate1] FAIL: /api/health returned status ${status}" >&2
    69	    rm -f "${body_file}"
    70	    exit 1
    71	  fi
    72	  node -e '
    73	    const fs = require("fs");
    74	    const payload = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1], "utf8"));
    75	    if (!(payload && payload.ok === true && payload.dbReachable === true)) {
    76	      process.exit(1);
    77	    }
    78	  ' "${body_file}" || {
    79	    echo "[Gate1] FAIL: /api/health payload missing ok=true and dbReachable=true" >&2
    80	    rm -f "${body_file}"
    81	    exit 1
    82	  }
    83	  rm -f "${body_file}"
    84	  echo "[Gate1] Runtime health check passed"
    85	else
    86	  echo "[Gate1] BASE_URL not set; runtime /api/health check skipped"
    87	fi
    88	
    89	echo "[Gate1] Running Python connectivity validation"

    91

--- scripts/verify/gate2.sh
     1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2	set -euo pipefail
     3	
     4	echo "[Gate2] Schema integrity verification"
     5	
     6	if [ -f ".env.local" ]; then
     7	  set -a
     8	  # shellcheck disable=SC1091
     9	  source .env.local
    10	  set +a
    11	  echo "[Gate2] Loaded .env.local"
    12	fi
    13	
    14	DB_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-${SUPABASE_DB_URL:-}}"
    15	if [ -z "${DB_URL}" ]; then
    16	  echo "[Gate2] FAIL: DATABASE_URL (or SUPABASE_DB_URL fallback) must be set" >&2
    17	  exit 1
    18	fi
    19	
    20	SCHEMAS="'mkt','econ','alt','supply','training','forecasts','analytics','ops','vegas'"
    21	
    22	run_sql_scalar() {
    23	  local sql="$1"
    24	  psql "${DB_URL}" -X -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -Atqc "${sql}"
    25	}
    26	
    27	assert_eq() {
    28	  local label="$1"
    29	  local actual="$2"
    30	  local expected="$3"
    31	  if [ "${actual}" -ne "${expected}" ]; then
    32	    echo "[Gate2] FAIL: ${label} expected ${expected}, got ${actual}" >&2
    33	    exit 1
    34	  fi
    35	  echo "[Gate2] PASS: ${label} = ${actual}"
    36	}
    37	
    38	assert_zero() {
    39	  local label="$1"
    40	  local actual="$2"
    41	  assert_eq "${label}" "${actual}" 0
    42	}
    43	
    44	assert_ge() {
    45	  local label="$1"
    46	  local actual="$2"
    47	  local min="$3"
    48	  if [ "${actual}" -lt "${min}" ]; then
    49	    echo "[Gate2] FAIL: ${label} expected >= ${min}, got ${actual}" >&2
    50	    exit 1
    51	  fi
    52	  echo "[Gate2] PASS: ${label} = ${actual} (>= ${min})"
    53	}
    54	
    55	schema_count="$(run_sql_scalar "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_namespace WHERE nspname IN (${SCHEMAS});")"
    56	assert_eq "schema count" "${schema_count}" 9
    57	
    58	table_count="$(run_sql_scalar "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname IN (${SCHEMAS});")"
    59	assert_ge "table count across 9 schemas" "${table_count}" 80
    60	
    61	missing_pk_count="$(run_sql_scalar "
    62	SELECT COUNT(*)
    63	FROM pg_class c
    64	JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
    65	WHERE c.relkind = 'r'
    66	  AND n.nspname IN (${SCHEMAS})
    67	  AND NOT EXISTS (
    68	    SELECT 1
    69	    FROM pg_constraint con
    70	    WHERE con.conrelid = c.oid
    71	      AND con.contype = 'p'
    72	  );
    73	")"
    74	assert_zero "tables missing primary key" "${missing_pk_count}"
    75	
    76	missing_created_at_count="$(run_sql_scalar "
    77	SELECT COUNT(*)
    78	FROM pg_tables t
    79	WHERE t.schemaname IN (${SCHEMAS})
    80	  AND NOT EXISTS (
    81	    SELECT 1
    82	    FROM information_schema.columns c
    83	    WHERE c.table_schema = t.schemaname
    84	      AND c.table_name = t.tablename
    85	      AND c.column_name = 'created_at'
    86	  );
    87	")"
    88	assert_zero "tables missing created_at" "${missing_created_at_count}"
    89	
    90	missing_ingested_at_count="$(run_sql_scalar "
    91	SELECT COUNT(*)
    92	FROM pg_tables t
    93	WHERE t.schemaname IN (${SCHEMAS})
    94	  AND NOT EXISTS (
    95	    SELECT 1
    96	    FROM information_schema.columns c
    97	    WHERE c.table_schema = t.schemaname
    98	      AND c.table_name = t.tablename
    99	      AND c.column_name = 'ingested_at'
   100	  );
   101	")"
   102	assert_zero "tables missing ingested_at" "${missing_ingested_at_count}"
   103	
   104	rls_disabled_count="$(run_sql_scalar "
   105	SELECT COUNT(*)
   106	FROM pg_class c
   107	JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
   108	WHERE c.relkind = 'r'
   109	  AND n.nspname IN (${SCHEMAS})
   110	  AND c.relrowsecurity = false;
   111	")"
   112	assert_zero "tables with RLS disabled" "${rls_disabled_count}"
   113	
   114	tables_without_policy_count="$(run_sql_scalar "
   115	SELECT COUNT(*)
   116	FROM (
   117	  SELECT c.oid
   118	  FROM pg_class c
   119	  JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
   120	  LEFT JOIN pg_policy p ON p.polrelid = c.oid
   121	  WHERE c.relkind = 'r'
   122	    AND n.nspname IN (${SCHEMAS})
   123	  GROUP BY c.oid
   124	  HAVING COUNT(p.oid) = 0
   125	) policy_gap;
   126	")"
   127	assert_zero "tables without any RLS policy" "${tables_without_policy_count}"
   128	
   129	missing_required_index_count="$(run_sql_scalar "
   130	WITH target_columns AS (
   131	  SELECT
   132	    n.nspname AS schema_name,
   133	    c.relname AS table_name,
   134	    a.attname AS column_name
   135	  FROM pg_class c
   136	  JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
   137	  JOIN pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid = c.oid
   138	  WHERE c.relkind = 'r'
   139	    AND n.nspname IN (${SCHEMAS})
   140	    AND a.attnum > 0
   141	    AND NOT a.attisdropped
   142	    AND a.attname IN (
   143	      'bucket_ts',
   144	      'observation_date',
   145	      'trade_date',
   146	      'event_date',
   147	      'forecast_date',
   148	      'ingested_at',
   149	      'created_at'
   150	    )
   151	),
   152	indexed_columns AS (
   153	  SELECT DISTINCT
   154	    n.nspname AS schema_name,
   155	    c.relname AS table_name,
   156	    a.attname AS column_name
   157	  FROM pg_index i
   158	  JOIN pg_class c ON c.oid = i.indrelid
   159	  JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
   160	  JOIN pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid = c.oid
   161	  WHERE c.relkind = 'r'
   162	    AND n.nspname IN (${SCHEMAS})
   163	    AND i.indisvalid
   164	    AND a.attnum = ANY(i.indkey)
   165	)
   166	SELECT COUNT(*)
   167	FROM target_columns tc
   168	LEFT JOIN indexed_columns ic
   169	  ON ic.schema_name = tc.schema_name
   170	 AND ic.table_name = tc.table_name
   171	 AND ic.column_name = tc.column_name
   172	WHERE ic.schema_name IS NULL;
   173	")"
   174	assert_zero "required timestamp/date columns missing indexes" "${missing_required_index_count}"
   175	
   176	ingest_run_table_count="$(run_sql_scalar "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'ops' AND table_name = 'ingest_run';")"
   177	assert_eq "ops.ingest_run existence count" "${ingest_run_table_count}" 1
   178	
   179	source_registry_seed_count="$(run_sql_scalar "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ops.source_registry;")"
   180	assert_ge "ops.source_registry rows" "${source_registry_seed_count}" 6
   181	
   182	echo "Gate2 verification complete"
--- scripts/verify/gate4.sh
     1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2	set -euo pipefail
     3	
     4	BASE_URL="${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4010}"
     5	
     6	echo "[Gate4] Data flow scaffold route checks against ${BASE_URL}"
     7	for path in /api/health /api/zl/price-1d /api/zl/live /api/dashboard/metrics /api/strategy/posture; do
     8	  echo "checking ${path}"
     9	  curl -fsS "${BASE_URL}${path}" >/dev/null || {
    10	    echo "route check failed: ${path}" >&2
    11	    exit 1
    12	  }
    13	done
    14	
    15	echo "Gate4 scaffold checks complete"
--- scripts/verify/gate5.sh
     1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2	set -euo pipefail
     3	
     4	echo "[Gate5] Python pipeline contract checks"
     5	python3 -m compileall -q python
     6	
     7	# Stage builders must produce local artifacts only. Cloud mutation is isolated to promote_to_cloud.py.
     8	if rg -n "TRUNCATE TABLE|INSERT INTO training\." \
     9	  python/fusion/build_matrix.py \
    10	  python/fusion/generate_specialist_features.py \
    11	  python/fusion/generate_specialist_signals.py >/tmp/fusion_gate5_cloud_write_hits.txt; then
    12	  cat /tmp/fusion_gate5_cloud_write_hits.txt
    13	  echo "Gate5 failed: non-promotion pipeline stages contain direct cloud writes" >&2
    14	  exit 1
    15	fi
    16	
    17	PYTHONPATH=python python3 -m fusion.pipeline --phase matrix --dry-run >/dev/null
    18	PYTHONPATH=python python3 -m fusion.pipeline --phase specialists --dry-run >/dev/null
    19	PYTHONPATH=python python3 -m fusion.pipeline --phase signals --dry-run >/dev/null
    20	PYTHONPATH=python python3 -m fusion.pipeline --phase train-readiness --dry-run >/dev/null
    21	PYTHONPATH=python python3 -m fusion.pipeline --phase train --dry-run >/dev/null
    22	if [[ -f data/fusion/matrix_1d.parquet && -f data/fusion/specialist_signals.parquet ]]; then
    23	  PYTHONPATH=python python3 -m fusion.pipeline --phase promote --dry-run >/dev/null
    24	else
    25	  echo "[Gate5] Skipping promote dry-run artifact validation; local parquet artifacts are absent"
    26	fi
    27	PYTHONPATH=python python3 -m fusion.pipeline --phase target-zones --dry-run >/dev/null
    28	
    29	echo "Gate5 Python pipeline contract checks complete"
